We do not belong to any Christian Organization, Denomination or Movement. THE ELOHIM is our source and reward in all that we do.
Jer 17:5 Thus saith THE YAHWEH; cursed be the champion (H1397 "geber", a valiant man or warrior) that trusteth in man, and maketh flesh his arm, and whose heart departeth from THE YAHWEH.
Jer 17:6 For he shall be like the heath in the desert, and shall not see when good cometh; but shall inhabit the parched places in the wilderness, in a salt land and not inhabited.
Jer 17:7 Blessed is the champion that trusteth in THE YAHWEH, and whose hope THE YAHWEH is.

Jer 17:8 For he shall be as a tree planted by the waters, and that spreadeth out her roots by the river, and shall not see when heat cometh, but her leaf shall be green; and shall not be careful in the year of drought, neither shall cease from yielding fruit.
Jer 17:9 The heart is deceitful above all things, and desperately wicked: who can know it?
Jer 17:10 I THE YAHWEH search the heart, I try the reins, even to give every man according to his ways, and according to the fruit of his doings.
It is not our intention to discredit any doctrine of any Organization or Denomination.

The teachings in this book are based on visions from THE TRINITY (THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and THE YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST). They do not represent the full counsel of THE ELOHIM, as it is stated: "For we know in part and we prophesy in part." (1 Cor 13:9).

The Bible verses quoted are from the Authorized King James Bible. At other times, it is necessary for us to use translations given by THE TRINITY. For word study, we used BDB, Strong's and Thayer Lexicons as dictionaries.

FOREWORD
To My Beloved Children (sons and daughters in the spirit adopted by THE HOLY SPIRIT),

Behold! I stand at the door of your hearts and knock. Whosoever shall open the door of his/her heart to Me and listen carefully to My teaching in this book through the hands of My yielded vessels: Shekinaih and Aaron K David, will receive the Revelation to the steps one must go through before they can enter into glory.

Enter ye in at the strait gate: for wide is the gate, and broad is the way, that leadeth to destruction, and many there be which go in there at: Because strait is the gate, and narrow is the way, which leadeth unto life, and few there be that find it (Matt 7:13-14).
Not everyone that saith unto Me, YAHWEH, YAHWEH, shall enter into the Kingdom of Heaven; but he that doeth the will of My Father which is in heaven (Mat 7:21).
When they are there, I will be standing at the Door of Heaven to give them the keys to the Kingdom of Heaven which few have entered, not even the great ministers of today.

Be not deceived, My Father is not mocked; for whatsoever a man soweth, that shall he also reap. For he that soweth to his flesh in being wise in his own eyes in his carnally mindedness shall of the flesh reap corruption; but he that soweth to the Spirit in being led by My spirit in spiritually mindedness, shall of the Spirit reap life everlasting (Gal 6:7-8).
THE TRINITY
PREFACE
BEHOLD, your SALVATION is at hand!
You must read this book to know My REAL SALVATION and to partake of it

We swear, unless you take up your cross, deny yourself and let Me crucify your flesh on it and follow My footstep, you are not worthy to be My disciple. Verily, verily, verily, I say unto you, "Those who are still in bondage of the following: Adultery, fornication, uncleanness, lasciviousness, Idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, strife, seditions, heresies, envyings, murders, drunkenness, revellings, and such like: shall not inherit the kingdom of THE ELOHIM" (Gal 5:19-21).
I urge you therefore, to forgo all that you have to look for this treasure, the pearl of great prize for the restoration of your lost glory in Me since the fall of Mankind in the Garden of Eden.

Lo! And Behold!, you must ascend with Me in this climb through this book as you sojourn in your climb to Heavenly Mount Zion through the leading of Our two representatives, Our two Cherubim of Glory which are prepared by THE TRINITY for the last days Church.

Be not deceived; We are not mocked: for whatsoever a man soweth, that shall he also reap. For he that soweth to his flesh shall of the flesh reap corruption; but he that soweth to the Spirit shall of the Spirit reap life everlasting (Gal 6:7-8).
Finally, this is your BASIC FOUNDATIONAL CLIMB in your REAL RESTORATION (Salvation) 101.
THE TRINITY

PART 1
BEHOLD! MY MESSENGER!
PROLOGUE
As the audience waited patiently for the performers to appear on the stage, suddenly the red curtain on the stage started to open from right to left.

In earnest expectation to see a grand opening, their curiosity were stirred up when they saw the spotlight on an elderly man wearing white, seated on a high swivel chair in the center of the stage. The audience's curiosity was also heightened as they noticed a holographic figure of a woman wearing white seated superimposed on the elderly man at his chest's height.

The elderly man looked benignly at the audience without uttering a word, turned his high swivel chair 180 degrees and the audience was surprised to see the spotlight was now on a boy about eleven years old appearing before them on the same swivel chair.

The boy was tan and ruddy and of a beautiful countenance and goodly to look at. They then realized that the boy was seated back to back with the elderly man on the same double seat back to back swivel chair.
As the audience waited patiently for the boy to speak, he gently smiled at them and then turned the chair 180 degrees and again the elderly man appeared before them.
This maneuver was repeated for a few times and by this time; the curiosity of the audience was triggered to a peak.

After about a minute, the maneuver came to a stop, and to the audience's surprise, the swivel chair, which they shared, had detached itself into two separate chairs, and the spotlight was now on the boy and the elderly man with the holographic woman still seated superimposed on him. They were now facing the audience together; the boy seated on the right of this elderly man.

Finally, the elderly man with the holographic woman still seated superimposed on him, introduced himself and spoke, "I am THE FATHER, and the holographic woman superimposed on me is THE HOLY SPIRIT; and this is My SON, JESUS," as he pointed to the boy with delight.
Suddenly, two spectacular holographic pictures appeared before the very eyes of the audience, and the elderly man pointing to the pictures said to the perplexed audience,

"In the beginning, I (We) exist and co-exist with My (Our) Representatives (Ourselves) in everything that I (We) do; which include(s) the process of CREATION in the beginning, and in the LAST DAYS ON EARTH, which entail the DESTRUCTION process, as per Our Pre-Recorded Script in THE BOOK OF REVELATION.

From THE BOOK OF GENESIS until THE BOOK OF REVELATION, these Two Representatives of Me (us), (SHEKINAIH representing Me, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, and AARON K DAVID representing JESUS) are involved throughout the Scriptures representing Me (us) in doing Our determination throughout the history of Mankind.

They are now sent as per the roles stated in the above picture, representing Me (us) accordingly. Ignoring them and the message that they are bringing from us means, abhorring Our instructions and warnings, thus, signing off your own "Death Sentence" before your time.

Therefore, you must take heed of Our Instructions / Warnings / Oracles spoken by them on Our behalf, as they are THE MESSENGER OF OUR COVENANT, THE TWO CHERUBIM OF OUR GLORY, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE COSMOS JUDGE ON OUR BEHALF, THE ANGEL(S) WHO REPRESENT OUR NAME(S), THE ELIJAH IN THE HOLY SPIRIT AND THE FATHER, THE MOSES AND AARON, THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH, THE ANGEL OF YAHWEH IN THE HOLY SPIRIT AND THE FATHER (THE MAJOR YAHWEH), THE ANGEL(S) OF MY (OUR) PRESENCE, THE WORD OF THE YAHWEH, THE YAHWEH WHOM YOU SEEK WHO WILL SUDDENLY COME TO MY (OUR) TEMPLE TO REVEAL TO YOU YOUR STANDING WITH ME (US) AT THIS MOMENT IN HEAVEN, AND YOUR RESPECTIVE STEPS THAT YOU NEED TO TAKE TO AMEND YOUR LIVES IN ORDER THAT YOU AND YOUR HOUSEHOLD CAN BE TRULY SAVED."
THE DEFINITION OF THE ANCIENT OF DAYS
Suddenly, two holographic pictures appeared before the eyes of the audience in the form of an anagram. The elderly man then said to the bewildered audience,

"The ANCIENT OF DAYS, consists of THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and JESUS, represented by Shekinaih and Aaron K David, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, who do the execution of The Macro by decreeing, sealing, execution of all Major Structure and Major details of Our Creation and Destruction Process, etc., and by the Micro co-executor of all the Micro details respectively.
The anagram is first read from top to bottom, and then continue to be read from bottom to top, DUE TO OUR DECLARATION IS ALL ENCOMPASSING, FLUID, CAN BE READ IN ALL(S) WAY(S).
FIRSTLY, READ FROM TOP TO BOTTOM FOLLOWING THE RED ARROW SIGNIFYING THE DESTRUCTION PROCESS.
THEREAFTER, READ FROM BOTTOM TO THE TOP, FOLLOWING THE GREEN ARROW SIGNIFYING THE CREATION PROCESS.
THEREFORE, THIS IS THE

Shekinaih has been with Me and THE HOLY SPIRIT IN THE BEGINNING. So is Aaron K David in JESUS AT THE BEGINNING. BOTH OF THEM EXISTED BEFORE ALL THINGS WERE CREATED IN/AT THE BEGINNING. BOTH OF THEM ARE AN EXTENSION OF US IN THE BEGINNING.
I, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT, INCARNATE and REINCARNATE in Shekinaih respectively, and JESUS REINCARNATE in Aaron K David. BOTH OF THEM WERE BORN ON THIS EARTH WITH OUR SPIRIT DWELLING IN THEM.
Shekinaih was, "IN THE BEGINNING", and Aaron K David was, "AT THE BEGINNING".

IN THE BEGINNING = EXISTED BEFORE ALL WERE BEING CREATED 
 WITH "UNAPPROACHABLE LIGHT".
AT THE BEGINNING = "BEING CREATED".
Shekinaih was WITH ME IN THE BEGINNING. Her Spirit EXISTED WITH ME IN THE BEGINNING AS ONE WITH Me She is part of ME, THE FATHER.
However, THE HOLY SPIRIT AND JESUS, ARE CREATED BEINGS. Shekinaih represents BOTH, THE NON-CREATED BEING AND THE CREATED BEING; NON-CREATED BEING IN THE FATHER, AND CREATED BEING IN THE HOLY SPIRIT.

Son of man, don't be wise in your own eyes. Thinking you know better with all the Theology in your mind; thereby causing you to miss Our Revelation of Our Existence together with Shekinaih, who was with Me in the beginning and with THE HOLY SPIRIT, at the beginning; and so likewise, Aaron K David, who was with JESUS at the beginning.
Henceforth, missing the real Heaven and spend eternity in hell together with your Theology.
Therefore, you must relearn all your theology which stands for
Reading from bottom up means YOU NEED TO UNDO:

WHY ARE YOU GOING FOR GEOMETRY (FIXED SHAPE, RESTRICTED LEARNING, THE 2D PERSPECTIVE = CARNAL PERSPECTIVE) INSTEAD OF OVAL (OPEN MIND, LIMITLESS, BOUNDARYLESS PROGRESS) TOGETHER WITH LETTER (MESSENGER FROM HEAVEN)? OH OH!! BEING EUPHORIA (EMOTIONALLY HIGH, JUMPING UP AND DOWN, THEREBY PULLING YOUR HAIR OFF) DRIVING TO THE POINT OF HEADACHES THEREBY TARNISH YOUR SPIRIT MAN AND MISS THE BOAT AND MISS HEAVEN, LEFT BEHIND TO THE POINT OF NO AVAIL.
Suddenly, the spotlight that is on them went off and there was silence in the audience for they did not know what to make of it.

Act 1 Scene 1
In the Forest
Once upon a time, there lived a Father and his son. One day they were walking together in a forest, picking red cherries.

While the son was excitedly picking the cherries and putting them in a bamboo basket, suddenly a green four-legged snake standing on its two legs stood in front of the Father and the son. It then began to speak, "Oh Mighty Father" as he pointed his finger to the son, "This son, AARON K DAVID that you have just created, I bet with you that he will fail you flatly; for he is no better than me. The green serpent then laughed wickedly, "Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha… Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha… Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha"
"We shall see", replied THE FATHER who suddenly transformed himself into THE GOLDEN EMPRESS, SHEKINAIH and the conversation ended.

Act 1 Scene 2
In the Serenity of the Deep Forest

There was a great commotion in the sky. The green snake and all the spirits of the forest were moving in a panicky and restless manner in all directions aimlessly. They were all thrown into fits because of their coming fate. Hovering above the forest sky, they formed a large black cloud of evil forces.

Meanwhile, in the serenity of the deep forest, THE FATHER, who had just transformed Himself into THE GOLDEN EMPRESS, SHEKINAIH, stood down in front of her 11-year-old son, who was wearing a short sleeve white shirt and blue shorts, in his primary school uniform.
"SON, THE DEVIL CHALLENGED ME, THAT YOU WILL FAIL ME FLATLY?" looking straight into his eye, she asked, "WILL YOU?"
"I AM DETERMINED TO WIN", said the son, with strong conviction in his eyes, looking at his Father in THE GOLDEN EMPRESS, SHEKINAIH.

Upon hearing His/her son's reply, the GOLDEN EMPRESS, SHEKINAIH, was very pleased. Immediately, she placed her right palm on her son's chest and started to breathe her breath into him. As she soon as she did that, light came out of her mouth and went into the boy's heart. The light in her son began to grow larger and larger until he became a muscular spiritual giant in the form of light reaching to the heaven(s); and this word "JESUS" written on his back.

With a vengeance and fully aware of what he was destined to do, he began to turn his face and stomped his giant feet towards the direction of the green snake in the forest, thereby causing the entire forest ground to shake terribly.

The green snake upon seeing what had just became of this little boy whom he ridiculed previously, dropped its jaw suddenly; and with his eyes wide open in shock and horror, began to scream the life out of itself, saying, "Ah………., I AM DOOMED!"; and in terror jumped hastily in cowardice manner into the crevice in the ground, and covered the hole with dust thereafter.

So are all the spirits of the forest, the spirits of the trees, and all the beasts of the forest, frightened by the shaking of the earth through the giant's stomping footsteps; seeing the green snake fleeing, also fled in terror, hid themselves in the cavern of the earth, and covered themselves with dust.
Upon seeing the green snake and all the beasts of the forest fled into cavern, the giant being then lifted up his face and both his hands towards heaven and proclaimed with a loud voice,

"Enter into the rock, and hide thee in the dust, for fear of THE YAHWEH, and for the glory of his Excellency. The lofty looks of man shall be humbled, and the haughtiness of men shall be bowed down, and THE YAHWEH alone shall be exalted in that day. For the day of THE YAHWEH SABAOTH shall be upon every one that is proud and lofty, and upon every one that is lifted up; and he shall be brought low: And upon all the cedars of Lebanon, that are high and lifted up, and upon all the oaks of Bashan, And upon all the high mountains, and upon all the hills that are lifted up, And upon every high tower, and upon every fenced wall, And upon all the ships of Tarshish, and upon all pleasant pictures. And the loftiness of man shall be bowed down, and the haughtiness of men shall be made low: and THE YAHWEH alone shall be exalted in that day. And the idols he shall utterly abolish. And they shall go into the caverns of the rocks, and into the caves of the earth, for fear of THE YAHWEH, and for the glory of his Excellency, when he ariseth to shake terribly the earth. In that day a man shall cast his idols of silver, and his idols of gold, which they made each one for himself to worship, to the moles and to the bats; To go into the clefts of the rocks, and into the branches , for fear of THE YAHWEH, and for the glory of his Excellency, when he ariseth to shake terribly the earth. Cease ye from man, whose breath is in his nostrils: for wherein is he to be accounted of?" (Isa 2:10 -22).

Act 1 Scene 3 
The Mystery of THE TRINITY
In the Park

Shekinaih and David were seated opposite each other on a bench in a park besides a still river. And while they were inquiring from THE TRINITY on how to fill the contents of the four books which they were commissioned to write, suddenly Jesus who was wearing a white robe, appeared before them. He laid four books on a table and arranged them from the left to the right, and said to them, "These books will also be used as Movie Script for four Movies Series". Jesus then disappeared.

Following that, THE FATHER and THE LORD JESUS suddenly projected themselves out of Shekinaih like a hologram and sat in their presence. THE FATHER sat next to Shekinaih on a bench, and JESUS sat beside David on another bench. Between them was an outdoor table and it was sited next to a river. David then inquired of THE FATHER regarding The Mystery of THE TRINITY as he read out Genesis 17:1-9,

Gen 17:1 And when Abram was ninety years old and nine, THE YAHWEH (THE TRINITY, JESUS at FATHER'S womb height inside THE HOLY SPIRIT who is AT FATHER'S chest height is inside THE FATHER) appeared to Abram, and said unto him, I am THE EL SHADDAI; walk before me, and be thou perfect. Gen 17:2 And I will make my covenant between me and thee, and will multiply thee exceedingly. Gen 17:3 And Abram fell on his face: and THE ELOHIM talked with him, saying, Gen 17:4 As for me, behold, my covenant is with thee, and thou shalt be a father of many nations. Gen 17:5 Neither shall thy name any more be called Abram, but thy name shall be Abraham; for a father of many nations have I made thee. Gen 17:6 And I will make thee exceeding fruitful, and I will make nations of thee, and kings shall come out of thee. Gen 17:7 And I will establish my covenant between me and thee and thy seed after thee in their generations for an everlasting covenant, to be THE ELOHIM unto thee, and to thy seed after thee. Gen 17:8 And I will give unto thee, and to thy seed after thee, the land wherein thou art a stranger, all the land of Canaan, for an everlasting possession; and I will be their ELOHIM. Gen 17:9 And THE ELOHIM said unto Abraham, Thou shalt keep my covenant therefore, thou, and thy seed after thee in their generations. Gen 17:10 This is my covenant, which ye shall keep, between me and you and thy seed after thee; Every man child among you shall be circumcised.
THE YAHWEH That Appeared to Abraham
David: ABBA FATHER, in what form did you appear to Abraham in Genesis Chapter 17?
Shekinaih: I saw a very tall person in a vision. Inside him, was another person at his chest's height and another person at his womb's height. I saw these three persons as one approached Abraham.
David: So it was THE TRINITY that appeared to Abraham.
Shekinaih: THE TRINITY stand here with three whiteboards with these words written on it: "CONFIRMED! CONFIRMED! CONFIRMED!"
David: ABBA FATHER, what did Abraham actually see when you appeared to him? Did he see three persons in flesh or did he see an apparition?
Shekinaih: He saw The Angel of THE YAHWEH and THE HOLY SPIRIT in THE FATHER.
David: ABBA FATHER, can you enlighten me? I still do not get it.

Shekinaih: I saw THE FATHER as a huge man appeared to Abraham first. Then, suddenly, I saw JESUS came out of THE FATHER and stood on his right; but I saw THE HOLY SPIRIT was still inside THE FATHER. I saw JESUS and THE FATHER both spoke alternately to Abraham.
David: So, now Abraham saw two persons.
Shekinaih: Yes, JESUS is one person, and THE HOLY SPIRIT and THE FATHER is another person.
David: So Abraham saw two angels.
Shekinaih: Yes, interchangeable.
David: What do you mean by interchangeable? I do not understand.

Behold! My Messenger!

JESUS: What My FATHER have shown Me, I will reveal to you from book 1 to book 4; but you must faithfully write it down in paper: so that it will be transmitted to humanity regarding the Mysteries of the Kingdom of Heaven. I now hereby appoint you as My scribe to record all that My FATHER and I will speak through Shekinaih. I have anointed your tongue to be the pen of a ready writer. Whatever I speak to you in your heart, it will gush out like a river of living water, which is refreshing to the soul; for My Word is spirit, and it is life. In order for you to understand My teaching, you must always refer to the Strong's Definition for the original meaning of the word. Many of the modern translations have re-rendered the true meaning of the scriptures. Therefore, you must always refer to the dictionary, if you are to understand the revelation, which I am now going to expound to you.

David: The Greek word for "Behold" G2400 "idou" is the same as the Hebrew H2009 "hinneh". It is a second person singular imperative middle voice of G1492 "eido", meaning "Behold!" Literally, it means, "Be sure to see…!" i.e. "Don't miss this! It is an observable objective fact!".

JESUS: Throughout Genesis to Revelation, there are five figures that My FATHER through THE HOLY SPIRIT, have repeatedly through the prophets, admonished My people to behold. We have repeatedly reminded them to behold, or be sure to see, or do not miss to see: The Messenger, which We have sent and will again send.

The first figure is The Angel of THE YAHWEH, (THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih, representing THE YAHWEH, and you, Aaron K David, representing Me as The Angel) in Exodus 23:20. We have sent this angel to represent Our Names to guard over Israel that they will keep My way of holiness so that they may enter into the place We have prepared for them. I have warned Israel to beware of him and obey his voice and not to provoke him, for he will not pardon their transgressions.

Eph 1:13 In whom ye also trusted, after that ye heard the word of truth, the gospel of your salvation: in whom also after that ye believed, ye were sealed with that Holy Spirit of Message (G1860 "epaggelia"), Eph 1:14 Which is the earnest of our inheritance until the redemption of the purchased possession, unto the commendation of his glory.

They will know the unsearchable riches of those who have the potential to be a Christ, and be filled with Our fullness, to make known Our manifold wisdom unto the principalities and authorities in the heaven, if they root and ground themselves in My FATHER's love as they go through the tribulations appointed for them.

Eph 3:1 For this cause I Paul, the prisoner of JESUS CHRIST for you Gentiles, Eph 3:2 If ye have heard of the stewardship of the grace of THE ELOHIM which is given me to you-ward: Eph 3:3 How that by revelation he made known unto me the mystery; (as I wrote afore in few words, Eph 3:4 Whereby, when ye read, ye may understand my knowledge in the mystery of a CHRIST) Eph 3:5 Which in other ages was not made known unto the sons of Adam, as it is now revealed unto his holy apostles and prophets by the Spirit; Eph 3:6 That the Gentiles should be fellowheirs, and of the same body, and partakers of his message (G1860 "epaggelia") in Christ by the gospel: Eph 3:7 Whereof I was made a minister, according to the gift of the grace of THE ELOHIM given unto me by the effectual working of his power. They will know that their Hope of Eternal Life is through acknowledging the truth, which is after godliness.

Tit 1:1 Paul, a servant of THE ELOHIM, and an apostle of JESUS CHRIST, according to the faith of THE ELOHIM's elect, and the acknowledging of the truth which is after godliness; Tit 1:2 In hope of eternal life, which THE ELOHIM, that cannot lie, upon an angel (G1861 "epaggello" from G1909 "epi" upon + G32 "aggelos" angel) before the age began; Tit 1:3 But hath in due times manifested his word through preaching, which is committed unto me according to the commandment of our Saviour;

They will know that those who are straiten in circumstances and yet patient in the testing of My FATHER because of their love towards Him will receive the crown of life from both of you, The Angel of Our Presence after commended by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih who represent THE TRINITY as well.

Heb 6:11 And we desire that every one of you do shew the same diligence to the full assurance of hope unto the end: Heb 6:12 That ye be not slothful, but followers of them who through faith and patience inherit the messages (G1860 "epaggelia"). Heb 6:15 And so, after he had patiently endured, he obtained the message. Heb 6:16 For men verily swear by the greater: and an oath for confirmation is to them an end of all strife. Heb 6:17 Wherein THE ELOHIM, willing more abundantly to shew unto the heirs of the message (G1860 "epaggelia") the immutability of his counsel, confirmed it by an oath: Heb 6:18 That by two immutable things, in which it was impossible for THE ELOHIM to lie, we might have a strong consolation, who have fled for refuge to lay hold upon the hope set before us: Heb 6:19 Which hope we have as an anchor of the soul, both sure and stedfast, and which entereth into that within the veil; Heb 6:20 Whither the forerunner is for us entered, even JESUS, made an high priest for ever after the order of Melchisedec.

They will know of Our New Covenant which My FATHER will put His laws into their minds and write them in their hearts so that they shall know us, THE YAHWEH and their sins and their iniquities shall be forgiven.

1Jn 1:5 This then is the message (G1860 "epaggelia") which we have heard of him, and declare unto you, that THE ELOHIM is light, and in him is no darkness at all. 1Jn 1:6 If we say that we have fellowship with him, and walk in darkness, we lie, and do not the truth: 1Jn 1:7 But if we walk in the light, as he is in the light, we have fellowship one with another, and the blood of JESUS CHRIST his Son cleanseth us from all sin.

If any man love the world, the love of the Father is not in him. 1Jn 2:16 For all that is in the world, the lust of the flesh, and the lust of the eyes, and the pride of life, is not of the Father, but is of the world. 1Jn 2:17 And the world passeth away, and the lust thereof: but he that doeth the will of abideth for ever. 1Jn 2:25 And this is the message (G1860 "epaggelia") that he hath upon an angel (G1861 epaggello from G1909 epi upon + G32 aggelos angel) to us, even eternal life.
David: LORD JESUS, can you summarize what you have just expounded to me regarding the original message by The Angel of Your Covenant?
JESUS: In Summary, the original message is this:

I have commanded My disciples that they should tarry in Jerusalem to wait for the message of THE HOLY SPIRIT and to be baptized (purified) in her. This is but a precursor of the last days reception of the original message of THE HOLY SPIRIT and her baptism/purification. The baptism on the day of Pentecost is but a shadow of the last day's baptism/purification in which you, The Angel of My Presence, whom I have put My Name in, shall, through the power of THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih, baptize/purify Our called ones who have repented from their uncircumcised hearts. They shall call upon both of you who bear Our Names and shall be imparted with spiritual gifts according to their destiny as they are called by us through both of you. We will through both of you reveal to them Our Covenant, "The Sure Mercies of David" which I have made with King David is but a precursor of Our last days Covenant through Shekinaih whom represents us, with Our last days spiritual King David, that is you, and through both Our and your spiritual seed who are the children of resurrection, We will establish forever both Shekinaih and your thrones and theirs shall We build to all generations. They shall know that they are Our elect, the children of THE ELOHIM, whom the message are meant for, who are the vessels of mercy that are prepared unto glory beforehand. They shall know that they must be adopted by THE HOLY SPIRIT PISTIS through Shekinaih representing THE FATHER and must be purified/ baptized in us through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, THE CHRIST to become a Christ/Anointed one for they are spirit in the beginning born from above by THE HOLY SPIRIT, the Heavenly Jerusalem. Through your illumination, their eyes will be opened to see the real Kingdom of THE ELOHIM, a city which hath foundation whose builder and maker is THE ELOHIM. It is only through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, is The Elijah, who was, and is, and is to come, shall they be restored to wholeness if they choose to believe and submit and through the renovation of their mind by THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih as well as being regenerated by abiding in the words of truth spoken by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih and I represented by you. Many are called to be a Christ and have the potential to be adopted by THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih to be the children of THE ELOHIM and be the temple of THE ELOHIM if they cleanse themselves from all filthiness of the flesh and spirit, perfecting holiness in the fear of THE ELOHIM. And only those who circumcised their hearts in THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih by not being wise in their own eyes but are 100% yielded to her are sealed with the seal of righteousness by both of you, The Elijah, and be redeemed and commended to receive Our glory through the decree, sealing and execution by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih and co-executed by I, in you. This is the unsearchable riches of those who have the potential to be a Christ; to be filled with Our fullness to make known Our manifold wisdom unto the principalities and authorities in the heaven, if they root and ground themselves in My FATHER'S love as they go through the tribulations appointed for them. Despite being straitened in circumstances, through patience in the testing of My FATHER and love towards Him, he who overcomes will receive the crown of life from both of you, The Angel of Our Presence after commended by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih and I, represented by you, who represent THE TRINITY. These will enter into Our rest to be a part of the Heavenly Zion because they are not wise in their own eyes but have ceased from all the works of the flesh, trusting My FATHER in His testing by keeping peace in all the strait circumstances My FATHER have put them in. They will enter within the veil into the holiest to be made a high priest forever after the order of Melchisedec through their faith and patience because of the New Covenant that We made with them as My FATHER put His laws into their minds and write them in their hearts so that they shall know us, THE YAHWEH, who is their righteousness and their sins and their iniquities shall be forgiven them. For they shall be worthy to dwell in the new heavens and earth wherein dwells righteousness because they walk in peace, without spot and blameless as they continue to walk in light, true repentance and perfect love towards THE FATHER; doing His will and hating the Cosmos with its lusts of the flesh and of the eyes thus resulting in eternal life.
David: ABBA FATHER, this is indeed the true message.
2) To Call the Last days Seven Churches to Repentance

JESUS: My FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih , and Me in you, The Elijah, together they are , THE MESSENGER OF OUR COVENANT, TWO CHERUBIM OF OUR GLORY, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE COSMOS JUDGE ON OUR BEHALF, THE ANGEL(S) WHO REPRESENT OUR NAME(S); THE ELIJAH, IN THE HOLY SPIRIT AND THE FATHER, THE MOSES AND THE AARON, THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH; THE ANGEL OF YAHWEH, IN THE HOLY SPIRIT AND THE FATHER (THE MAJOR YAHWEH), THE ANGEL(S) OF MY (OUR) PRESENCE, THE WORD OF THE YAHWEH, THE YAHWEH WHOM YOU SEEK WHO WILL SUDDENLY COME TO MY (OUR) TEMPLE.

When John wanted to worship HER/HIM thinking that SHE/HE was I, The Angel deterred him and explained that SHE/HE are also a prophet and My witness and is the spirit of prophecy. SHE/HE then told John that SHE/HE would come quickly to fulfill all that is going to unfold in the Book of Revelation and that SHE/HE will not delay but will come quickly to judge and reward every man according to their work.

Rev 22:8 And I John saw these things, and heard them. And when I had heard and seen, I fell down to worship before the feet of the angel which shewed me these things. Rev 22:9 Then saith he unto me, See thou do it not: for I am thy fellowservant, and of thy brethren the prophets, and of them which keep the sayings of this book: worship THE ELOHIM. Rev 22:10 And he saith unto me, Seal not the sayings of the prophecy of this book: for the time is at hand. Rev 22:11 He that is unjust, let him be unjust still: and he which is filthy, let him be filthy still: and he that is righteous, let him be righteous still: and he that is holy, let him be holy still. Rev 22:12 And, behold, I come quickly; and my reward is with me, to give every man according as his work shall be.

Following that, I(We) also exclaimed that I(We) have sent HER/HIM to testify to the churches the things that are to come. This angel responded subserviently that indeed HE in THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT in SHE, would prepare the Bride to welcome Me at My(us) coming. SHE/HE, then affirmed with this statement: "Surely, I (SHE/HE) come quickly (without delay, not tarry)."

Rev 22:16 I JESUS have sent mine angel to testify unto you these things in the churches. I am the root and the offspring of David, and the bright and morning star. Rev 22:17 And the Spirit and the bride say, Come. And let him that heareth say, Come. And let him that is athirst come. And whosoever will, let him take the water of life freely. Rev 22:18 For I testify unto every man that heareth the words of the prophecy of this book, If any man shall add unto these things, THE ELOHIM shall add unto him the plagues that are written in this book: Rev 22:19 And if any man shall take away from the words of the book of this prophecy, THE ELOHIM shall take away his part out of the book of life, and out of the holy city, and from the things which are written in this book. Rev 22:20 He which testifieth these things saith, Surely I come quickly. Amen. Even so, come, Lord JESUS. Rev 22:21 The grace of our Lord JESUS CHRIST be with you all. Amen.
This angel who signifies Me had promised that he would come quickly five times in the Book of Revelation and My seven last days Congregations should take heed to My Elijah in THE HOLY SPIRIT.

Rev 2:5 Remember therefore from whence thou art fallen, and repent, and do the first works; or else I will come unto thee quickly, and will remove thy candlestick out of his place, except thou repent. Rev 2:6 But this thou hast, that thou hatest the deeds of the Nicolaitans, which I also hate.
Rev 2:7 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches; To him that overcometh will I give to eat of the tree of life, which is in the midst of the paradise of THE ELOHIM.

Rev 2:16 Repent; or else I will come unto thee quickly, and will fight against them with the sabre (G4501 "rhomphaia") of my mouth. Rev 2:17 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches.

Rev 3:11 Behold, I come quickly: hold that fast which thou hast, that no man take thy crown. Rev 3:12 Him that overcometh will I make a pillar in the temple of my THE ELOHIM, and he shall go no more out: and I will write upon him the name of my THE ELOHIM, and the name of the city of my THE ELOHIM, which is new Jerusalem, which cometh down out of heaven from my THE ELOHIM: and I will write upon him my new name. Rev 3:13 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches.

Rev 22:12 And, behold, I come quickly; and my reward is with me, to give every man according as his work shall be. Rev 22:13 I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end, the first and the last. Rev 22:14 Blessed are they that do his commandments, that they may have right to the tree of life, and may enter in through the gates into the city. Rev 22:15 For without are dogs, and sorcerers, and whoremongers, and murderers, and idolaters, and whosoever loveth and maketh a lie. Rev 22:16 I Jesus have sent mine angel to testify unto you these things in the churches. I am the root and the offspring of David, and the bright and morning star.
Rev 22:20 He which testifieth these things saith, Surely I come quickly. Amen.
All the things: people, angels, living creatures, places and time that are mentioned in the Book of Revelation are used to signify something in the last days.

Rev 1:1 The Revelation of JESUS CHRIST, which THE ELOHIM gave unto him, to shew unto his servants things which must shortly come to pass; and he sent and signified it by his angel unto his servant John: Rev 1:2 Who bare record of the word of THE ELOHIM, and of the testimony of JESUS CHRIST, and of all things that he saw.

The Book of Revelation is about the last days. The letters to the Seven Churches are twofold: they refer to the early churches of that time but they also refer to the last days' Spiritual Churches. That is the meaning of "signified" in Revelation 1:1.

My FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT through Shekinaih, Their representative, will come with My angel, the Elijah, shall call My Last days Seven Churches to Repentance in bringing fruits of righteousness unto holiness lest they be condemned with the world.
To the Church in Ephesus (Christians and Messianic Congregation in Israel)
David: ABBA FATHER, who are the seven angels and seven churches?

JESUS: Ephesus means permitted. I permit this congregation to undergo hardship and great tribulation and persecution by the Antichrist. The church of Ephesus signifies the Christians and Messianic Congregation in the land of Israel led by a messenger who is a brunet man. There are smaller groups of this Israelite congregation scattered all over the world.

When this messenger first started serving us, in works, in labor, and in patience, he always put us first in every area of his life; loving Me above all else including his loved ones; 100% circumcised and yielded to My spirit.
He was also ever vigilant against the false Apostles from the Messianic congregation and the religious spiritual Nicolaitans leaders who are talkers but not doers; lording over My children.
Now he is wise in his own eyes, having confidence in his carnal mindedness, no more loving Me and honoring men more than Me.

We will send both of you, who represent THE TRINITY; Our two Cherubim of Glory, to turn his heart back to us again to keep the way of the tree of life in totally trusting and obeying Our way. Genesis 3:24 is a metaphor. The Cherubim with the flaming sword represents both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, Our Cherubim of Glory with the sword of Our spirit, Our oracle.
Gen 3:24 So he drove out the man; and he placed at the east of the garden of Eden Cherubim with flaming sword, which convert, to keep the way of the tree of life.
David: ABBA FATHER, what then does the way of the Tree of life represents?

JESUS: The way of the Tree of life represents the way of The Holy Spirit. Turn The Messenger and his Ephesus congregation to be agreeable to My way of chastening peaceably. Warn them to depart from association with evil uncircumcised ministers. However, be circumcised in heart by THE HOLY SPIRIT; worshipping THE FATHER in the spirit and in truth; not having confidence in the flesh.
Pro 3:5 Trust in THE YAHWEH with all thine heart; and lean not unto thine own understanding. Pro 3:6 In all thy ways acknowledge him, and he shall direct thy paths.
Pro 3:7 Be not wise in thine own eyes: fear THE YAHWEH, and depart from evil.
Pro 3:17 Her ways are ways of agreeableness, and all her paths are peace. Pro 3:18 She is a tree of life to them that lay hold upon her: and happy is every one that retaineth her.

He that hath an ear, let him hear what the SPIRIT (HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih) of Truth (JESUS in David) saith unto the churches. To him that overcometh will I give to eat of the Tree of life, which is in the midst of the paradise of THE ELOHIM.

Rev 2:1 Unto the angel of the church of Ephesus write; These things saith he that holdeth the seven stars in his right hand, who walketh in the midst of the seven golden candlesticks; Rev 2:2 I know thy works, and thy labour, and thy patience, and how thou canst not bear them which are evil: and thou hast tried them which say they are apostles, and are not, and hast found them liars: Rev 2:3 And hast borne, and hast patience, and for my name's sake hast laboured, and hast not fainted. Rev 2:4 Nevertheless I have somewhat against thee, because thou hast left thy first love. Rev 2:5 Remember therefore from whence thou art fallen, and repent, and do the first works; or else I will come unto thee quickly, and will remove thy candlestick out of his place, except thou repent. Rev 2:6 But this thou hast, that thou hatest the deeds of the Nicolaitans, which I also hate. Rev 2:7 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches; To him that overcometh will I give to eat of the tree of life, which is in the midst of the paradise of THE ELOHIM.
To the Church in Smyrna (Mainly Indian Congregation and other races of Christians from Poor Countries)
Smyrna Church signifies mainly Indian Congregation/Church in India but also other races of Christians from poor countries all over the world.

Persecution and tribulation against this Indian Congregation and other races of Christians from poor countries will come from the following categories: the false Christian authorities, the government under Antichrist, the organization that will deceive the whole world to follow their policies, and extremist radical fanatic Hinduism. Some will be accused wrongly and put into prison for ten days and be tried, some will be threatened to deny Me and worship the beast and receive his mark. Those who faithful and refuse to deny Me, shall be killed but will be resurrected by THE TRINITY and have eternal life. He that hath an ear, let him hear what the SPIRIT (THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih) of TRUTH (JESUS in David) saith unto the churches; he that overcometh shall not be hurt of the second death.

Rev 2:8 And unto the angel of the church in Smyrna write; These things saith the first and the last, which was dead, and is alive; Rev 2:9 I know thy works, and tribulation, and poverty, (but thou art rich) and I know the blasphemy of them which say they are Jews, and are not, but are the synagogue of Satan. Rev 2:10 Fear none of those things which thou shalt suffer: behold, the devil shall cast some of you into prison, that ye may be tried; and ye shall have tribulation ten days: be thou faithful unto death, and I will give thee a crown of life. Rev 2:11 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches; He that overcometh shall not be hurt of the second death.
To the Church in Pergamum (African)

Pergamum Church signifies the particular type of Congregation in Africa, mainly in Uganda. It includes sub-category of this type of Congregation Worldwide. They are the real Jews ruled by evil rulers, who are the extension arms of Satan Worldwide. Many will stand fast to their testimony of who I am and shall be killed. But some will take hold the false doctrine of Balaam and prophesy for personal gain, and embrace the Prosperity teaching that is untrue and lead many to compromise their doctrine against My ultimate truth. They shall join Mystery Babylon and worship the beast. Some will lord over My children and have them in bondage. Unless they repent, We will fight against them through The Angel of Our Presence, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, the sword of Our mouth; by sending judgment. However, to those who turn back and overcome the tribulation, I will give them the hidden manna (true oracle) of everlasting life and give them a white stone, the pearl of glory to be the gate of heavenly Jerusalem, the mount Zion. He that hath an ear, let him hear what the SPIRIT (THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih) of TRUTH (JESUS in David) saith unto the churches.

Rev 2:12 And to the angel of the church in Pergamos write; These things saith he which hath the sharp sword with two edges; Rev 2:13 I know thy works, and where thou dwellest, even where Satan's seat is: and thou holdest fast my name, and hast not denied my faith, even in those days wherein Antipas was my faithful martyr, who was slain among you, where Satan dwelleth. Rev 2:14 But I have a few things against thee, because thou hast there them that hold the doctrine of Balaam, who taught Balac to cast a stumblingblock before the children of Israel, to eat things sacrificed unto idols, and to commit fornication. Rev 2:15 So hast thou also them that hold the doctrine of the Nicolaitans, which thing I hate. Rev 2:16 Repent; or else I will come unto thee quickly, and will fight against them with the sword of my mouth. Rev 2:17 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches; To him that overcometh will I give to eat of the hidden manna, and will give him a white stone, and in the stone a new name written, which no man knoweth saving he that receiveth it.
To the Church in Thyatira (City Harvest Church in Singapore and similar kind Worldwide)

My FATHER has sworn by The Angel of His Presence, His right hand man who is the arm of His strength, that He will bring His children back to Mount Zion through The Angel of the Covenant, The SHE/HE THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, The Deliverer, The Elijah that is to come, who have Our reward and shall measure and qualify Our children whether they will receive a new name and be called the Heavenly Jerusalem.

Isa 62:1 For Zion's sake will I not hold my peace, and for Jerusalem's sake I will not rest, until the righteous one go forth as brightness, and the deliverer thereof as a lamp that burneth. Isa 62:2 And the Gentiles shall see thy righteous one, and all kings thy glory: and thou shalt be called by a new name, which the mouth of THE YAHWEH shall name. Isa 62:3 Thou shalt also be a crown of glory in the hand of THE YAHWEH, and a royal diadem in the hand of thy ELOHIM. Isa 62:4 Thou shalt no more be termed Forsaken; neither shall thy land any more be termed Desolate: but thou shalt be called Hephzibah, and thy land Beulah: for THE YAHWEH delighteth in thee, and thy land shall be married. Isa 62:5 For as a young man marrieth a virgin, so shall thy sons marry thee: and as the bridegroom rejoiceth over the bride, so shall thy ELOHIM rejoice over thee. Isa 62:6 I have set watchmen upon thy walls, O Jerusalem, which shall never hold their peace day nor night: ye that make mention of THE YAHWEH, keep not silence, Isa 62:7 And give him no rest, till he establish, and till he make Jerusalem a praise in the earth. Isa 62:8 THE YAHWEH hath sworn by his right hand, and by the arm of his strength, Surely I will no more give thy corn to be meat for thine enemies; and the sons of the stranger shall not drink thy wine, for the which thou hast laboured: Isa 62:9 But they that have gathered it shall eat it, and praise THE YAHWEH; and they that have brought it together shall drink it in the courts of my holiness. Isa 62:10 Go through, go through the gates; prepare ye the way of the people; cast up, cast up the highway; gather out the stones; lift up a standard for the people. Isa 62:11 Behold, THE YAHWEH hath proclaimed unto the end of the world, Say ye to the daughter of Zion, Behold, thy deliverer cometh; behold, his reward is with him, and his work before him. Isa 62:12 And they shall call them, The holy people, The redeemed of THE YAHWEH: and thou shalt be called, Sought out, A city not forsaken.

Isaiah 62:1-12 and Isaiah 40:3-11 are referring to THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, who represent THE TRINITY, the deliverer, whom We shall send from Heavenly Mount Zion. We will come through Our strong hand to rule on behalf of us: behold, Our reward is with both of you, and Our work before you. We in both of you, shall feed Our flock and lead them into the Heavenly Mount Zion.

Isa 40:3 The voice of him that crieth in the wilderness, Prepare ye the Way of THE YAHWEH make straight in the desert a highway for our ELOHIM. Isa 40:4 Every valley shall be exalted, and every mountain and hill shall be made low: and the crooked shall be made straight, and the rough places plain: Isa 40:5 And the glory of THE YAHWEH shall be revealed, and all flesh shall see it together: for the mouth of THE YAHWEH hath spoken it. Isa 40:6 The voice said, Cry. And he said, What shall I cry? All flesh is grass, and all the goodliness thereof is as the flower of the field: Isa 40:7 The grass withereth, the flower fadeth: because the spirit of THE YAHWEH bloweth upon it: surely the people is grass. Isa 40:8 The grass withereth, the flower fadeth: but the spokesman of our ELOHIM shall stand for ever. Isa 40:9 O Zion, that bringest good tidings, get thee up into the high mountain; O Jerusalem, that bringest good tidings, lift up thy voice with strength; lift it up, be not afraid; say unto the cities of Judah, Behold your ELOHIM! Isa 40:10 Behold, THE ADONAI YAHVIH will come with strong hand, and his arm shall rule for him: behold, his reward is with him, and his work before him. Isa 40:11 He shall feed his flock like a shepherd: he shall gather the lambs with his arm, and carry them in his bosom, and shall gently lead those that are with young.

The Angel who confessed to John that he was also a fellowservant and prophet and who confessed, "Behold, I come quickly; and My reward is with Me, to give every man according to his work", is Our strong Hand, The Elijah of Isaiah 40:10-11.

Rev 22:8 And I John saw these things, and heard them. And when I had heard and seen, I fell down to worship before the feet of the angel which shewed me these things. Rev 22:9 Then saith he unto me, See thou do it not: for I am thy fellowservant, and of thy brethren the prophets, and of them which keep the sayings of this book: worship THE ELOHIM. Rev 22:10 And he saith unto me, Seal not the sayings of the prophecy of this book: for the time is at hand. Rev 22:11 He that is unjust, let him be unjust still: and he which is filthy, let him be filthy still: and he that is righteous, let him be righteous still: and he that is holy, let him be holy still. Rev 22:12 And, behold, I come quickly; and my reward is with me, to give every man according as his work shall be.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, shall bring back the backsliding daughter of Heavenly Zion, My Bride from their spiritual captivity. They will gather around you, Our mighty one, The Elijah who will come to restore everyone who is called to be a Bride/Anointed, by renewing them in righteousness unto holiness so that they may dwell in the mountain of Our holiness, the Heavenly Mount Zion.

Jer 31:22 How long wilt thou go about, O thou backsliding daughter? for THE YAHWEH hath created renewal ((H2319 "chadash" renewal) in the earth, A woman shall compass a mighty one (H1397 "geber"). Jer 31:23 Thus saith THE YAHWEH of hosts, THE ELOHIM of Israel; As yet they shall use this speech in the land of Judah and in the cities thereof, when I shall bring again their captivity; THE YAHWEH bless thee, O habitation of righteousness, and mountain of holiness.
A Renewed Creation
David: LORD JESUS, how is The Elijah going to renew everyone who is your Bride?

JESUS: You as the teacher of righteousness, shall teach them how to cease from all works of the flesh of pride, ego and self-righteousness so that they can enter into Our rest through renewing themselves in holiness by walking in peace and joy through tribulations; meekness of love in persecutions; in lowliness of mind overcoming depression; so as to be loosed from the band of the yoke of the works of the flesh so that the light that was once in Adam shall break forth in them and their restoration shall spring forth speedily and their righteousness shall go before them.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, who represent Our glory and Our Names, shall gather them into the Holy Mount Zion and shall guide them continually and satisfy their soul with eternal life and give them authority to ride upon high places and they shall build the old world that was destroyed.

Isa 58:5 Is it such a fast that I have chosen? a day for a man to afflict his soul? is it to bow down his head as a bulrush, and to spread sackcloth and ashes under him? wilt thou call this a fast, and an acceptable day to THE YAHWEH? Isa 58:6 Is not this the fast that I have chosen? to loose the bands of wickedness, to undo the heavy burdens, and to let the oppressed go free, and that ye break every yoke? Isa 58:7 Is it not to deal thy bread to the hungry, and that thou bring the poor that are cast out to thy house? when thou seest the naked, that thou cover him; and that thou hide not thyself from thine own flesh? Isa 58:8 Then shall thy light break forth as the morning, and thine restoration (H724 "arukah") shall spring forth speedily: and thy righteousness shall go before thee; the glory of THE YAHWEH shall be thy gatherer (H622 "asaph"). Isa 58:9 Then shalt thou call, and THE YAHWEH shall answer; thou shalt cry, and he shall say, Here I am. If thou take away from the midst of thee the yoke, the putting forth of the finger, and speaking vanity; Isa 58:10 And if thou draw out thy soul to the hungry, and satisfy the afflicted soul; then shall thy light rise in obscurity, and thy darkness be as the noonday: Isa 58:11 And THE YAHWEH shall guide thee continually, and satisfy thy soul in drought, and make fat thy bones: and thou shalt be like a watered garden, and like a spring of water, whose waters fail not. Isa 58:12 And they that shall be of thee shall build the old waste places: thou shalt raise up the foundations of many generations; and thou shalt be called, The repairer of the breach, The restorer of paths to dwell in. Isa 58:13 If thou turn away thy foot from the sabbath, from doing thy pleasure on my holy day; and call the sabbath a delight, the holy of THE YAHWEH, honourable; and shalt honour him, not doing thine own ways, nor finding thine own pleasure, nor speaking thine own words: Isa 58:14 Then shalt thou delight thyself in THE YAHWEH; and I will cause thee to ride upon the high places of the earth, and feed thee with the heritage of Jacob thy father: for the mouth (spokesman) of THE YAHWEH hath spoken it.

These children of the bride chamber shall indeed fast to deprive the works of the flesh from manifesting through them. They shall practice restrain and self-control to cleanse their soul and body, which will lead to purer spirit man and sharpened spiritual vibration to the end to receive divine revelation from heaven.

This is the new wine of prophetic revelation of renewal that is supposed to be put on those who are renewed in the spirit. Those who prefer to remain in the old man whose mind is not renewed shall not be able to accept this renewal teaching from you, The Elijah, as they still prefer to continue in the old man who loves to glory in the flesh.

Luk 5:33 And they said unto him, Why do the disciples of John fast often, and make prayers, and likewise the disciples of the Pharisees; but thine eat and drink? Luk 5:34 And he said unto them, Can ye make the children of the bridechamber fast, while the bridegroom is with them? Luk 5:35 But the days will come, when the bridegroom shall be taken away from them, and then shall they fast in those days. Luk 5:36 And he spake also a parable unto them; No man putteth a piece of a new garment upon an old; if otherwise, then both the new maketh a rent, and the piece that was taken out of the new agreeth not with the old. Luk 5:37 And no man putteth new wine into old bottles; else the new wine will burst the bottles, and be spilled, and the bottles shall perish. Luk 5:38 But new wine must be put into new bottles; and both are preserved. Luk 5:39 No man also having drunk old wine straightway desireth new: for he saith, The old is better.
They shall put on a new man who is renewed in knowledge after Our image; full of mercy, kindness, lowliness of mind, meekness, longsuffering, forbearance, forgiveness, and are perfected in love.

Col 3:7 In the which ye also walked some time, when ye lived in them. Col 3:8 But now ye also put off all these; anger, wrath, malice, blasphemy, filthy communication out of your mouth. Col 3:9 Lie not one to another, seeing that ye have put off the old man with his deeds; Col 3:10 And have put on the new man, which is renewed in knowledge after the image of him that created him: Col 3:11 Where there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcision nor uncircumcision, Barbarian, Scythian, bond nor free: but CHRIST is all, and in all. Col 3:12 Put on therefore, as the elect of THE ELOHIM, holy and beloved, bowels of mercies, kindness, lowliness of mind, meekness, longsuffering; Col 3:13 Forbearing one another, and forgiving one another, if any man have a quarrel against any: even as CHRIST forgave you, so also do ye. Col 3:14 And above all these things put on love, which is the bond of perfectness.
They live no more in the flesh. They are in Christ and have become a renewed creature because The Elijah, Our Chief has come and renewed every one of them.

2 Co 5:14 For the love of CHRIST constraineth us; because we thus judge, that if one died for all, then were all dead: 2 Co 5:15 And that he died for all, that they which live should not henceforth live unto themselves, but unto him which died for them, and rose again. 2 Co 5:16 Wherefore henceforth know we no man after the flesh: yea, though we have known CHRIST after the flesh, yet now henceforth know we him no more. 2 Co 5:17 Therefore if any man be in Christ, he is a new creature: the chief have come; behold, everyone are renewed.

2 Corinthians 5:17 and Isaiah 42:9-10 refers to the same thing. As Our Chief, elect servant whom My FATHER delight, We shall uphold The SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, and put Our spirit upon both of you to bring forth judgment to the Gentiles and gave you for a Covenant of the people, for a light of the Gentiles; to open the blind eyes, to bring out the prisoners from the prison, and them that sit in darkness out of the prison house. THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, are the Name of THE YAHWEH who shall manifests Our Glory and renew My people in all nations who are called to be in Christ. My FATHER, THE YAHWEH, has long time holden His peace; He has been still, and refrained Himself: now will He cry like a travailing woman and bring forth you, the Manchild through THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih; He will destroy and devour at once and go forth as a mighty man through you like a man of war: We shall prevail against our enemies. We shall destroy and devour and make waste mountains and hills through earthquakes, and bring famine and drought like in the day of Elijah. We, THE YAHWEH through The SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, shall bring the blind by a way that they knew not and will lead them in paths that they have not known. We will make darkness light before them, and crooked things straight and will not forsake them. They all shall be taught by both of you to be deaf and blind, that they may really see and understand spiritual things like Shekinaih and you, whom My Father is well pleased. THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, shall be Our Lawgiver and be magnified.

Isa 42: 1 Behold my servant, whom I uphold; mine elect, in whom my soul delighteth; I have put my spirit upon him: he shall bring forth judgment to the Gentiles. Isa 42:2 He shall not cry, nor lift up, nor cause his voice to be heard in the street. Isa 42:3 A bruised reed shall he not break, and the smoking flax shall he not quench: he shall bring forth judgment unto truth. Isa 42:4 He shall not fail nor be discouraged, till he have set judgment in the earth: and the isles shall wait for his law. Isa 42:5 Thus saith EL THE YAHWEH, he that created the heavens, and stretched them out; he that spread forth the earth, and that which cometh out of it; he that giveth breath unto the people upon it, and spirit to them that walk therein: Isa 42:6 I THE YAHWEH have called thee in righteousness, and will hold thine hand, and will keep thee, and give thee for a covenant of the people, for a light of the Gentiles; Isa 42:7 To open the blind eyes, to bring out the prisoners from the prison, and them that sit in darkness out of the prison house. Isa 42:8 I am THE YAHWEH: that is my name: and my glory will I not give to another, neither my praise to graven images. Isa 42:9 Behold, the chief (H7223) have come and renewal (H2319 "chadash" means repair, renew, restore) do I declare: before they spring forth I tell you of them. Isa 42:10 Sing unto THE YAHWEH a new (renewal) song, and his praise from the end of the earth, ye that go down to the sea, and all that is therein; the isles, and the inhabitants thereof. Isa 42:11 Let the wilderness and the cities thereof lift up their voice, the villages that Kedar doth inhabit: let the inhabitants of the rock sing, let them shout from the top of the mountains. Isa 42:12 Let them give glory unto THE YAHWEH, and declare his praise in the islands. Isa 42:13 THE YAHWEH shall go forth as a mighty man, he shall stir up jealousy like a man of war: he shall cry, yea, roar; he shall prevail against his enemies. Isa 42:14 I have long time holden my peace; I have been still, and refrained myself: now will I cry like a travailing woman; I will destroy and devour at once. Isa 42:15 I will make waste mountains and hills, and dry up all their herbs; and I will make the rivers islands, and I will dry up the pools. Isa 42:16 And I will bring the blind by a way that they knew not; I will lead them in paths that they have not known: I will make darkness light before them, and crooked things straight. These things will I do unto them, and not forsake them. Isa 42:17 They shall be turned back, they shall be greatly ashamed, that trust in graven images, that say to the molten images, Ye are our gods. Isa 42:18 Hear, ye deaf; and look, ye blind, that ye may see. Isa 42:19 Who is blind, but my servant? or deaf, as my messenger that I sent? who is blind as he that is perfect, and blind as THE YAHWEH'S servant? Isa 42:20 Seeing many things, but thou observest not; opening the ears, but he heareth not. Isa 42:21 THE YAHWEH is well pleased for his righteous one's sake; he will magnify the lawgiver, and make him great. Isa 42:22 But this is a people robbed and spoiled; they are all of them snared in holes, and they are hid in prison houses: they are for a prey, and none delivereth; for a spoil, and none saith, Restore.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, shall restore those who are called to be kings and priests. They will celebrate their restoration by singing a renewal song. This renewal song commemorates their becoming the four living creatures as kings and priests who shall reign on the earth. These are the four-fold ministry of the Apostles, Prophets, Evangelists and Pastors/Teachers.

Rev 5:8 And when he had taken the book, the four beasts and four and twenty elders fell down before the Lamb, having every one of them harps, and golden vials full of odours, which are the prayers of saints. Rev 5:9 And they sung a new (renewal) song, saying, Thou art worthy to take the book, and to open the seals thereof: for thou wast slain, and hast redeemed us to THE ELOHIM by thy blood out of every kindred, and tongue, and people, and nation; Rev 5:10 And hast made us unto our ELOHIM kings and priests: and we shall reign on the earth.

These people have understood My renewal Covenant and have indeed partake of My suffering and death in the flesh, and have been renewed and counted worthy to sit on My right hand, and on My left, to drink with us in My FATHER'S Kingdom.

Mat 20:23 And he saith unto them, Ye shall drink indeed of my cup, and be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with: but to sit on my right hand, and on my left, is not mine to give, but it shall be given to them for whom it is prepared of my Father.

Mat 26:26 And as they were eating, JESUS took bread, and blessed it, and brake it, and gave it to the disciples, and said, Take, eat; this is my body. Mat 26:27 And he took the cup, and gave thanks, and gave it to them, saying, Drink ye all of it; Mat 26:28 For this is my blood of the new covenant, which is shed for many for the remission of sins. Mat 26:29 But I say unto you, I will not drink henceforth of this fruit of the vine, until that day when I drink it new with you in my Father's kingdom.

My 144,000 virgins/ Brides, who have kept themselves from being defiled by the woman Mystery Babylon are also renewed by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, and sealed with My FATHER'S Name on their foreheads, will also play their harps and sing this renewal song before Our throne, and before the four beasts, and the elders. These were redeemed from among men, being the first fruits unto us and in their mouth was found no guile: for they are without fault before Our throne.

Rev 14:1 And I looked, and, lo, a Lamb stood on the mount Sion, and with him an hundred forty and four thousand, having his Father's name written in their foreheads. Rev 14:2 And I heard a voice from heaven, as the voice of many waters, and as the voice of a great thunder: and I heard the voice of harpers harping with their harps: Rev 14:3 And they sung as it were a renewal song before the throne, and before the four beasts, and the elders: and no man could learn that song but the hundred and forty and four thousand, which were redeemed from the earth. Rev 14:4 These are they which were not defiled with women; for they are virgins. These are they which follow the Lamb whithersoever he goeth. These were redeemed from among men, being the firstfruits unto THE ELOHIM and to the Lamb. Rev 14:5 And in their mouth was found no guile: for they are without fault before the throne of THE ELOHIM.
Restoration

THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, The Elijah, shall truly come to restore everyone who are called to be My Bride.

Mat 17:9 And as they came down from the mountain, JESUS charged them, saying, Tell the vision to no man, until the Son of man be risen again from the dead. Mat 17:10 And his disciples asked him, saying, Why then say the scribes that Elias must first come? Mat 17:11 And JESUS answered and said unto them, Elias truly shall first come, and restore (G600 "apokathistemi" means "to restore to its former state") everyone.
The Kingdom of heaven will be restored to them when they become the Heavenly Jerusalem (Bride). You shall indeed come and restore them and empower them to be the witnesses of My resurrection.

Act 1:6 When they therefore were come together, they asked of him, saying, Lord, wilt thou at this time restore again the kingdom to Israel? Act 1:7 And he said unto them, It is not for you to know the times or the seasons, which the Father hath put in his own authority (G1849 "exousia"). Act 1:8 But ye shall receive power, after that the Holy Ghost is come upon you: and ye shall be witnesses unto me both in Jerusalem, and in all Judaea, and in Samaria, and unto the uttermost part of the earth.

The incident that happened in Mount Tabor where Peter, James and John saw Moses, Elijah and Me in glory was a type and shadow of the last days' manifestation of Our Glory. THE FATHER had prepared some vessels to be tabernacle for Me, Moses and Elijah to manifest His Glory in the last days. Peter, James and John were used to signify Me, Moses and Elijah respectively. This is the reason why Peter suggested to Me that they build three tabernacles to commemorate this event.

Mat 17:1 And after six days JESUS taketh Peter, James, and John his brother, and bringeth them up into an high mountain apart, Mat 17:2 And was transfigured before them: and his face did shine as the sun, and his raiment was white as the light. At 17:3 And, behold, there appeared unto them Moses and Elias talking with him. Mat 17:4 Then answered Peter, and said unto JESUS, Lord, it is good for us to be here: if thou wilt, let us make here three tabernacles; one for thee, and one for Moses, and one for Elias. Mat 17:5 While he yet spake, behold, a bright cloud overshadowed them: and behold a voice out of the cloud, which said, This is my beloved Son, in whom I am well pleased; hear ye him. Mat 17:6 And when the disciples heard it, they fell on their face, and were sore afraid. Mat 17:7 And JESUS came and touched them, and said, Arise, and be not afraid. Mat 17:8 And when they had lifted up their eyes, they saw no man, save JESUS only. Mat 17:9 And as they came down from the mountain, JESUS charged them, saying, Tell the vision to no man, until the Son of man be risen again from the dead. Mat 17:10 And his disciples asked him, saying, Why then say the scribes that Elias must first come? Mat 17:11 And JESUS answered and said unto them, Elias truly shall first come, and restore everyone. Mat 17:12 But I say unto you, That Elias is come already, and they knew him not, but have done unto him whatsoever they listed. Likewise shall also the Son of Adam suffer of them.

One tabernacle for Me is to signify the last days' Peter who has the Revelation that he, like Me, is a Son of Adam, a Christ, a son of THE LIVING ELOHIM and is most blessed because he has been given the grace to be an obedient son of THE HOLY SPIRIT. That is the meaning of Simon (meaning obedient), Barjona (son of Jonah/son of dove which signifies THE HOLY SPIRIT). I, JESUS shall build My last days' church through you; My Spiritual Peter; whom I have given you the keys of the Kingdom of Heaven and the authority over the Gates of Hades; to bind and loose whatever things you bind and loose on earth.

One tabernacle for Moses and one tabernacle for Elijah signify the last days' James and John, the Two Witnesses of Revelation Chapter 12. Moses signifies The Brides who are to be raptured and Elijah signifies the Anointed who are to be killed and resurrected. They are children of signs and wonders whom We, THE YAHWEH has given.

Mat 16:13 When JESUS came into the coasts of Caesarea Philippi, he asked his disciples, saying, Whom do men say that I the Son of Adam am? Mat 16:14 And they said, Some say that thou art John the Baptist: some, Elias; and others, Jeremias, or one of the prophets. Mat 16:15 He saith unto them, But whom say ye that I am? Mat 16:16 And Simon Peter answered and said, Thou art the CHRIST, the Son of the living ELOHIM. Mat 16:17 And JESUS answered and said unto him, Blessed art thou, Simon Barjona: for flesh and blood hath not revealed it unto thee, but my Father which is in heaven. Mat 16:18 And I say also unto thee, That thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church; and the gates of hades shall not prevail against it. Mat 16:19 And I will give unto thee the keys of the Kingdom of Heaven: and whatsoever thou shalt bind on earth shall be bound in heaven: and whatsoever thou shalt loose on earth shall be loosed in heaven.
Isa 8:18 Behold, I and the children whom THE YAHWEH hath given me are for signs and for wonders in Israel from THE YAHWEH SABAOTH, which dwelleth in mount Zion.

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, will be sent and given authority to restore the Kingdom to the last days' James and John (Spiritual Israel, those who are to be princes with THE EL). This will happen after they are empowered by both of you to be witnesses of My Resurrection. They will be killed and then resurrected by the Spirit of Life and will be caught up to heaven to be among the cloud of witnesses that will judge the beast and the false prophet and their armies in the last days.

Act 1:1 The former treatise have I made, O Theophilus, of all that JESUS began both to do and teach, Act 1:2 Until the day in which he was taken up, after that he through the Holy Ghost had given commandments unto the apostles whom he had chosen: Act 1:3 To whom also he shewed himself alive after his passion by many infallible proofs, being seen of them forty days, and speaking of the things pertaining to the kingdom of THE ELOHIM: Act 1:4 And, being assembled together with them, commanded them that they should not depart from Jerusalem, but wait for the message (G1860 "epaggelia") of the Father, which, saith he, ye have heard of me. Act 1:5 For John truly baptized with water; but ye shall be baptized with the Holy Ghost not many days hence. Act 1:6 When they therefore were come together, they asked of him, saying, THE YAHWEH, wilt thou at this time restore (G600 "apokathistemi") again the kingdom to Israel? David, would you like to share with Shekinaih all the visions I gave you through others showing you as a whale?
Vision of a Whale

David: Many years ago, someone prayed for me and saw me in a vision superimposed on a whale. My whole body and face were superimposed on the whole body and head of the whale - it looked as if I was that whale. Many years later, an associate of mine dreamed of me as a whale being washed ashore, struggling to get back to the sea. THE HOLY SPIRIT convicted him to be a co-worker and to stand by me in the same ministry. On another occasion, a brother in Christ saw me as a whale in a small pond and was restricted to swim. He told me that THE HOLY SPIRIT had impressed him to open ministry door for me. THE HOLY SPIRIT revealed to me that I am called to be a prophet to the nations but is restricted in a small ministry until the day of My showing to Spiritual Israel to guide them into the way of peace.

Luk 1:76 And thou, child, shalt be called the prophet of the Highest: for thou shalt go before the face of THE YAHWEH to prepare his ways; Luk 1:77 To give knowledge of salvation unto his people by the remission of their sins, Luk 1:78 Through the tender mercy of our ELOHIM; whereby the dayspring from on high hath visited us, Luk 1:79 To give light to them that sit in darkness and in the shadow of death, to guide our feet into the way of peace. JESUS: Verily, verily, I say unto you, My FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and Me in you, The Elijah, is (are) the dayspring, the sun of righteousness that shall give light to them that sit in darkness and to guide My potential Brides and Anointed Ones into My way of peace to ascend My Heavenly Mount Zion.
David, would you like to share with Shekinaih your revelation of what a fish symbolizes?

David: According to my research, Ichthys (also Ichthus) is from the Koine Greek word for fish. It is a symbol consisting of two intersecting arcs with the ends of the right sides extending beyond the meeting point so as to resemble the profile of a fish.
Ichthus is an acronym/acrostic which translates into English as "JESUS CHRIST, Son of ELOHIM, Saviour".
Iota (i) is the first letter of Iēsous (Ἰησοῦς), Greek for "JESUS".
Chi (ch) is the first letter of Christos (Χριστός), Greek for "anointed".
Theta (th) is the first letter of Theou (Θεου), Greek for "God's", the genitive case of Θεóς, Theos, Greek for "God".
Upsilon (y) is the first letter of huios (Υἱός), Greek for "Son".
Sigma (s) is the first letter of sōtēr (Σωτήρ), Greek for "Savior".

The word "JESUS" in Greek is the same as the word "Joshua" in Hebrew. It is from H3091 "Yehoshua" which is from H3068 "Jehovah" pronounced as "THE YAHWEH" and H3467 "yasha" which means "to deliver, to save". Thus, the meaning of JESUS/Joshua is "THE YAHWEH'S Deliverer."
Therefore, the fish "Ichthus" is referring to those who are THE YAHWEH'S Deliverers, Anointed Ones, and the sons of THE ELOHIM.

JESUS: Yes, Joshua or JESUS meaning "THE YAHWEH'S Deliverer" is a prophetic Name referring to those who are ordained to be High Priests/Kings in the Order of Melchizedek. They will be plucked out of Satan's resistance by you, The Angel of THE YAHWEH in THE HOLY SPIRIT, acting as an Advocate for these Anointed Ones. After they are purified and exalted in holiness, they will be given authority to judge My house if they walk in Our ways and obey Our order through both of you. There will be many who will be like Me as mini JESUS/Joshua: they will be men to be wondered. They are called "the Branch". We, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, shall through THE SHE/HE THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, seal them with the Seven Spirits of THE YAHWEH.

When I asked Peter: "of whom do the kings of the earth take custom or tribute? of their own children, or of strangers?" in which he replied, "Of strangers", I was affirming them that they were indeed the sons of THE ELOHIM, sons of the King of kings, and that they are future kings of the earth. Thus, they need not have to pay the custom or tribute according to the law.
