David: This "Ichthus" fish sign was used by the early Christians as a secret Christian symbol to identify among themselves that they were the Sons of Adam/Sons of THE ELOHIM. According to traditions, the disciples who were initiated into this mystery during the persecution by the Roman Empire in the first few centuries used this fish symbol to mark meeting places and tombs to distinguish those who were Christs from those who were not. According to one story, when a disciple met a stranger on the road, he would draw one arc of the simple fish outline in the dirt. If the stranger drew the other arc, both disciples would know that they were sons of THE ELOHIM.

ACT 2 SCENE 2 
In private houses worldwide
Timeline/Frame: Daily Event
Lo! And Behold! The sky is covered with dark clouds with occasions of sudden lightnings, that struck across the gloomy dark sky, and rain begin to drizzle followed by a sudden heavy outpour.

It is the wee hour of the morning whereby schoolchildren are walking to their nearby school, men and women carrying umbrellas walking hurriedly to work. The traffic that morning was very heavy due to the heavy downpour.

All of a sudden, there was a loud bang. An accident had just occurred. A car has suddenly hit a primary school boy who was hurriedly crossing the road with her mother following close behind him, as he was late for school. The child in white short sleeve shirt and light blue pants and tie lay motionless on the road was bleeding from his head. His mother in great panic rushes and stoop next to the child crying bitterly while shouting for help.

The driver quickly came out of his car and carried the child and put him at the back seat of his car, and together with the child's mother, he drove and manage to exit from the heavy traffic to a nearby hospital.
Upon arriving, the hospital staff quickly pushed out an emergency trolley bed and transferred the boy to the A & E ward to be examined.
Meanwhile, the mother was walking up and down outside the emergency ward anxiously waiting for news from the doctor concerning her son's condition.
The boy was unconscious lying on the A & E bed while the doctor and nurses were trying to rescue him.
Suddenly, the boy began to see his own spirit coming out of his body and the spirit began to float up and travel downward with great speed.

The atmosphere was very dark and he began to fall at great lightning speed to level four. At the entrance of the Great White Throne, two horned demons holding a trident began to drag him to kneel in front of the Great White Throne. The boy then lifted up his head looking fearfully at the glorious light that proceeded out of that Throne and was trembling.
Suddenly, a loud thunderous voice proceeded out of the Throne saying, "If you are given a second chance to live, will you obey Me unto death and fulfil My will for your life just like My son, JESUS?"
The boy shivering and trembling with great fear, kept nodding his head as he answered, "Yes, I will".

At this moment, the boy began to open his eyes, awakened from his hospital bed in awe of what he had just seen, and heard. He started to relate his encounter to his mother who was holding his hands with her head nodding in agreement, saying, "I believe my son".

THE TRINITY then appeared standing in front of the boy's bed facing him and speaking in unison voice to him, "Remember what you have just promised us with this second life We have given back to you or else there will be no more second chance." They then vanished.
The boy was in shock with his mouth wide open, his eyes staring ahead, nodded his head repeatedly and said, "I will remember".
David then asked, "ABBA FATHER, what Shekinaih has just seen, sounded familiar. My inner witness tells me that the boy is me."
ABBA FATHER said to him, "That's right, David, it is indeed you. You must descend first before you can ascend".

"ABBA FATHER can you enlighten me what you meant? David asked THE FATHER. THE TRINITY then spoke in unison, "You need to have an encounter in the darkest moment of your life for you to treasure this fragile life of yours which We have given you in order for you to take us seriously and to grow up to the full stature of a Christ and a mature and perfect man in Our eyes. Do you get it now, David?"

Peace And Joy Through Tribulation
Meekness Of Love Through Persecution
Lowliness Of Mind Through Oppression
Yieldedness
Faith in THE ELOHIM
1) Peace and Joy through Tribulation
JESUS: The five levels are fruits unto holiness, and the end is everlasting life in Heavenly Mount Zion.
Rom 6:22 But now being made free from sin, and become servants to THE ELOHIM, ye have your fruit unto holiness, and the end everlasting life.

They are part of the fruits of the Spirit. My Brides must crucify the flesh with the affections and lusts if they are to be accepted by My FATHER to be part of Heavenly Jerusalem in Heavenly Mount Zion to be His children.

2 Co 6:16 And what agreement hath the temple of THE ELOHIM with idols? For ye are the temple of the living ELOHIM; as THE ELOHIM hath said, I will dwell in them, and walk in them; and I will be their ELOHIM, and they shall be my people. 2 Co 6:17 Wherefore come out from among them, and be ye separate, saith THE YAHWEH, and touch not the unclean thing; and I will receive you, 2 Co 6:18 And will be a Father unto you, and ye shall be my sons and daughters, saith THE SHADDAI EL.

Therefore, My FATHER will orchestrate many tribulations for them to crucify their flesh by resisting and subduing the evil spirits that energize them on a daily basis to work all works of adultery, fornication (illicit sexual intercourse like homosexuality, lesbianism, bestiality or extramarital sex), uncleanness (involving the impurity of the heart, mind and body), lasciviousness (unbridled and excess lust), idolatry (loving people and things more than THE YAHWEH), witchcraft (the use of drugs which are influenced by evil spirits that control and deceive their minds), hatred (influenced by hostile spirit), variance (quarrelling), emulation (jealousy), wrath (fierceness), strife (evil plots), seditions (disunity), heresies (denominations, sectarian), envying, murder, drunkenness, reveling (rioting).

If they humble themselves to submit to the discipline of THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih when she exposes the evil spirits that sneaked into their hearts, they will produce the fruits of the Spirit (love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith, meekness and temperance) through her impartation of maturing enablement.

Gal 5:18 But if ye be led of the Spirit, ye are not under the law. Gal 5:19 Now the works of the flesh are manifest, which are these; Adultery, fornication, uncleanness, lasciviousness, Gal 5:20 Idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, strife, seditions, heresies, Gal 5:21 Envyings, murders, drunkenness, revellings, and such like: of the which I tell you before, as I have also told you in time past, that they which do such things shall not inherit the kingdom of THE ELOHIM. Gal 5:22 But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith, Gal 5:23 Meekness, temperance: against such there is no law. Gal 5:24 And they that are Christ have crucified the flesh with the affections and lusts.
Having peace in My FATHER despite His chastisement is accounted as righteousness by us as Righteousness and Peace are inseparable.
Psa 85:10 Mercy and truth are met together; righteousness and peace have kissed each other.

David, would you like to share a dream We gave you concerning this revelation?
A Dream on How to Be At Peace and Joyful In Tribulations

David: As I was writing the Chapter on Peace and Joy in Tribulation, I was going through many testings of tribulation and chastening of THE FATHER. In one of the nights, I had a prophetic dream. In my dream, one of my disciples had decided to leave me and defected to a lawless minister because of an idol in his heart. Upon hearing the news, I lost my peace and joy. My third sister who was not a believer was present at that time and out of self-righteousness, she was very disgusted with him and was volunteering to send him off quickly. I was comforted and felt vindicated by her. Despite my grief, I decided to send him off myself. All this seemed to happen in our rented one-room-one-hall government subsidized flat where my parents and my nine siblings were staying 52 years ago when I was 6 years old. My parents were struggling to raise us up in that pathetic place where we had to sleep on the floor in the hall piling up like sardines in a can. As I walked this disciple along the field behind my flat, a young Chinese man whom I could not recall where I knew him, approached me. At that time, he was playing basketball with his friends. He told me that he had lost his phone, which had my contact number. The impression he gave me was that he highly esteemed me as someone he would like to learn from and follow regarding the Way of THE YAHWEH. In the midst of our exchange, somehow after speaking with one of his friends, he left with his companions without saying farewell and I was left alone and felt rejected. As I turned around, my disciple was also nowhere to be seen. Feeling lonely and forsaken, as I looked around by myself, I noticed that the field I was standing on was filled with people who were busy with their own activities. They were in groups: some were doing exercises; others were playing games etc. At one corner, I noticed a Christian ministry whom I knew and they were having fellowship but they were dressed up in religious robes and were walking and worshipping as in a religious procession. Suddenly, I felt very lonely and lost again and there arose in my heart a desire to visit one of my intercessors whom I had not contacted since the prayer group was dissolved. Then, I woke up from this dream and realized that in reality, I was not that lonely after all, for my wife, my children, Shekinaih and my disciples were still with me, trusting that Jesus is using me to represent him.

As I meditate on the dream, THE HOLY SPIRIT said to me, "THE FATHER has purposed for you to go through tribulations, rejections and betrayals in order to teach you a spiritual lesson that your peace and joy must not rest on the acceptance of men and you should not be so easily comforted through the vindication of others in a pathetic mentality. Neither should you long for honour from men you hardly knew, nor should you fret and be distracted by other groups who prosper according to their own devices and are busy in their religious activities after the commandments and doctrines of men which indeed seems to make a show of holiness but are without power, playing Christianity carnally in their religious hypocrisy. THE FATHER will not forsake you as He has given Shekinaih to represent Him to help you fulfill your destiny as a Christ, an anointed one."

Col 2:16 Let no man therefore judge you in meat, or in drink, or in respect of an holyday, or of the new moon, or of the sabbath days: Col 2:17 Which are a shadow of things to come; but the body is a Christ.
Shekinaih: David, THE FATHER asks me to instruct you to speak out aloud these words 100 times and meditate upon it while you speak.

These are the words: "Sincere repentance will lead to the greatest bond of love in THE TRINITY that is unbreakable for us. Love relinquished to THE FATHER will lead to unlimited love returned back to me".
(David believe and did as he was told and after which, JESUS said to him.)

JESUS: David, you must not be bitter with Shekinaih because of the discipline of My FATHER through her. Humble yourself with true repentance and ask for more grace to be filled with My love for her for the sake of unity of THE TRINITY so that Our works through both of you are not hindered. As the Father hath loved Me, so have I loved you: continue you in My love. Love one another and you shall abide in My love. Surrender all your love to My FATHER by loving His children even willing to lay down your life for them and in return, My FATHER and I will love you and fill you with Our unlimited love and We will make Our abode with you and call you friend. These things have I spoken unto you, that My joy might remain in you, and that your joy might be full and whatsoever ye shall ask of the Father in My Name, He may give it you.

THE FATHER: My chastening is for your perfection in holiness so that you may enter into Heavenly Mount Zion to see Me. So, do not be discouraged and give up easily but pursue peace in all situations unto holiness and be not defiled by bitterness, sorrow or grief.

2) Meekness of Love through Persecution
David: ABBA FATHER, what does meekness of love through persecution means?

JESUS: In order to reach the top of the Holy Mountain, meekness or gentleness is another requirement that will make one great in holiness so as to reach the Holy Mountain to inherit the Kingdom of Heaven.
Psa 18:35 Thou hast also given me the shield of thy salvation: and thy right hand hath holden me up, and thy gentleness (meekness) hath made me great.
I take delight in the meek and will beautify them with the robe of salvation as My heavenly Bride.
Psa 149:4 For THE YAHWEH taketh pleasure in his people: he will beautify the meek with salvation.
I give grace to the meek so that they can inherit My glory and the earth.
Pro 3:34 Surely he scorneth the scorners: but he giveth grace unto the meek. Pro 3:35 The wise shall inherit glory: but shame shall be the promotion of fools.
Mat 5:5 Blessed are the meek (G4239 praus): for they shall inherit the earth.
Those who follow Me to be meek and lowly in heart shall enter into Our rest in Heavenly Mount Zion.

Mat 11:28 Come unto me, all ye that labour and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest. Mat 11:29 Take my yoke upon you, and learn of me; for I am meek and lowly in heart: and ye shall find rest unto your souls. Mat 11:30 For my yoke is easy, and my burden is light.

When a person is so broken and crushed by My FATHER through persecution, the meekness of a Christ/and anointed will be evident in him. His spirit will release a sweet smell like the fragrant of perfume that is obtained from crushed myrrh when mixed with olive oil. Myrrh symbolizes suffering and oil symbolizes the anointing. This fruit of meekness, like other fruit of the spirit, needs to be maintained when yielded. We have appointed at least 15 years to break and crush you in order to accomplish this state of spirit man on its sustainable basis. Pruning is painful but it is necessary if you are to produce more fruits of the Spirit. Each time when My FATHER withdraw His grace from you, hell will break loose. According to what fruit He wants you to bear, He will show you the worst in you concerning that fruit you lack. Sometimes, you will fall into condemnation by the Accuser and feel very discouraged and will nearly give up but abiding in My FATHER'S love will keep you going.

David, would you like to share with Shekinaih how it is like to be meek?

David: When I am broken, I would speak in a soft, feeble and humble tone; but when I have recovered from this brokenness and be not vigilant, the spirit of pride would sneak back into me and my speech would become arrogant and harsh. Maybe I need further breaking until it becomes sustainable where I will remain gentle and meek, loving my persecutors. To be crushed by THE FATHER is not easy. It is very hard to go through and at times, I will break down and cry like a baby. Have you ever seen an adult man who cries like a baby during the breaking? This is what THE FATHER has planned for every one of us.
Are the Consolation of THE EL, Small With Thee?

There was a period where I was going through many persecutions from the leader of a church who was jealous of me because he said I was hyper spiritual, and over self-righteous. I was really hungry for righteousness of THE ELOHIM not knowing that I was asking to be tested and sifted by Satan through the fiery trial of faith. I was persecuted by the leader and the members that believed in his evil speaking, when he spoke against me falsely.

Many years ago, I followed this leader with his team to Osaka for ministry. During prayer, I came out for altar call and kneeled before the altar to be ministered by him. During ministry time, he prayed for everyone who responded to his altar call except me. At the end of the meeting, I was the only one left still kneeling and waiting to be ministered by him. He just passed by me and made a sarcastic statement in derision that really broke my heart. I was crushed in my spirit but I continued to encourage myself in THE YAHWEH. When everyone was about to leave the meeting hall, I stood up and hugged him with all the love I still had within me. As I hugged him, I saw a vision of him smiling maliciously at me. Back in my hotel room, I was crying to THE FATHER to heal me of my wound for it was unbearable because reproach had broken my heart. For more than an hour, I was crying with all my heart, mind and strength but I received no comfort. Feeling like a dying man who gave up his will to live, I breathed my last breath lying on the floor as one who had lost all hopes to live. I was so exhausted that I fell asleep immediately.

Out of a sudden, I was awakened by a great noise of many trumpets accompanied by music from different musical instruments that were not of this world. Next, I heard voices of tongues that sounded like great waves of rolling waters coming down from heaven. In that split of a second, I could sense that many angels had come down and they were sprinkling gold dusts all over my body as I could feel the tingling feeling in my spirit and body. My soul was revived and instinctively, I opened my physical eyes hoping to see THE YAHWEH JESUS but ended up seeing myself alone in my room in the dead of the night. All that I was experiencing a moment before seemed to be like a dream. Instantly, I heard a thin and quiet voice instructing me to close my physical eyes telling me that I could not hear and see the spiritual things with my fleshly eyes. I immediately closed my eyes and I was in the spirit again hearing the voices of tongues sounding like great waves of rolling water from heaven. Then, I heard a woman speaking these words in a gentle, soft and motherly voice:
"Your FATHER loves you very much!"

I was comforted instantly. This timely gentle speech really delighted my soul. Immediately, my spirit was transported into a womb. This was the most memorable moment of my life for I felt like an unborn baby floating inside the bag of waters in the womb of his mother. I felt so refreshed, so secured, so clean and so pure. At that moment, I had forgotten all the stains in my tattered soul. The peace that I had at that moment was beyond description. I have found my rest. I have found solace in this womb and if it was not for the disruption of some noises outside my room, I would not have been awakened but will be lost in this eternity.
From this incident, I was encouraged and I continued to seek THE YAHWEH and seek comfort from the scriptures regarding my experience. I was edified when I read Isaiah 28:11.

Isa 28:11 For with stammering lips and another tongue will he speak to this people. Isa 28:12 For whom he said, This is the rest wherewith ye may cause the weary to rest; and this is the refreshing: yet they would not hear.

I could relate to the stammering lips and another tongue that I have heard during the visitation of the heavenly being. I knew she was THE HOLY SPIRIT. I was in Her womb. The protocol of Her throne and the seraphim and cherubim that made up Her train was manifested to me for I felt their presence as they sprinkled gold dusts over me. I knew they were sanctifying my spirit prophetically.

JESUS: David, the womb that you were transported into is the womb of THE FATHER, symbolizing THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih, who is a Shekinah to manifest Our Name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH" and "THE ADONAI" prominently. You are the Man-Child in the womb of the woman/THE HOLY SPIRIT of Revelation 12:5, and shall become a Male Metatron when We lift you up to My FATHER in heaven to authorize you to rule all nations with a rod of iron.

You are the voice of THE HOLY SPIRIT/ADONAI represented by Shekinaih in Isaiah 6:8 doing all Our determination through Shekinaih. In the last days, the Isaiahs (H3470 "deliverer of YAH") who are the deliverers from Zion will be sanctified from their uncleanness by THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, and shall be sent to warn the ungodly generation of the coming woes. The remnant that came out of the Great Tribulation shall be holy unto us, THE YAHWEH.

This is the same music you heard in your heavenly experience.

Through this heavenly visitation, I have given the revelation of THE FATHER of all mercy and consolation.

I started to understand that whatever things written in the scriptures are for our learning that we, through longsuffering and comfort of the scriptures might have hope in our calling.
Rom 15:4 For whatsoever things were written aforetime were written for our learning, that we through longsuffering and comfort of the scriptures might have hope.

I also started to feel empathy for Paul (of the Book of Acts) concerning the tribulations and the persecutions he had gone through because of the name of a Christ. Like him, I could relate what it was like to be pressed out of measure, above strength, inasmuch as despaired even of life. All this happened to me so that after tasting the goodness and the consolation of THE FATHER, I am able in turn to comfort others who are destined to go through these troubles and persecutions.

2 Co 1:3 Blessed be THE ELOHIM, even the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of mercies, and THE ELOHIM of all comfort; 2 Co 1:4 Who comforteth us in all our tribulation, that we may be able to comfort them which are in any trouble, by the comfort wherewith we ourselves are comforted of THE ELOHIM. 2 Co 1:5 For as the sufferings of a Christ abound in us, so our consolation also aboundeth by Christ. 2 Co 1:6 And whether we be afflicted, it is for your consolation and salvation, which is effectual in the enduring of the same sufferings which we also suffer: or whether we be comforted, it is for your consolation and salvation. 2 Co 1:7 And our hope of you is stedfast, knowing, that as ye are partakers of the sufferings, so shall ye be also of the consolation. 2 Co 1:8 For we would not, brethren, have you ignorant of our trouble which came to us in Asia, that we were pressed out of measure, above strength, insomuch that we despaired even of life: 2 Co 1:9 But we had the sentence of death in ourselves, that we should not trust in ourselves, but in THE ELOHIM which raiseth the dead: 2 Co 1:10 Who delivered us from so great a death, and doth deliver: in whom we trust that he will yet deliver us;

At last, I started to understand that all the debasement that had happened to me in the past was THE FATHER'S doing and it was for my perfection in meekness unto holiness. I must be like Jesus to lay aside every weight that will cause me to miss the mark and run with patience the race that is set before me, always encouraging and reminding myself not to despise the discipline of THE FATHER. For whom He loves, He chastens and scourges every son He receives and loves so that we can partake of His holiness through bearing the Fruit of the Spirit.

Heb 12:1 Wherefore seeing we also are compassed about with so great a cloud of witnesses, let us lay aside every weight, and the sin which doth so easily beset us, and let us run with patience the race that is set before us, Heb 12:2 Looking unto Jesus the author and finisher of our faith; who for the joy that was set before him endured the cross, despising the shame, and is set down at the right hand of the throne of THE ELOHIM. Heb 12:3 For consider him that endured such contradiction of sinners against himself, lest ye be wearied and faint in your minds. Heb 12:4 Ye have not yet resisted unto blood, striving against sin. Heb 12:5 And ye have forgotten the exhortation which speaketh unto you as unto children, My son, despise not thou the chastening of the Lord, nor faint when thou art rebuked of him: Heb 12:6 For whom the Lord loveth he chasteneth, and scourgeth every son whom he receiveth. Heb 12:7 If ye endure chastening, THE ELOHIM dealeth with you as with sons; for what son is he whom the father chasteneth not? Heb 12:8 But if ye be without chastisement, whereof all are partakers, then are ye bastards, and not sons. Heb 12:9 Furthermore we have had fathers of our flesh which corrected us, and we gave them reverence: shall we not much rather be in subjection unto the Father of spirits, and live? Heb 12:10 For they verily for a few days chastened us after their own pleasure; but he for our profit, that we might be partakers of his holiness. Heb 12:11 Now no chastening for the present seemeth to be joyous, but grievous: nevertheless afterward it yieldeth the peaceable fruit of righteousness unto them which are exercised thereby.
JESUS: You have learned well. Always be vigilant and not fall into discouragement and defiled with bitterness and thus turn aside from Our Way of Holiness and be disqualified from your birthright.

Heb 12:12 Therefore lift up the hands which hang down, and the feeble knees; Heb 12:13 And make straight paths for your feet, lest that which is lame be turned out of the way; but let it rather be healed. Heb 12:14 Follow peace with all men, and holiness, without which no man shall see THE YAHWEH: Heb 12:15 Looking diligently lest any man fail of the grace of THE ELOHIM; lest any root of bitterness springing up trouble you, and thereby many be defiled; Heb 12:16 Lest there be any fornicator, or profane person, as Esau, who for one morsel of meat sold his birthright. Heb 12:17 For ye know how that afterward, when he would have inherited the blessing, he was rejected: for he found no place of repentance, though he sought it carefully with tears. You have heard the voice of many waters which is the voice of the great multitude of holy ones in the general assembly and the church of the first born who are with innumerable company of angels in Heavenly Jerusalem.

Rev 19:5 And a voice came out of the throne, saying, Praise our ELOHM, all ye his servants, and ye that fear him, both small and great. Rev 19:6 And I heard as it were the voice of a great multitude, and as the voice of many waters, and as the voice of mighty thunderings, saying, Alleluia: for THE YAHWEH EL SHADDAI reigneth. Rev 19:7 Let us be glad and rejoice, and give honour to him: for the marriage of the Lamb is come, and his wife hath made herself ready. Rev 19:9 And he saith unto me, Write, Blessed are they which are called unto the marriage supper of the Lamb. And he saith unto me, These are the true sayings of THE ELOHIM
The Spirit of Meekness is synonymous to the Kingdom of THE ELOHIM with power.
1Co 4:20 For the kingdom of is not in word, but in power. 1Co 4:21 What will ye? shall I come unto you with a rod, or in love, and in the spirit of meekness?
The Spirit of Meekness and Gentleness is also synonymous to being a Christ, an Anointed One.
2 Co 10:1 Now I Paul I beseech you by the meekness and gentleness of a Christ, who in presence am base among you, but being absent am bold toward you:

You have a lot of opportunities to produce and maintain this Fruit of the Spirit. THE FATHER will give you a lot of situations where you have to respond to people in meekness, to cover their fault even though they are incorrigible or unresponsive or unmoved by your goodness. This is a part of your training to meet all kinds of unreasonable people. Therefore, take this opportunity to produce meekness of love because it is a requirement to go up the Holy Mountain. Take it as a test whether your persecutors are your parents, wife, husband, your children, relatives, friends or whosoever. Take all these opportunities as stepping-stones to produce the Meekness of Love so as to receive the Kingdom of THE ELOHIM.
Gal 6:1 Brethren, if a man be overtaken in a fault, ye which are spiritual, restore such a one in the spirit of meekness; considering thyself, lest thou also be tempted.
Meekness is a requirement in your vocation and as an elect of THE ELOHIM to be My Bride or the Anointed One.

Eph 4:1 I therefore, the prisoner of THE YAHWEH, beseech you to walk worthy of the vocation wherewith ye are called, Eph 4:2 With all lowliness and meekness, with longsuffering, forbearing one another in love;
Col 3:12 Put on therefore, as the elect of THE ELOHIM, holy and beloved, bowels of mercies, kindness, humbleness of mind, meekness, longsuffering;
Finally, a meek and peaceable spirit is very precious in the sight of My FATHER and you will definitely be His delight in Our Heavenly Mount Zion.
1Pe 3:4 But let it be the hidden man of the heart, in that which is not corruptible, even the ornament of a meek and quiet spirit, which is in the sight of THE ELOHIM of great price.
3) Lowliness of Mind
Vision of a Hind
JESUS: Would you like to share with Shekinaih the vision I gave you regarding the hind that visited Me?

David: In my early years seeking THE YAHWEH, persecutions and debasement is a daily training for me to be lowly. Every night I would mourn, sing and meditate on the Book of Psalms and crying out to be comforted. One day, a seer friend of mine while praying for me, saw a vision of me superimposed on a hind walking towards a tent during a still night. As the female deer reached the opening of the tent, Jesus immediately opened the curtain of the tent's entrance and looked into her eyes with loving tenderness. At that moment, the hind stood motionless being completely intoxicated by the divine love and compassion that flowed from Jesus's eyes. She then went into the tent and Jesus closed the curtain.
JESUS: Do you know the interpretation of this vision?
David: Lord, I am not very sure, but I was comforted because of that vision because I felt loved by you. Would you further enlighten us the meaning?

JESUS: My beloved must abide in Me, and We in them, that We may be completely one in the bridal chamber(tent). As I am in THE FATHER, and you in Me, thereby, shall be one with us, and thereby are united with us as one. Therefore, are greatly loved by us.

Pro 5:18 Let thy fountain be blessed: and rejoice with the wife of thy youth. Pro 5:19 Let her be as the loving hind (H365 "ayeleth") and pleasant roe; let her breasts (H1717 "dad" as the seat of love, same as H1730 dod" to boil with love) satisfy (H7301 "ravah" saturated, intoxicated) thee at all times; and be thou ravished always with her love.
Now let Me decode in details the Revelation of Psalms 22 to you.

Psalms 22 is written to you my last days' David, the chief singer, concerning My Brides symbolized by the hind, Aijeleth and I am the Shahar, the daystar, their husband. You are the overseer and leader of all the other hinds that will follow My footsteps in My suffering. They are likened to the scarlet-worm Cermes vermilio, a scaled insect that feeds upon the oak and is used for producing red dye. The males, which are smaller than the females, pass through a complete metamorphosis and develop wings. Like Me, they will suffer reproach from men and will be despised and killed but resurrected and become fiery red phoenixes. I was the first begotten of the dead to be resurrected and they, like Me, were from the womb of THE HOLY SPIRIT. In the last days, they will suffer persecutions from the sons of the Nephilim, the rulers of this age. They are called "Yachiyd", those who are joined with Me in spirit. They are the children whom THE FATHER has given you to be perfected. They are My brethren. They shall be depressed in mind to be lowly in order to ascend further to the Holy Mountain to be among the great congregation in Mount Zion. These are the last days' generation who will rule with Me over the nations in the coming age because as they have suffered with Me, they will also reign with Me; as they have died with Me, they will also resurrect with Me.

Psa 22:1 To the chief Musician (H5329 "natsach" overseer as denominative of H5331 "netsach" victory) concerning (H5921 "al") Aijeleth (H365 "ayeleth" hind) Shahar, (H7837 "shachar" dawn, dayspring) A Psalm of David. My EL, My EL, why hast thou forsaken me? why art thou so far from helping me, and from the words of my roaring? Psa 22:2 O my ELOHIM, I cry in the daytime, but thou hearest not; and in the night season, and am not silent. Psa 22:3 But thou art holy, O thou that inhabitest the praises of Israel. Psa 22:4 Our fathers trusted in thee: they trusted, and thou didst deliver them. Psa 22:5 They cried unto thee, and were delivered: they trusted in thee, and were not confounded. Psa 22:6 But I am a worm (H8438 "tola" crimson grub), and no man; a reproach of men, and despised of the people. Psa 22:7 All they that see me laugh me to scorn: they shoot out the lip, they shake the head, saying, Psa 22:8 He trusted on THE YAHWEH that he would deliver him: let him deliver him, seeing he delighted in him. Psa 22:9 But thou art he that took me out of the womb: thou didst make me hope when I was upon my mother's breasts. Psa 22:10 I was cast upon thee from the womb: thou art my EL from my mother's belly. Psa 22:11 Be not far from me; for trouble is near; for there is none to help. Psa 22:12 Many bulls have compassed me: strong bulls of Bashan have beset me round. Psa 22:13 They gaped upon me with their mouths, as a ravening and a roaring lion. Psa 22:14 I am poured out like water, and all my bones are out of joint: my heart is like wax; it is melted in the midst of my bowels. Psa 22:15 My strength is dried up like a potsherd; and my tongue cleaveth to my jaws; and thou hast brought me into the dust of death. Psa 22:16 For dogs have compassed me: the assembly of the wicked have inclosed me: they pierced my hands and my feet. Psa 22:17 I may tell all my bones: they look and stare upon me. Psa 22:18 They part my garments among them, and cast lots upon my vesture. Psa 22:19 But be not thou far from me, O THE YAHWEH: O my strength, haste thee to help me. Psa 22:20 Deliver my soul from the sword; my united (H3173 "yachiyd" united) from the power of the dog. Psa 22:21 Save me from the lion's mouth: for thou hast heard me from the horns of the unicorns. Psa 22:22 I will declare thy name unto my brethren: in the midst of the congregation will I praise thee. Psa 22:23 Ye that fear THE YAHWEH, praise him; all ye the seed of Jacob, glorify him; and fear him, all ye the seed of Israel. Psa 22:24 For he hath not despised nor abhorred the oppression (H6039 "enuth") of the lowly (H6041 "aniy" depress in mind); neither hath he hid his face from him; but when he cried unto him, he heard. Psa 22:25 My praise shall be of thee in the great congregation: I will pay my vows before them that fear him. Psa 22:26 The lowly (H6035 "anav") shall eat and be satisfied: they shall praise THE YAHWEH that seek him: your heart shall live forever. Psa 22:27 All the ends of the earth (H776 "erets") shall remember and turn unto THE YAHWEH: and all the kindreds of the nations shall worship before thee. Psa 22:28 For the kingdom is THE YAHWEH'S: and he is the governor among the nations. Psa 22:29 All they that be fat upon earth shall eat and worship: all they that go down to the dust shall bow before him: and none can keep alive his own soul. Psa 22:30 A seed shall serve him; it shall be accounted to THE YAHWEH for a generation. Psa 22:31 They shall come, and shall declare his righteousness unto a people that shall be born, that he hath done this.
These will be accepted by us to be the Heavenly Mount Zion, Our rest because they are lowly in mind, contrite in spirit and show reverence when We speak.

Isa 66:1 Thus saith THE YAHWEH, The heaven is my throne, and the earth is my footstool: where is the house that ye build unto me? and where is the place of my rest? They have followed My example by emptying themselves, deny their right and forsake everything and have obeyed THE FATHER in lowliness of mind even unto the death of the cross. Therefore shall also be exalted like Me as blameless and harmless; son of THE ELOHIM, without rebuke in the midst of a crooked and perverse nation.

Php 2:3 Let nothing be done through strife or vainglory; but in lowliness of mind let each esteem other better than themselves. Php 2:4 Look not every man on his own things, but every man also on the things of others. Php 2:5 Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus: Php 2:6 Who, being in the form of THE ELOHIM, thought it not robbery to be equal with THE ELOHIM: Php 2:7 But emptied himself, and took upon him the form of a servant, and was made in the likeness of men: Php 2:8 And being found in fashion as a man, he humbled himself, and became obedient unto death, even the death of the cross. Php 2:9 Wherefore THE ELOHIM also hath highly exalted him, and given him a name which is above every name: Php 2:10 That at the name of Jesus every knee should bow, of things in heaven, and things in earth, and things under the earth; Php 2:11 And that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is THE YAHWEH, to the glory of THE ELOHIM the Father. Php 2:12 Wherefore, my beloved, as ye have always obeyed, not as in my presence only, but now much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with fear and trembling.

Through their lowliness of mind, they have received much grace from us to be able to go through the shames and reproaches with a right attitude and are completely and thoroughly established, strengthened and consolidated in holiness and accounted righteous to be a part of the Holy Jerusalem.

1Pe 5:5 Likewise, ye younger, submit yourselves unto the elder. Yea, all of you be subject one to another, and be clothed with lowliness of mind: for THE ELOHIM resisted the proud, and gives grace to the lowly. 1Pe 5:6 Abase yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of THE ELOHIM, that he may exalt you in due time: 1Pe 5:7 Casting all your distraction (G3308 "merman") upon him; for he careth for you. 1Pe 5:8 Be sober, be vigilant; because your adversary the devil, as a roaring lion, walketh about, seeking whom he may devour: 1Pe 5:9 Whom resist stedfast in the faith, knowing that the same undergoings are to be fulfilled further(G2005 "epiteleo) in your brethren that are in the Cosmos. 1Pe 5:10 But of all grace, who hath called us unto his eternal glory by Christ Jesus, after that ye have suffered a while, complete thoroughly (G2675 "katartizo"), stablish, strengthen, consolidate you.
4) Yieldedness
David: ABBA FATHER, please teach me how to yield to you.

THE FATHER: Pick up your cross, deny yourself, acknowledge Me in all that you do, be ye lowly just like JESUS; and I will put the spirit of yieldedness in you just like JESUS who yielded unto Me.; even though so unto My representative, Shekinaih. Yield your members servants to righteousness unto holiness to enter My Heavenly Mount Zioin.

Rom 6:12 Let not sin therefore reign in your mortal body, that ye should obey it in the lusts thereof. Rom 6:14 For sin shall not have dominion over you: for ye are not under the law, but under grace. Rom 6:15 What then? shall we sin, because we are not under the law, but under grace? forbid. Rom 6:16 Know ye not, that to whom ye yield yourselves servants to obey, his servants ye are to whom ye obey; whether of sin unto death, or of obedience unto righteousness? Rom 6:17 But THE ELOHIM be thanked, that ye were the servants of sin, but ye have obeyed from the heart that form of doctrine which was delivered you. Rom 6:18 Being then made free from sin, ye became the servants of righteousness. Rom 6:19 I speak after the manner of men because of the infirmity of your flesh: for as ye have yielded your members servants to uncleanness and to iniquity unto iniquity; even so now yield your members servants to righteousness unto holiness.
JESUS: Yes, yield your body as a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable unto My FATHER. This is your reasonable service.

Be in tune to My FATHER'S ways and thoughts, be dead to yourself, dead to your pride, ego and self-righteousness, and do not contradict My FATHER'S ways even though you do not fully comprehend His thoughts and ways.

Rom 12 1 I beseech you therefore, brethren, by the mercies of THE ELOHIM, that ye yield (G3936 "paristemi") your bodies a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable unto THE ELOHIM, which is your reasonable service, Rom 12:2 And be not conformed to this world: but be ye transformed by the renewing of your mind, that ye may prove what is that good, and acceptable, and perfect, will of THE ELOHIM.

Yield 100% to My FATHER speedily or promptly at all times, so that you will be approved and honoured by Him and be counted faithful to be empowered with authority, power, riches, glory, wisdom as His co-worker to make straight and smooth His oracle of truth.

2Ti 2:15 Be prompt (G4704 "spoudazo" is from G4710 "spoude", it means "to use speed, be prompt") to yield (G3936 "paristemi") thyself to be approved of THE ELOHIM, a workman that needeth not to be ashamed (G422 "anepaischuntos", to make straight and smooth (G3718 "orthotomeo") the oracle (G3056 "logos" something spoken including the thought) of truth.

5) Faith In THE ELOHIM
David: ABBA FATHER, how can one increase in faith towards you in holiness?

JESUS: Blessed are the pure in heart for they shall see THE ELOHIM but the heart is easily polluted and made wicked from all bad communication. So to successfully ascend to Heavenly Mount Zion is not an easy quest.
Jer 17:9 The heart is polluted ( H6121 "aqob") above from all things, and made wicked (H605 "anash") : who can know it?
There will always be defilement in My potential Brides unless they endeavor to purify their hearts through faith by hearing and obeying My spoken word which are spirit and life to their soul.

Act 15:8 And THE ELOHIM, which knoweth the hearts, bare them witness, giving them the Holy Ghost, even as he did unto us; Act 15:9 And put no difference between us and them, purifying their hearts by faith.
Rom 10:17 So then faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the word of THE ELOHIM.
Joh 6:63 It is the spirit that quickeneth; the flesh profiteth nothing: the words that I speak unto you, they are spirit, and they are life.
David, would you like to share with Shekinaih the vision of light coming out of your mouth when you preach?

David: Many years ago, I invited a seer to my meeting. As usual, I did not prepared any notes but was teaching spontaneously as led by THE HOLY SPIRIT. For what I heard in the spirit from JESUS, I spoke. When I had finished the teaching, he stood up and told the congregation that he saw a vision as I was teaching. He saw a light from heaven came down and entered into my heart and from there the light came out of my mouth. The light splitted into different colors of rays of light. Some of the rays of light penetrated into the hearts of some of my congregation, but for some, the light bounced back to me. He saw in the hearts of these people the words "Prejudice", "Pride", "Preconceived ideas", "Fear" written on their hearts. For those who received the light, he saw the word "Faith" written on their hearts and the word grew larger and larger as they listened attentively and their spirit man became brighter.

JESUS: Yes, this is what happen when My word is spoken prophetically by My spokesman who kept themselves holy. If they yield to us in faith when the prophesy, their hearts and minds will be driven by THE HOLY SPIRIT and the word they speak is as good as I spoke through them.

2Pe 1:20 Knowing this first that no prophecy of the scripture is of any private interpretation. 2Pe 2:21 For the prophecy came not in old time by the will of man: but holy men of THE ELOHIM spake as they were moved (G5342 "phero" bear or carry) by the Holy Ghost.
This is how I will sanctify and cleanse the hearts of My potential Bride through My spokesman; to present unto Myself a glorious church, not having spot or wrinkle; but holy and without blemish.

Eph 5:25 Husbands, love your wives, even as Christ also loved the church, and gave himself for it; Eph 5:26 That he might sanctify and cleanse it with the washing of water by the spoken word, Eph 5:27 That he might present it to himself a glorious church, not having spot, or wrinkle, or any such thing; but that it should be holy and without blemish.

This is how I will make them whole; through the washing of spoken word of regeneration of their spirit by you, representing Me, and the renovation of their minds through THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih..
Tit 3:5 Not by works of righteousness which we have done, but according to his mercy he made whole (G4982 "sozo" made whole) us, by the washing of rebirth, and renovation of the Holy Ghost;
Only then can they come close to be made whole with Our glory We have for the first Adam before his fall.
Rom 3:23 For all have sinned, and come short of the glory of THE ELOHIM.
I am the Word, the oracle of My FATHER. Whatever He has determined, I perform faithfully. Therefore it brings life to those who believe and it lightens their spirit.

Joh 1:1 In the beginning was the Word (G3056 "logos" something said including the thought), and the Word was with THE ELOHIM, and the Word was THE ELOHIM. Joh 1:2 The same was in the beginning with THE ELOHIM. Joh 1:3 All things were made by him; and without him was not any thing made that was made. Joh 1:4 In him was life; and the life was the light of men.
As they believed what I have spoken is truth from My FATHER, they are sanctified.

Act 26:18 To open their eyes, and to turn them from darkness to light, and from the authority of Satan unto THE ELOHIM, that they may receive forgiveness of sins, and inheritance among them which are sanctified by faith that is in me.
Joh 17:17 Sanctify them through thy truth: thy word (G3056 "logos" something said including the thought)) is truth.
If they stagger not at My speech through unbelief, We impute them as righteousness unto holiness.

Rom 4:20 He staggered not at the promise of THE ELOHIM through unbelief; but was strong in faith, giving glory to THE ELOHIM; Rom 4:21 And being fully persuaded that, what he had promised, he was able also to perform. Rom 4:22 And therefore it was imputed to him for righteousness.

The restoration of the glory of THE ELOHIM in My potential Brides is only possible if they trust in the truth of this teaching by walking in these ordained levels of ascent of holiness unto righteousness. This is My grace for them and it is through believing and walk in this bridal path that We have ordained that they be made whole.

Eph 2:8 For by grace are ye made whole (G4982 "sozo" made whole) through faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the gift of THE ELOHIM: Eph 2:9 Not of works, lest any man should boast. Eph 2:10 For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus unto good works, which THE ELOHIM hath before ordained that we should walk in them.

I am the chief leader and completer of the faith. My potential Brides must follow My example in faith laying aside every weight and sin and ascend with patience the Heavenly Mount Zion to receive the robe of righteousness and the crown of life from Me.

Heb12:1 Wherefore seeing we also are compassed about with so great a cloud of witnesses, let us lay aside every weight, and the sin which doth so easily beset us, and let us run with patience the race that is set before us, Heb 12:2 Looking unto Jesus the author and finisher of our faith; who for the joy that was set before him endured the cross, despising the shame, and is set down at the right hand of the throne of THE ELOHIM.
Unbelief
David: LORD JESUS, many who have heard our teachings are still struggling in unbelief even though it is true.

JESUS: Unbelief is a spirit. Like the dumb spirit that cling to the boy since birth that I cast out, it can aggressively cling to people and refuse to leave unless through prayer and fasting. For those who are struggling in unbelief in receiving and believing in the truth that THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, are teaching, they really need to desperately cry to us to help their unbelief through humbling themselves in prayer and fasting.

Mar 9:28 And when he was come into the house, his disciples asked him privately, Why could not we cast him out? Mar 9:29 And he said unto them, This kind can come forth by nothing, but by prayer and fasting.
Those who are obstinate and persist in unbelief in receiving and believing our teachings of the Ascent, will be rejected by us to be part of Heavenly Zion.

Rom 11:20 Well; because of unbelief they were broken off, and thou standest by faith. Be not highminded, but fear: Rom 11:21 For if THE ELOHIM spared not the natural branches, take heed lest he also spare not thee. Jer 17:9 The heart is polluted (H6121 "aqob") from all things, and made sick (H605 "anash" wicked, ungodly): who can know it?
