David: LORD JESUS, how are your potential Anointed Ones going to increase their faith and keep their hearts pure and holy from being polluted from all things and be not made spiritually sick/ungodly?

JESUS: Faith comes by hearing, and hearing by the word of THE ELOHIM. The word "comes" is a continuous action. Our spirit of faith will continue to energize their hearts if they continue to hear My spoken word through My spokesmen, especially through THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE. Their faith shall grow as they hear and keep it in their hearts. They shall be sanctified and purified if they are doers of what they hear. When I speak through you, your heart would burn and fire would come out of your mouth and purify their hearts. My word like a hammer will demolish their stronghold of carnal mindedness.
Ps 39:3 My heart was hot within me, while I was musing the fire burned: then spake I with my tongue,

Jer 23:28 The prophet that hath a dream, let him tell a dream; and he that hath my word, let him speak my word faithfully. What is the chaff to the wheat? Saith THE YAHWEH. Jer 23:29 Is not my word like as a fire? saith THE YAHWEH ; and like a hammer that breaketh the rock in pieces?

At times, My heavier anointing like a blanket will come upon you. This is My massa/burden (Hab 1:1) and you will be like Elihu feeling burden on your shoulders and the tightness in your stomach, like a wineskin that is going to burst due to overfilling of wine, and you will have to speak out My prophetic oracle so that your spirit may be released from the pressure and be refreshed.

Job 32:17 I said, I will answer also my part, I also will shew mine opinion. Job 32:18 For I am full of matter, the spirit within me constraineth me. Job 32:19 Behold, my belly is as wine which hath no vent; it is ready to burst like new bottles. Job 32:20 I will speak, that I may be refreshed: I will open my lips and answer.

As a person hears and receives My teachings through you, and believes in the visions We gave through Shekinaih, his faith will grow, and he will be sanctified and purified in his spirit and be renovated in his mind to be able to submit to THE FATHER in progressive holiness to ascend Heavenly Mount Zion.

2Th 2:13 But we are bound to give thanks always to THE ELOHIM for you, brethren beloved of THE YAHWEH, because THE ELOHIM hath from the beginning chosen you to salvation through sanctification of the Spirit and belief of the truth:
Tit 3:5 Not by works of righteousness which we have done, but according to his mercy he saved us, by the washing of regeneration, and renewing of the Holy Ghost;

This is what I did through both of you in China. Complemented with visions through Shekinaih, I spoke through you for 17 hours in a day with only about three fifteen-minutes break. The congregation did not hunger for physical food even though you asked them to go for their meal. Why? Their spirit man were hungry for more of Our oracles; for the words I spoke through you are spirit and life. Their faith is in Our demonstration of the Spirit and in Our power and not in man's wisdom and excellency of speech.

1Co 2:4 And my speech and my preaching was not with enticing words of man's wisdom, but in demonstration of the Spirit and of power: 1Co 2:5 That your faith should not stand in the wisdom of men, but in the power of THE ELOHIM. 1 Co 2:12 Now we have received, not the spirit of the world, but the spirit which is of THE ELOHIM; that we might know the things that are freely given to us of THE ELOHIM. 1 Co 2:13 Which things also we speak, not in the words which man's wisdom teacheth, but which the Holy Ghost teacheth; comparing spiritual with spiritual.

In addition, My potential Anointed Ones need an energy that is called the love of THE FATHER to energise their faith. How can they know the love of THE FATHER until they have experienced His love? How can they experience His love unless they are desperate for His love because of afflictions and necessities? David, would you like to share your experience regarding THE FATHER's love with Shekinaih?

David: THE FATHER is so merciful to me because He has not stopped talking to me through visions and dreams for the past twenty years to assure me of my destiny. Thus, my faith grew because I was always meditating on these visions, dreams and His prophetic words. I have always recorded them and sometimes turned them into songs. I would meditate on them and remind myself of His promises.

King David of old, in the beginning of his troubles had no one to turn to. Therefore he always encouraged himself in THE YAHWEH by singing and pouring out his heart with prophetic songs to THE YAHWEH. These became the Book of Psalms
When the people turned against him and wanted to stone him because the Amalekites had taken all their wives and children, David kept his peace. He encouraged himself in The Name of THE YAHWEH.

That is what I did. I do not look for someone to place my faith on nor seek I in the wisdom of man. I encourage myself in THE YAHWEH by meditating on His promises and hold on to the hope of my calling by meditating and singing Psalms spontaneously.
This has become my shield in my fight of faith against the fiery darts and lies of the Accuser.
1Ti 6:12 Fight the good fight of faith, lay hold on eternal life, whereunto thou art also called, and hast professed a good profession before many witnesses.
Eph 6:16 Above all, taking the shield of faith, wherewith ye shall be able to quench all the fiery darts of the wicked.

JESUS: David, We have orchestrated you to experience the suffering of King David of old so that you can relate and comfort those who are in many troubles by the consolation you received from My FATHER of mercy and all comfort. The songs We inspired you to write based on Psalms are meant for My Brides and Anointed Ones for their edification and sanctification. The Prophets and the Law are but shadow of the real things to come. You are My King David that is to come. Our spiritual Solomon will acknowledge you as their father and the tabernacle of David shall be restored.

This must be the foundation of Our potential Anointed Ones: the hope to be part of Heavenly Mount Zion and also to be My Bride. If they do not seriously take hold of this hope, they will not seek to increase in faith.
David, do you have faith in THE FATHER'S love?

David: I truly believe I have faith in THE FATHER'S love. Why? I am convicted in what THE FATHER has promised me. I am convicted of whom I am. I am convicted of my calling. I am convicted of my destiny. Why? Because I have done my diligent investigation. I have sought and dug it out. I have researched all about His Way. I have purposed in my heart to please Him. I am going to hold on to THE FATHER to the last breath. I will still believe Him even if things do not turn out to be what He has promised. Even if my family leaves me or my children leave me or all my relatives leave me and I am all alone, I will still hold on to Him until the end. This is my conviction. The FATHER had put me through many tests and I have yet to forsake Him. I have given up everything, sold everything, denied Myself and surrendered my right. I know nothing can separate me from THE FATHER'S love.

JESUS: Well spoken, all Our potential Anointed Ones who believed THE FATHER has called them as a Christ have to forsake all, deny themselves, and carry the cross. That is the path of the Anointed ones. They have to carry the cross, die to themselves, and follow My footsteps. They have to go through whatever I went through submitting to THE FATHER one hundred percent until death.

Heb11:5 By faith Enoch was translated that he should not see death; and was not found, because THE ELOHIM had translated him: for before his translation he had this testimony, that he pleased THE ELOHIM. Heb 11:6 But without faith it is impossible to please him: for he that cometh to THE ELOHIM must believe that he is, and that he is a rewarder of them that diligently seek him.

THE FATHER: Give Me a man of faith and I will show you a holy man. Nothing moves me more that the faith of the afflicted. If I can find a man of faith just like Abraham, he will be My friend because he pleases Me. Though I disciplined and tested him while everybody was running away from Me and gave up seeking Me, he still cried for more of Me and still believed in Me and that touched Me.

JESUS: Our potential Anointed Ones need this type of faith if they are to come out of the Great Tribulation because if We do not have this faith in the last days, they will be damned and not be able to reach the Heavenly Mount Zion.
Rev 13:10 He that leadeth into captivity shall go into captivity: he that killeth with the sword must be killed with the sword. Here is the patience and the faith of the saints.
2) Joy
Shekinaih: I see a tap attached to a rock and the tap holder has the word, "Joy" written on it.
JESUS: This is the fountain of salvation and without joy, no one shall be able to draw and drink the water that spring up into everlasting life.

Isa 12:2 Behold, THE EL is my salvation; I will trust, and not be afraid: for THE YAH YAHWEH is my strength and my song; he also is become my salvation. Isa 12:3 Therefore with joy shall ye draw water out of the wells of salvation.

In the last days, many false ministers and evil men from all nations from the the elites shall persecute and oppress My potential Anointed Ones but I have sent Shekinaih and you, who represent THE TRINITY, The Angel of Our Presence as My light and truth to lead them to My Heavenly Mount Zion with joy to meet Me.

Psa 43:1 Judge me, O THE ELOHIM, and contend (H7378 "riyb") My controversy (H7379 "riyb") against the not merciful from the nation: O deliver me from the false (H4820 "mirmah") and evil (H5766 "evel") from the mighty ones. Psa 43:2 For thou art THE ELOHIM of My strength: why dost thou cast me off? why go I mourning because of the oppression of the hater (H341 "oyeb")? Psa 43:3 O send out thy light and thy truth: let them lead me; let them bring me unto thy holy mountain, and to thy tabernacles. Psa 43:4 Then will I go unto the altar of THE ELOHIM, unto THE EL with joy (H8057 "simchah") exceedingly (H1524 "giyl"): yea, upon the harp will I praise thee, O THE ELOHIM My THE ELOHIM. Psa 43:5 Why art thou cast down, O My soul? and why art thou disquieted within me? hope in THE ELOHIM: for I shall yet praise him, who is the help of his face, and THE ELOHIM.

My potential Anointed ones shall be My highway of sanctified ones, those whom We will ransom through both of you. They shall enter into Heavenly Mount Zion with songs and everlasting joy shall be upon their heads: they shall obtain joy and gladness, and sorrow and sighing shall flee away from them.

Isa 35:8 And an highway shall be there, and a way, and it shall be called The way of holiness; the unclean shall not pass over it; but it shall be for those: the wayfaring men, though fools, shall not err therein. Isa 35:9 No lion shall be there, nor any ravenous beast shall go up thereon, it shall not be found there; but the redeemed shall walk there: Isa 35:10 And the ransomed of THE YAHWEH shall return, and come to Zion with songs and everlasting joy upon their heads: they shall obtain joy and gladness, and sorrow and sighing shall flee away.

We, THE YAHWEH shall comfort them and put them in Eden, the Heavenly Mount Zion for sure; for Shekinaih and you, who represent THE TRINITY, Our righteous one, Our lawgiver, shall made Our judgment and salvation known to them. And as in the day of the Exodus, THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, shall smite the Anti-Christ, the dragon of the sea and waste the sea and made a way for My ransomed to pass over. Therefore Our redeemed shall surely return, and come with singing unto Zion; and everlasting joy shall be upon their heads: they shall obtain gladness and joy; and sorrow and mourning shall flee away.

Isa 51:3 For THE YAHWEH shall comfort Zion: he will comfort all her waste places; and he will make her wilderness like Eden, and her desert like the garden of THE YAHWEH; joy and gladness shall be found therein, thanksgiving, and the voice of melody. Isa 51:4 Hearken unto me, My people; and give ear unto me, O My nation: for a law shall proceed from me, and I will make My judgment to rest for a light of the people. Isa 51:5 My righteous one is near; My salvation is gone forth, and mine arms shall judge the people; the isles shall wait upon me, and on mine arm shall they trust. Isa 51:6 Lift up your eyes to the heavens, and look upon the earth beneath: for the heavens shall vanish away like smoke, and the earth shall wax old like a garment, and they that dwell therein shall die in like manner: but My salvation shall be for ever, and My righteousness shall not be abolished. Isa 51:7 Hearken unto me, ye that know righteousness, the people in whose heart is My law; fear ye not the reproach of men, neither be ye afraid of their revilings. Isa 51:8 For the moth shall eat them up like a garment, and the worm shall eat them like wool: but My righteousness shall be for ever, and My salvation from generation to generation. Isa 51:9 Awake, awake, put on strength, O arm of THE YAHWEH; awake, as in the ancient days, in the generations of old. Art thou not it that hath cut Rahab, and wounded the dragon? Isa 51:10 Art thou not it which hath dried the sea, the waters of the great deep; that hath made the depths of the sea a way for the ransomed to pass over? Isa 51:11 Therefore the redeemed of THE YAHWEH shall return, and come with singing unto Zion; and everlasting joy shall be upon their head (H7218 "rosh" chief): they shall obtain gladness and joy; and sorrow and mourning shall flee away.

They shall become rejoicing Heavenly Jerusalem; a people of joy; and the voice of weeping shall be no more heard in her, nor the voice of crying; for everyone will live around a thousand years as the days of a tree and long enjoy the work of their hands. They shall not labour in vain, nor bring forth for trouble; for they are the seed of the blessed of THE YAHWEH, and their offspring with them. The nations shall not hurt nor destroy them in My holy mountain.

Isa 65:17 For, behold, I create new heavens and a new earth: and the former shall not be remembered, nor come into mind. Isa 65:18 But be ye glad and rejoice for ever in that which I create: for, behold, I create Jerusalem a rejoicing, and her people a joy. Isa 65:19 And I will rejoice in Jerusalem, and joy in My people: and the voice of weeping shall be no more heard in her, nor the voice of crying. Isa 65:20 There shall be no more thence an infant of days, nor an old man that hath not filled his days: for the child shall die an hundred years old; but the sinner being an hundred years old shall be accursed. Isa 65:21 And they shall build houses, and inhabit them; and they shall plant vineyards, and eat the fruit of them. Isa 65:22 They shall not build, and another inhabit; they shall not plant, and another eat: for as the days of a tree are the days of My people, and mine elect shall long enjoy the work of their hands. Isa 65:23 They shall not labour in vain, nor bring forth for trouble; for they are the seed of the blessed of THE YAHWEH, and their offspring with them. Isa 65:24 And it shall come to pass, that before they call, I will answer; and while they are yet speaking, I will hear. Isa 65:25 The wolf and the lamb shall feed together, and the lion shall eat straw like the bullock: and dust shall be the serpent's meat. They shall not hurt nor destroy in all My holy mountain, saith THE YAHWEH.

Therefore, be filled with joy and peace in believing that ye may abound in hope ; for the kingdom of THE ELOHIM is righteousness, and peace, and joy in the Holy Ghost; and without the fruit of the spirit, no one shall inherit the Kingdom of THE ELOHIM, the Heavenly Mount Zion.
Rom 15:13 Now THE ELOHIM of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, that ye may abound in hope, through the power of the Holy Ghost.
Rom 14:17 For the kingdom of THE ELOHIM is not meat and drink; but righteousness, and peace, and joy in the Holy Ghost.

Gal 5:21 Envyings, murders, drunkenness, revellings, and such like: of the which I tell you before, as I have also told you in time past, that they which do such things shall not inherit the kingdom of THE ELOHIM. Gal 5:22 But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith, Gal 5:23 Meekness, temperance: against such there is no law.
3) Patience
David: ABBA FATHER, how can one cultivate the fruit of spirit of Patience?

JESUS: THE FATHER has scripted for Our potential ones all kinds of straitened circumstances for them to produce the Fruit of Patience. When they are financially tight, He will still ask them to give. When they have not much time for themselves, He will still want them to serve others etc...
Rom 5:3 And not only so, but we boast in tribulations also: knowing that tribulation accomplisheth patience;
Jas1:2 My brethren, count it all joy when ye fall into divers temptations; Jas 1:3 Knowing this, that the trying of your faith accomplisheth patience.

THE FATHER will set them up by making them think that their breakthroughs are near to fulfilment and at the same time permit hindrances and delay to try their patience. My potential Anointed Ones must not be disappointed and give up hope as He will do this many times. They must peaceably and patiently confess: "My FATHER, even if this prophecy does not come to pass now, it does not matter because you are going to vindicate yourself sooner or later to make it come to pass in order to reveal your righteousness. After all, you are THE EHYEH (The I Am), the Mastermind, who wrote the script of the whole Cosmos and controls the mind of Satan/Adversary. If you are going to set me up on this occasion and I have to wait for another few years for this prophecy to fulfil, I am going to wait."
David, would you like to share with Shekinaih your revelation regarding the method the Accuser use to make My people dare not to believe any more of My FATHER'S promises.
David: Most people gave up hope because they have been disappointed too often. Once they give up their hope, they will no more be patient to hope.

I have seen in one Spy Movie, the intelligence agency wanted to extract information from the enemy's spy but the captive refused to disclose information even under horrifying torment. They then change their strategy by setting him free but while the captive was a few feet away from realising his freedom, they then dragged him back and repeated the torture and interrogation. This they did to break his will and hope of deliverance.

The morale of this story is that if you give a person hope and then crush that hope too often, it will be even more terrible and unbearable for him than before to believe and hope. This is what the Diabolos/Accuser will do often to us. That is why We must not give up hope.

Sometimes, when we thought that we were almost there and everything was going to be fine, there might be a twist of event, and we were back to where we started and felt disheartened. It became more difficult for us to believe in the promises of THE FATHER. That is why we must know the methods of Satan/Adversary. We must continue to hope so as to accomplish this fruit called Patience. THE FATHER will give us situations to see if we will hold on to this Hope to the end through Patience. In the beginning, it would be very difficult to bear as this had happened to me too many times. Sometimes, I felt like giving up. I did not want to believe anymore. I did not want to listen or believe in any new promises of THE ELOHIM. I dared not believe even though the fulfilment is nigh at hand because I was afraid to be hurt by disappointment again. However, THE FATHER has not given us a Spirit of Fear/Intimidation from the Diabolos/Accuser. He has given us His love and the power to have a sound mind. Therefore, gird up the loin of Our minds to run with patience in Our persecutions and tribulations to the end in order that we may be found worthy of the Kingdom of THE ELOHIM.
Rom 8:25 But if we hope for that we see not, then do we with patience wait for it.

Heb 12:1 Wherefore seeing we also are compassed about with so great a cloud of witnesses, let us lay aside every weight, and the sin which doth so easily beset us, and let us run with patience the race that is set before us,

2Th 1:4 So that we ourselves glory in you in the churches of THE ELOHIM for your patience and faith in all your persecutions and tribulations that ye endure: 2Th 1:5 Which is a manifest token of the righteous judgment of THE ELOHIM, that ye may be counted worthy of the kingdom of THE ELOHIM, for which ye also suffer:

JESUS: Patience has a delightful fragrance that captivates the souls of all living things and very much delights THE FATHER in his endurance. Only he with an honest and good heart having heard the true gospel and guarding it with his life will bring forth fruit with patience to progress to Heavenly Mount Zion and possess his soul and be restored to glory, honour and immortality.
Luk 8:15 But that on the good ground are they, which in an honest and good heart, having heard the word, keep it, and bring forth fruit with patience (G5278 "hupomeno").
Luk 21:19 In your patience (G5278 "hupomeno") possess ye your souls.
Matt 24:13 But he that shall be patient (G5278 "hupomeno") unto the end, the same shall be saved.
Rom 2:6 Who will render to every man according to his deeds: Rom 2:7 To them who by patient continuance in well doing seek for glory and honour and immortality, eternal life:
4) Mercy
My FATHER is good and His mercy endureth forever. Therefore those who will to ascend to Heavenly Mount Zion to come to His Presence must be merciful.

Psa 16:10 For thou wilt not leave my soul in hell; neither wilt thou suffer thine Merciful One (H2623 "chasiyd") to see corruption. Psa 16:11 Thou wilt shew me the path of life: in thy is fulness of joy; at thy right hand there are pleasures for evermore.
Our potential Anointed Ones are all vessels of mercy which My FATHER had afore prepared unto glory, therefore, the more they need to show mercy to all as they have obtained mercy from us.

Rom 9:22 What if THE ELOHIM, willing to shew his wrath, and to make his power known, endured with much longsuffering the vessels of wrath fitted to destruction: Rom 9:23 And that he might make known the riches of his glory on the vessels of mercy, which he had afore prepared unto glory,

Mercy should be shown no matter how horrible, unrepentant, incorrigible the person is. As My FATHER is merciful and compassionate even to those ungrateful, unthankful and unrighteous, even so My potential Anointed Ones should do likewise for this is holiness unto righteousness.
Matt 5:48 Be ye therefore perfect, even as your Father which is in heaven is perfect.
Luke 6:36 Be ye therefore merciful, as your Father also is merciful.
David, would you like to share with Shekinaih regarding Our dealing with you in the area of showing mercy to all?

David: The heart is easily polluted above all things, and made wicked by evil spirits. They are like some characters in movies where these people are so oppressed by the evil environment until they become their product. They concluded that to be good and godly does not pay. So they became evil, the most evil of all because they lost faith in men. To them, what is more real is money. There is a saying in Hong Kong, "The people of the world do not despise vice but they despise the poor."

This is what THE FATHER convicted me because I used to pass judgements very quickly. I have learnt and I am still trying not to let my self-righteousness deprive me of being merciful to them. I know I have no right to judge anybody. Neither do I have any right to be angry when a brother falls or yield to temptation. We all have our struggles and THE FATHER wants us to show mercy and win them over to good by our mercy. They need to realize, and to repent and cry out to THE FATHER for forgiveness and restoration.

Apostle Paul was once a blasphemer. He was very unholy. He did a lot of harm to the Children of THE ELOHIM. If we were in the time of Paul and saw how Paul treated the Children of THE ELOHIM, I think it is very difficult for us to forgive and receive Paul. I think we will think of ways to kill him to avenge our brothers and sisters. Nevertheless, JESUS did not think this way. Knowing that Paul had a calling, He forgave him.

There was a very strong unbelief in Paul. Paul did not believe that JESUS was the Messiah. He did not believe in the gospel that JESUS preached. Even when JESUS was resurrected, he still did not believe. When the disciples did signs and wonders, he did not believe as well. He had a snake of self-righteousness. This is the worst snake you can ever find. It is the spirit of a Pharisee, a religious spirit blinded by the Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil. They will kill you but still think that they are doing the right thing in The Name of THE ELOHIM. This is going to happen in the last days. It is the worst snake of all. This self-righteousness spirit is a stronghold in most of our lives especially if you are religious. It is very common because you want to uphold the righteousness of law, but you have forgotten that THE FATHER is merciful to His children and hope that they will repent of their lawlessness. He is more concerned with one lost sheep that had gone astray than the ninety-nine righteous that need no repentance. This is my struggle with those sons and daughters who were called but gave up their calling and turned to the world. I have to love and show mercy to them intentionally. THE HOLY SPIRIT convicted me that it is because of grace through the energizing of THE HOLY SPIRIT that I did not fall away.
We must cry onto THE FATHER to ask and fill His love and mercy in our hearts so that we may walk in the Law of Liberty and be free from judgement by showing mercy to all.

Jas 2:12 So speak ye, and so do, as they that shall be judged by the law of liberty. Jas 2:13 For he shall have judgment without mercy, that hath shewed no mercy; and mercy rejoiceth against judgment.
Mat 9:13 But go ye and learn what that meaneth, I will have mercy, and not sacrifice: for I am not come to call the righteous, but sinners to repentance.

JESUS: THE YAHWEH delights in mercy because He is merciful. He knows the frailty and struggles of men. David, would you like to share with Shekinaih My FATHER's mercy towards Daniel, one of your intercessors?

David: There was a brother-in-Christ who is seer and I used to pray with him together with another sister. One day, as we were gathered for prayer, heaven was opened. The three of us were trembling and I was crying and begging THE FATHER for His glory. After prayer, the sister asked the other brother why he did not approach the throne of THE FATHER when He invited him in the vision that both of them saw simultaneously. He replied that he dared not approach the throne. He said, "If I went up, I would die." He feared THE FATHER and honoured His holiness. He just laid flat on the floor and trembled because he saw the holiness of THE FATHER like Isaiah. From that incident, I learned more of the Way of THE YAHWEH. THE ELOHIM chose him as His vessel of mercy despite all his flaws. This seer brother was not a decent person. During his younger days, he was involved with secret societies and vices and had been in prison. He was not living a holy life even at that time and yet THE FATHER invited him to come to His throne. This is how THE ELOHIM sees a person. Therefore, I have endeavoured not to be religious. How THE ELOHIM sees and how people see is different. I always remind myself not to think that I am better than the others. THE FATHER sees the heart and not how good and respectable a person behaves. He is looking for one who is broken and contrite and trembles when He speaks.

Rom 9:15 For he saith to Moses, I will have mercy on whom I will have mercy, and I will have compassion on whom I will have compassion. Rom 9:16 So then it is not of him that willeth, nor of him that runneth, but of THE ELOHIM that sheweth mercy.
5) Hope
JESUS: David, you have spoken well. Now I will continue to expound on the Fifth level of holiness called Hope.

Our potential Anointed Ones must have hope in the coming resurrection to be clothed with a glorified body of immortality to rule with Me as Christs. I was in Hades for three days and three nights and took the Keys of Death and Hades and came out of it. This will happen again in the last days to our Two Witnesses who are appointed to die for the Name of Christ, as an Anointed one. They shall rest in hope: because We wll not leave their souls in Sheol, neither will We suffer them to see corruption, but will raise them up in the last day through The Angel of Our Presence, SHE (Shekinaih representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT/ HE, Aaron K David representing JESUS).

My Name, "JESUS" means "the Deliverer of YAHWEH", "CHRIST" means "the Anointed". I am the leader and completer of the faith of those who are called to be the Deliverers and the Anointed Ones of THE YAHWEH in the order of Melchisedec. I have risen; in the last days, those who are Christs will also be risen.

Act 2:26 Therefore did my heart rejoice, and my tongue was glad; moreover also my flesh shall rest in hope: Act 2:27 Because thou wilt not leave my soul in hell, neither wilt thou suffer thine Merciful One (H2623 "chasiyd") to see corruption. Act 2:28 Thou hast made known to me the ways of life; thou shalt make me full of joy with thy countenance.

1Co15:20 But now is CHRIST risen from the dead, and become the first fruits of them that slept. 1Co 15:21 For since by man came death, by man came also the resurrection of the dead. 1Co 15:22 For as in Adam all die, even so in Christ shall all be made alive. 1Co 15:23 But every man in his own order: THE CHRIST the first fruits; afterward they that are Christs in His presence (G3952 "parousia').

Rev 11:11 And after three days and an half the Spirit of life from THE ELOHIM entered into them, and they stood upon their feet; and great fear fell upon them which saw them. Rev 11:12 And they heard a great voice from heaven saying unto them, Come up hither. And they ascended up to heaven in a cloud; and their enemies beheld them.
Col 1:27 To whom would make known what is the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles; which is CHRIST in you, the hope of glory:

Therefore, we desire that everyone do shew diligence to the full assurance of this hope unto the end for My FATHER have sworn by His holiness that those who fled to THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, for refuge and lay hold upon this hope on us through both of you as an anchor of the soul, both sure and steadfast, will enter My Holy of Holiest; after the order of Melchisedec.

Heb 6:11 And we desire that every one of you do shew the same diligence to the full assurance of hope unto the end: Heb 6:12 That ye be not slothful, but followers of them who through faith and patience inherit the promises. Heb 6:13 For when THE ELOHIM made promise to Abraham, because he could swear by no greater, he sware by himself, Heb 6:14 Saying, Surely blessing I will bless thee, and multiplying I will multiply thee. Heb 6:15 And so, after he had patiently endured, he obtained the promise. Heb 6:16 For men verily swear by the greater: and an oath for confirmation is to them an end of all strife. Heb 6:17 Wherein THE ELOHIM, willing more abundantly to shew unto the heirs of promise the immutability of his counsel, confirmed it by an oath: Heb 6:18 That by two immutable things, in which it was impossible for THE ELOHIM to lie, we might have a strong consolation, who have fled for refuge to lay hold upon the hope set before us: Heb 6:19 Which hope we have as an anchor of the soul, both sure and stedfast, and which entereth into that within the veil; Heb 6:20 Whither the forerunner is for us entered, even JESUS, made an high priest for ever after the order of Melchisedec.
6) Love
My FATHER is love; and he that continue in love continue in THE FATHER and THE FATHER in him unto eternity.

That is why, My potential Anointed Ones must endeavor to increase and abound in love towards another and towards all: to the end that their hearts be stablished, unblameable in holiness before My FATHER.

1Th 3:12 And the Lord make you to increase and abound in love one toward another, and toward all men, even as we do toward you: 1Th 3:13 To the end he may stablish your hearts unblameable in holiness before THE ELOHIM, even our Father, in The Presence (G3952 "parousia') of our Lord Jesus Christ with all his holy ones.
Their love for My FATHER must surpass that of money, father, mother, son, daughter and even themselves.
Mat 6:24 No man can serve two masters: for either he will hate the one, and love the other; or else he will hold to the one, and despise the other. Ye cannot serve THE ELOHIM and mammon.

Mat 10:37 He that loveth father or mother more than me is not worthy of me: and he that loveth son or daughter more than me is not worthy of me. Mat 10:38 And he that taketh not his cross, and followeth after me, is not worthy of me. Mat 10:39 He that findeth his life shall lose it: and he that loseth his life for my sake shall find it.

They must have 1 Corinthian Chapter 13 type of love for My FATHER as well as for His children. It is a purposely and intently type of love that flow from THE FATHER through them. This is called "labour of love".

Mar 12:29 And JESUS answered him, The first of all the commandments is, Hear, O Israel; THE YAHWEH our ELOHIM is one YAHWEH: Mar 12:30 And thou shalt love THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy mind, and with all thy strength: this is the first commandment. Mar 12:31 And the second is like, namely this, Thou shalt love thy neighbor as thyself. There is none other commandment greater than these.
1 Thess 1:3 Remembering without ceasing your work of faith, and labour of love, and patience of hope in our YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST, in the sight of and our Father;
Once His love remains in them, it will constraint them even to die for Our children.

2 Co 5:13 For whether we be beside ourselves, it is to THE ELOHIM: or whether we be sober, it is for your cause. 2 Co 5:14 For the love of THE CHRIST constraineth us; because we thus judge, that if one died for all, then were all dead: 2 Co 5:15 And that he died for all, that they which live should not henceforth live unto themselves, but unto him which died for them, and rose again.
Loving us is to love the children whom I have died for; therefore love these that are begotten of us that ye can be perfected in love.

Joh 21:15 So when they had dined, JESUS saith to Simon Peter, Simon, son of Jonas, lovest thou me more than these? He saith unto him, Yea, THE YAHWEH; thou knowest that I love thee. He saith unto him, Feed my lambs. Joh 21:16 He saith to him again the second time, Simon, son of Jonas, lovest thou me? He saith unto him, Yea, THE YAHWEH; thou knowest that I love thee. He saith unto him, Feed my sheep. Joh 21:17 He saith unto him the third time, Simon, son of Jonas, lovest thou me? Peter was grieved because he said unto him the third time, Lovest thou me? And he said unto him, Lord, thou knowest all things; thou knowest that I love thee. JESUS saith unto him, Feed my sheep.

1Jn 4:12 No man hath seen THE ELOHIM at any time. If we love one another, THE ELOHIM dwelleth in us, and his love is perfected in us. 1Jn 4:13 Hereby know we that we dwell in him, and he in us, because he hath given us of his Spirit.
David: LORD JESUS, who are our neighbours that we are supposed to love?

JESUS: There are two Hebrew words for the word "neighbours". One is H7453 "rea" referring to an associate. The other H7138 "qarob" referring to kinsmen. Both are translated as neighbours. "Associates" means those who have callings and minister with you. "Kinsmen" means relatives: brothers, sisters and children of THE ELOHIM.

Psa 15:1 A Psalm of David. THE YAHWEH, who shall abide in thy tabernacle? who shall dwell in thy holy hill? Psa 15:2 He that walketh uprightly, and worketh righteousness, and speaketh the truth in his heart. Psa 15:3 He that backbiteth not with his tongue, nor doeth evil to his neighbour (H7453 "rea" an associate), nor taketh up a reproach against his neighbour (H7138 "qarob" kinsman). Psa 15:4 In whose eyes a vile person is contemned; but he honoureth them that fear THE YAHWEH. He that sweareth to his own hurt, and changeth not. Psa 15:5 He that putteth not out his money to usury, nor taketh reward against the innocent. He that doeth these things shall never be moved.

Thus, one must rightly divide the words. One must be wise as a serpent, unmixed as a dove. There are people who use Our words in vain and take advantage of My children because they are false brothers.
1 John, 2 John and 3 John are addressed to the elect lady, Heavenly Jerusalem, and her children.
2Jn 1:1 The elder unto the elect lady and her children, whom I love in the truth; and not I only, but also all they that have known the truth;

THE HOLY SPIRIT is the elect lady and is represented by Shekinaih. Her children are mentioned in Revelation Chapter 12. She is the lady whose man-child is about to be born. THE HOLY SPIRIT and Her children are called the Sons of Wisdom, the Anointed Ones or the Doves. When we say,: "love one another" in 1 John and 2 John, We are referring to the elect lady and her children. These are the Children of THE ELOHIM.

If THE HOLY SPIRIT reveals to you that a certain brother is a Diabolos/Accuser, a son of Belial, then you must be wary of him. However, if We reveal to you that he is Our children but was misled by the Diabolos/Accuser, then you must take him out of the fire and not give up on him. This is very important because THE FATHER wants you to show mercy to His children. This is Our commandment that ye love one another.

Joh 13:34 A new commandment I give unto you, That ye love one another; as I have loved you, that ye also love one another. Joh 13:35 By this shall all men know that ye are my disciples, if ye have love one to another.

However, as for the evil doers, we bear long with them giving them time to repent because of Our mercy. If they continue to be contentious, and do not obey the truth but obey unrighteousness, We, THE YAHWEH will come in the Angel of Our Presence, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, with indignation and wrath, tribulation and anguish, upon every soul of man that does evil, of the Jews first, and also of the Gentiles; for there is no respect of persons with us.

Rom 2:3 And thinkest thou this, O man, that judgest them which do such things, and doest the same, that thou shalt escape the judgment of THE ELOHIM? Rom 2:4 Or despisest thou the riches of his goodness and forbearance and longsuffering; not knowing that the goodness of THE ELOHIM leadeth thee to repentance? Rom 2:5 But after thy hardness and impenitent heart treasurest up unto thyself wrath against the day of wrath and revelation of the righteous judgment of THE ELOHIM; Rom 2:6 Who will render to every man according to his deeds: Rom 2:7 To them who by patient continuance in well doing seek for glory and honour and immortality, eternal life: Rom 2:8 But unto them that are contentious, and do not obey the truth, but obey unrighteousness, indignation and wrath, Rom 2:9 Tribulation and anguish, upon every soul of man that doeth evil, of the Jew first, and also of the Gentile; Rom 2:10 But glory, honour, and peace, to every man that worketh good, to the Jew first, and also to the Gentile: Rom 2:11 For there is no respect of persons with THE ELOHIM.
David: ABBA FATHER, most people will not keep your commandment to love one another as you have commanded unless they are motivated. Can you tell me what is in store for those who obey?
Benefits of Loving THE ELOHIM and One Another
i) THE FATHER and JESUS will Love You and Appear to You
JESUS: When anyone keeps Our commandment to love Our children, My FATHER and I will love him and appear to him.

Our children include the ungrateful, unrepentant and the ones who scoff and laugh at you and continue to make use of you. If anyone continues to love them, My FATHER will love him more and pour out more of His love into him so that he can love them on Our behalf.
Joh 14:21 He that hath my commandments, and keepeth them, he it is that loveth me: and he that loveth me shall be loved of my Father, and I will love him, and will manifest myself to him.
Joh 15:12 This is my commandment, that ye love one another, as I have loved you.
ii) THE FATHER and JESUS will Dwell in You

When anyone loves Our children, THE FATHER will love him and He and I will dwell in his heart. When one sow love, he will reap love. My FATHER is love. When He makes His abode in him, His love also dwells in his heart.
Joh14:23 JESUS answered and said unto him, if a man loves me, he will keep my words: and my Father will love him, and we will come unto him, and make our abode with him.
iii) Abide In His Love
When anyone loves Our children, My love will remain in him.

Joh15:9 As the Father hath loved me, so have I loved you: continue ye in my love. Joh 15:10 If ye keep my commandments, ye shall abide in my love; even as I have kept my Father's commandments, and abide in his love.
iv) All Things Work Together For Good
If anyone continues to walk in love towards us and Our children, everything will work out good for him. No demon will come near him but will submit to him for they know that he is our favoured one.
Rom 8:28 And we know that all things work together for good to them that love THE ELOHIM, to them who are the called according to his purpose.
v) Given the Mind of a Christ
When anyone loves Our children, We will unite with him and impart Our spiritual understanding to know Our deep things. He shall have the mind of a Christ, an anointed one.

1Co 2:9 But as it is written, Eye hath not seen, nor ear heard, neither have entered into the heart of man, the things which THE ELOHIM hath prepared for them that love him. 1Co 2:10 But THE ELOHIM hath revealed them unto us by his Spirit: for the Spirit searcheth all things, yea, the deep things of THE ELOHIM…..1Co 2:16 For who hath known the mind of THE YAHWEH, that he may instruct him? But we have the mind of a Christ.
vi) Be Filled With the Fullness of THE ELOHIM
When anyone is rooted and grounded in My FATHER'S love, he will be filled with all the fullness of My FATHER.

Eph 3:16 That he would grant you, according to the riches of his glory, to be strengthened with might by his Spirit in the inner man; Eph 3:17 That CHRIST may dwell in your hearts by faith; that ye, being rooted and grounded in love, Eph 3:18 May be able to comprehend with all saints what is the breadth, and length, and depth, and height; Eph 3:19 And to know the love of CHRIST, which passeth knowledge, that ye might be filled with all the fulness of THE ELOHIM. Eph 3:20 Now unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that worketh in us,
vii) Increase in Holiness
If anyone increases and abound in love towards all, his heart will be unblameable in holiness to stand before My FATHER.

1Th 3:12 And THE YAHWEH make you to increase and abound in love one toward another, and toward all men, even as we do toward you: 1Th 3:13 To the end he may stablish your hearts unblameable in holiness before THE ELOHIM, even our Father, in The Presence (G3952 "parousia") of our YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST with all his saints.
viii) Receive the Crown of Life
If anyone loves us and has passed Our tests, he will receive the crown of life, which We have promised.
Jas1:12 Blessed is the man: for when he is tried, he shall receive the crown of life, which THE YAHWEH hath promised to them that love him.
ix) His Soul shall be Purified

The word "fervently" G1619 "ektenos" means intently. Anyone who intently loves My children in sincerity regardless of how he feel for that person, have laboured to love and will have his soul purified by us.
1Pe1:22 Seeing ye have purified your souls in obeying the truth through the Spirit unto unfeigned love of the brethren, see that ye love one another with a pure heart fervently.
x) His Love is Perfected in Us
If anyone continues to love Our children, My FATHER will continue to dwell in him and His love will be perfected in him.
1Jn 4:12 No man hath seen at any time. If we love one another, THE ELOHIM dwelleth in us, and his love is perfected in us.
7) Peace
David: LORD JESUS, what does the bible mean by 'follow peace with all men, and holiness, without which no man shall see You?'

JESUS: In all the tribulations that My FATHER puts anyone through, he needs to be at peace and not to be defiled by demons of unbelief, bitterness, anger, sorrow and etc.. The word "World" according to Strong's Number G2889 "kosmos" means "System, the orderly way things are being run". I have overcome this present age system (which is the Babylonian system). This is the peace that I talked about. In this Cosmos, Our potential Anointed Ones must produce and maintain this peace which is unto holiness. If he does not have this kind of peace, he will be defiled by demons of unbelief, fear, doubts or many others. I came to preach peace in THE FATHER through the tribulations He has permitted for them to be tested in order to approve them for the kingdom. I have told My disciples that in this Cosmos they shall have tribulation; but be of good cheer; I have overcome the Cosmos.
Act 10:36 The word which THE ELOHIM sent unto the children of Israel, preaching peace by JESUS CHRIST: (he is Lord of all )
Joh14:27 Peace I leave with you, my peace I give unto you: not as the cosmos gives, give I unto you. Let not your heart be troubled, neither let it be afraid.
Joh 16:33 These things I have spoken unto you, that in me ye might have peace. In the cosmos ye shall have tribulation: but be of good cheer; I have overcome the Cosmos.
My FATHER has sent John the Baptist in the spirit and power of Elijah to guide My children's feet into this Way of Peace.

Luk 1:76 And thou, child, shalt be called the prophet of the Highest: for thou shalt go before the face of THE YAHWEH to prepare his ways; Luk 1:77 To give knowledge of salvation unto his people by the remission of their sins, Luk 1:78 Through the tender mercy of our THE ELOHIM; whereby the dayspring from on high hath visited us, Luk 1:79 To give light to them that sit in darkness and in the shadow of death, to guide our feet into the way of peace.

The Israelites in the time of Moses were still carrying the idols of Moloch and Chiun as they were led by The Angel of the Covenant, SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/ JESUS represented by Aaron K David, during their forty years of wandering in the wilderness.

Amo 5:25 Have ye offered unto me sacrifices and offerings in the wilderness forty years, O house of Israel? Amo 5:26 But ye have borne the tabernacle of your Moloch and Chiun your images, the star of your THE ELOHIM, which ye made to yourselves.

Do you know why? It was because they were full of bitterness against us as We always discipline them when they walked contrary to Our command. Most of Our children behaves like them. They got angry with us for disciplining them when they disobeyed us by walking contrary to Our counsel.

Sometimes, they behaved like Korah and the two hundred and fifty princes of the assembly. They were bitter with us regarding Our testings and threw their anger on Aaron and Moses. This made us very angry. Therefore, We asked them to bring their censers and We then sent fire and burned every one of them. The Israelites also became bitter and rebellious and put an idol in their hearts. In this case, they brought a real idol. Their hearts were not with us. That was why We could not take it any longer. Thus, none of the Israelites who came out of Egypt entered into the Promised Land except Joshua and Caleb and the children of the next generation.

My potential Anointed Ones must not repeat what they did. Whatever My FATHER puts them through; they must maintain the peace and trust Him. If not they will be defiled. Sometimes it seems His ways are not just, for example, some of Our children do not have the time to spare and My FATHER demands their time; or some do not have money and yet He continues to squeeze their wallet; or some think they deserve praise and yet He continues not to honour them; or some who sacrifice and yet did not receive acknowledgement.
My children must learn to keep their peace by trusting Him and acknowledging who My FATHER is by confessing the following words:

"My FATHER, I will maintain my peace. I will come out of all the troubles with the Peaceable Fruit of Righteousness unto Holiness. I am determined to sow this seed and bear this fruit. I will continue to sow peace in My heart. Whatever happens, I will not be bitter. When the enemy whispers to me that I have been short-changed, I am not going to listen to him. When he whispers to me that I have been deceived or I have been taken advantage of, I am not going to listen to him. I am going to believe in you for your Name is THE YAHWEH, the Righteous Judge."
Jer 9:23 Thus saith THE YAHWEH, Let not the wise man glory in his wisdom, neither let

the mighty man glory in his might, let not the rich man glory in his riches: Jer 9:24 But let him that glorieth glory in this, that he understandeth and knoweth me, that I am THE YAHWEH which exercise lovingkindness, judgment, and righteousness, in the earth: for in these things I delight, saith THE YAHWEH. Jer 9:25 Behold, the days come, saith THE YAHWEH, that I will punish all them which are circumcised with the uncircumcised; Jer 9:26 Egypt, and Judah, and Edom, and the children of Ammon, and Moab, and all that are in the utmost corners, that dwell in the wilderness: for all these nations are uncircumcised, and all the house of Israel are uncircumcised in the heart.

That is how We, THE ELOHIM of Peace shall put their Adversary/Accuser/Satan under their feet speedily if they maintain that kind of peace. The adversary will no longer be able to rob them of of their blessings.

I have given you the knowledge of the Way of Peace and show you why the Israelites in the time of Moses did not know the Way of Peace and thus could not enter into Our rest. When you are converted, establish the children whom We have given both of you.
Isa 59:8 The way of peace they know not; and there is no judgment in their goings: they have made them crooked paths: whosoever goeth therein shall not know peace.

David: I understood why they rebelled in their hearts for we might also become bitter and defiled when THE FATHER chastens us. We could be swallowed up by our self-righteousness and silently rebel in our hearts and go astray.

Rom 3:10 As it is written, There is none righteous, no, not one: Rom 3:11 There is none that understandeth, there is none that seeketh after THE ELOHIM. Rom 3:12 They are all gone out of the way, they are together become unprofitable; there is none that doeth good, no, not one. Rom 3:13 Their throat is an open sepulchre; with their tongues they have used deceit; the poison of asps is under their lips: Rom 3:14 Whose mouth is full of cursing and bitterness: Rom 3:15 Their feet are swift to shed blood: Rom 3:16 Destruction and misery are in their ways: Rom 3:17 And the way of peace have they not known: Rom 3:18 There is no fear of THE ELOHIM before their eyes.

JESUS: We have led the Israelites for forty years in the wilderness through The Angel of the Covenant, SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/ JESUS represented by Aaron K David, to humble them, and to prove them to know what were in their hearts, whether they would obey His command. We suffered them to hunger and later fed them with manna so that they might have the revelation that it is only by obeying every word that proceeds out of Our Mouth through the Angel of Our Presence, SHE (Shekinaih representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT/ HE, Aaron K David representing JESUS) will they have life.

Deu 8:1 All the commandments which I command thee this day shall ye observe to do, that ye may live, and multiply, and go in and possess the land which THE YAHWEH sware unto your fathers. Deu 8:2 And thou shalt remember all the way which THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM led thee these forty years in the wilderness, to humble thee, and to prove thee, to know what was in thine heart, whether thou wouldest keep his commandments, or no. Deu 8:3 And he humbled thee, and suffered thee to hunger, and fed thee with manna, which thou knewest not, neither did thy fathers know; that he might make thee know that man doth not live by bread only, but by every word that proceedeth out of the mouth of THE YAHWEH doth man live.

However, they did not obey us through The Angel of Our Presence and had none of Our counsel. Therefore, Our spokesman gave them up unto the lusts of their own hearts and they walked in their own counsels according to the evil age of this Babylonian System, according to the prince of the authority of the air, the wandering stars/planets/spirits that are now energizing in the children of disobedience: fulfilling the desires of the flesh and of the mind; straying from Our Way, and were subdued by them and went into captivity (Eph 2:2-3) .

Psa 81:1 To the chief Musician upon Gittith, A Psalm of Asaph. Sing aloud unto THE ELOHIM our strength: make a joyful noise unto THE ELOHIM of Jacob. Psa 81:2 Take a psalm, and bring hither the timbrel, the pleasant harp with the psaltery. Psa 81:3 Blow up the trumpet in the new moon, in the time appointed, on our solemn feast day. Psa 81:4 For this was a statute for Israel, and a law of THE ELOHIM of Jacob. Psa 81:5 This he ordained in Joseph for a testimony, when he went out through the land of Egypt: where I heard a language that I understood not. Psa 81:6 I removed his shoulder from the burden: his hands were delivered from the pots. Psa 81:7 Thou calledst in trouble, and I delivered thee; I answered thee in the secret place of thunder: I proved thee at the waters of Meribah. Selah. Psa 81:8 Hear, O my people, and I will testify unto thee: O Israel, if thou wilt hearken unto me; Psa 81:9 There shall no strange THE ELOHIM be in thee; neither shalt thou worship any strange THE ELOHIM. Psa 81:10 I am THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM, which brought thee out of the land of Egypt: open thy mouth wide, and I will fill it. Psa 81:11 But my people would not hearken to my voice; and Israel would none of me. Psa 81:12 So I gave them up unto their own hearts' lust: and they walked in their own counsels. Psa 81:13 Oh that my people had hearkened unto me, and Israel had walked in my ways! Psa 81:14 I should soon have subdued their enemies, and turned my hand against their adversaries. Psa 81:15 The haters of THE YAHWEH should have submitted themselves unto him: but their time should have endured for ever. Psa 81:16 He should have fed them also with the finest of the wheat: and with honey out of the rock should I have satisfied thee.

They lost their peace and became bitter and failed in all the ten testing. When they heard from Moses about the good news of the Promised Land, they were filled with joy. However, when tribulations and persecutions came, they were intimidated and offended; they fell into unbelief, lost their peace, became bitter and complained.

They had forgotten quickly all the signs and wonders The Angel of the Covenant, SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/ JESUS represented by Aaron K David, had done in their sight in bringing the Ten Plagues on the Egyptians. At the Red Sea, when they saw the Egyptians approaching and there was nowhere to run, they again complained to Moses.

Exo 14:10 And when Pharaoh drew nigh, the children of Israel lifted up their eyes, and, behold, the Egyptians marched after them; and they were sore afraid: and the children of Israel cried out unto THE YAHWEH. Exo 14:11 And they said unto Moses, Because there were no graves in Egypt, hast thou taken us away to die in the wilderness? wherefore hast thou dealt thus with us, to carry us forth out of Egypt? Exo 14:12 Is not this the word that we did tell thee in Egypt, saying, Let us alone, that we may serve the Egyptians? For it had been better for us to serve the Egyptians, than that we should die in the wilderness. Exo 14:13 And Moses said unto the people, Fear ye not, stand still, and see the salvation of THE YAHWEH, which he will shew to you today: for the Egyptians whom ye have seen to day, ye shall see them again no more for ever. Exo 14:14 THE YAHWEH shall fight for you, and ye shall hold your peace.

We heard their complaints but bore with them and opened the Red Sea. Yet when We tested them again on food and drink, they grumbled again in bitterness and unbelief, challenging Moses and questioning Our trustworthiness and faithfulness.

Exo 15:22 So Moses brought Israel from the Red sea, and they went out into the wilderness of Shur; and they went three days in the wilderness, and found no water. Exo 15:23 And when they came to Marah, they could not drink of the waters of Marah, for they were bitter: therefore the name of it was called Marah. Exo 15:24 And the people murmured against Moses, saying, What shall we drink?

Exo 16:2 And the whole congregation of the children of Israel murmured against Moses and Aaron in the wilderness: Exo 16:3 And the children of Israel said unto them, Would to THE ELOHIM we had died by the hand of THE YAHWEH in the land of Egypt, when we sat by the flesh pots, and when we did eat bread to the full; for ye have brought us forth into this wilderness, to kill this whole assembly with hunger.

Exo 17:1 And all the congregation of the children of Israel journeyed from the wilderness of Sin, after their journeys, according to the commandment of THE YAHWEH, and pitched in Rephidim: and there was no water for the people to drink. Exo 17:2 Wherefore the people did chide with Moses, and said, Give us water that we may drink. And Moses said unto them, Why chide ye with me? wherefore do ye tempt THE YAHWEH? Exo 17:3 And the people thirsted there for water; and the people murmured against Moses, and said, Wherefore is this that thou hast brought us up out of Egypt, to kill us and our children and our cattle with thirst? Exo 17:4 And Moses cried unto THE YAHWEH, saying, What shall I do unto this people? they be almost ready to stone me. Exo 17:5 And THE YAHWEH said unto Moses, Go on before the people, and take with thee of the elders of Israel; and thy rod, wherewith thou smotest the river, take in thine hand, and go. Exo 17:6 Behold, I will stand before thee there upon the rock in Horeb; and thou shalt smite the rock, and there shall come water out of it, that the people may drink. And Moses did so in the sight of the elders of Israel. Exo 17:7 And he called the name of the place Massah, and Meribah, because of the chiding of the children of Israel, and because they tempted THE YAHWEH, saying, Is THE YAHWEH among us, or not?

We again bore with them and provided them with water and meat miraculously. Yet again, they doubted Moses and us, and betrayed us by making a molten image of a calf and worshipped it because they presumed that Moses died in the mountain while he went to meet us to receive the Law.

Exo 32:1 And when the people saw that Moses delayed to come down out of the mount, the people gathered themselves together unto Aaron, and said unto him, Up, make us THE ELOHIMs, which shall go before us; for as for this Moses, the man that brought us up out of the land of Egypt, we wot not what is become of him. Exo 32:2 And Aaron said unto them, Break off the golden earrings, which are in the ears of your wives, of your sons, and of your daughters, and bring them unto me. Exo 32:3 And all the people brake off the golden earrings which were in their ears, and brought them unto Aaron. David, would you like to share with Shekinaih how you keep your peace in the tribulation We put you through all these years?

David: Firstly, I will try to anticipate the trouble that THE FATHER has purposed for me to prove me. I will try to see from the Eye of the FATHER and from His Seven Names. (Please refer to Our book "Behold My Messenger 3, Behold My Names")

I try also not to be anxious and think negatively. "For the eyes of THE YAHWEH run to and fro throughout the whole earth, to shew himself strong in the behalf of them whose heart is at peace (H8003) toward him. "

The word Hebrew word "shalem" H8003 is from H7999 "shalam". It means "be at peace". Thus, I said to myself I must believe that THE FATHER is watching me while I am thinking what to do. THE FATHER is ever mindful and overseeing me, looking from above to see whether I will be at peace and really trust Him.
The Verse "To shew Himself strong" means, "He will fight, He will do something". He will send His angels, His people or whatever ways to help me.
This is how I encouraged myself by meditating on the lyrics of this song:
"The eyes of THE YAHWEH run to and fro through the earth to show himself strong in the behalf of them whose heart is at peace with Him.
Acquaint now thyself with Him and be at peace: thereby good shall come unto thee. Acquaint now thyself with Him and be at peace: thereby good shall come unto thee."
Job 22:21 Acquaint now thyself with him, and be at peace: thereby good shall come unto thee.
"Acquaint" means to know and become familiar, something that you are so used to it. I know His style and His ways. I am acquainted with His way of Peace through tribulations.

JESUS: David, you have learned of Me. Our potential Anointed Ones must also remember these Verses from the Book of Jonah. Jonah was in hell (signified by the big fish) for three and a half days. He had a revelation while he was inside the belly of the fish. He made an oath with us to be at peace even in the face of death and because of his vow, he was thrown out of the belly of the fish still living. Jon 2:1 Then Jonah prayed unto THE YAHWEH his ELOHIM out of the fish's belly, Jon 2:2 And said, I cried by reason of mine affliction unto THE YAHWEH, and he heard me; out of the belly of hell cried I, and thou heardest my voice. PART 3 
THE OFFENCE

Act 2 Scene 3 
The Great Offence of THE TRINITY
Time Frame: When you least expected
Location: Everywhere

Lo! And Behold! A man with a giant drill was drilling a hole on the road when the giant bit hit an underground gas pipe causing a gas leakage which kindled an explosion which cause the earth to crack and some part of the road to sink in due to a weakened foundation.

Meanwhile, a truck driver was driving by listening to music on his ear piece who suddenly notice the sink hole could not stopped in time and immediately the truck fell into the sunken hole of the road, with half of the truck body hanging over the crack hole.

In panic, he quickly opened the driver's door and jumped out of the truck and stood on the side of the sunken roadside, and as soon a he jumped out of the truck, the truck plunged headlong into the deep hole which has deepened without warning.

Suddenly, another truck moving at high speed together with a car next to it, drove passed him without braking forced him to duck to his left almost causing him to be knocked down by someone riding a bicycle that passed by. He lost his balance and ended up seated on a curb. In anger, he exclaimed, "Oh! my God! What an evening to start the day", while using his right sleeve to wipe off his profuse perspiration.

As soon as he has finished speaking, a bird's dropping fell on his face that happened to flew over him. Clenching his two fists with steam coming out from his head, he shouted,"Shark! What is happening to me today? What the heck!", he expressed angrily.

Two passersby feeling sorry for him, began to offer tissue paper and wet tissue for him to wipe off the bird's dropping from his face and mouth. Feeling comforted, he wiped the dropping from his face and mouth while the two passersby stretched out their hands to help him stand up. Then, one of the passersby began to pour out a hot cup of coffee from the thermal flask in her handbag and took out a sandwich she has made for herself and said to him, "You have an unexpected day. Drink this hot cup of coffee to sweeten your soul and eat this bread to strengthen yourself for the rest of your day ahead".
She suddenly turned into Shekinaih in her golden Empress robe while his companion turned into Aaron K David 's face in his golden Emperor's robe.
David then patted on his shoulder, started to read Psalms Chapter 23 to encourage him:

Psa 23:1 A Psalm of David. THE YAHWEH is my shepherd; I shall not want. Psa 23:2 He maketh me to lie down in green pastures: he leadeth me beside the still waters. Psa 23:3 He restoreth my soul: he leadeth me in the paths of righteousness for his name's sake. Psa 23:4 Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil: for thou art with me; thy rod and thy staff they comfort me. Psa 23:5 Thou preparest a table before me in the presence of mine enemies: thou anointest my head with oil; my cup runneth over. Psa 23:6 Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me all the days of my life: and I will dwell in the house of THE YAHWEH for ever.

Suddenly, THE TRINITY appeared and stood behind Shekinaih and spoke through her mouth to this man, "What happened to you today is Our great offence, a stone of stumbling to test how you will behave and respond when We put you through this kind of test".
David suddenly upon opening his eyes then realized that he had just seen a vision while in a deep sleep due to tiredness.
JESUS looked at David with love and gently said to him, "Have you refreshed enough to continue with My teaching?" David feeling embarrassed said to JESUS, "Yes LORD, I am ready".
David in curiousity continues in his inquiries…..
