When ye appears, many will be offended. But some of the Brides and the Anointed Ones will be willing to be taught and disciplined by both of you in order to have their self-righteousness, pride and ego crushed. They will then be taken captive and be found fit for the Kingdom of Heaven.

Only those whose hearts are good, honest, truthful, and not jealous and evil speak against both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, The Messenger of truth, will benefit and taste our goodness from Our oracle and grow spiritually unto maturity.

1Pe 2:6 Wherefore also it is contained in the scripture, Behold, I lay in Sion a chief corner stone, elect, precious: and he that believeth on him shall not be confounded.1Pe 2:7 Unto you therefore which believe he is precious: but unto them which be disobedient, the stone which the builders disallowed, the same is made the head of the corner, 1Pe 2:8 And a stone of stumbling, and a rock of offence, even to them which stumble at the oracle (G3056 "logos" something said including the thought) , being disobedient: whereunto also they were appointed. 1Pe 2:9 But ye are a chosen generation, a royal priesthood, an holy nation, a peculiar people; that ye should shew forth the praises of him who hath called you out of darkness into his marvellous light: 1Pe 2:10 Which in time past were not a people, but are now the people of THE ELOHIM: which had not obtained mercy, but now have obtained mercy.
Captive
The people of this age are unaware that they are actually captives to the Diabolos. In one way or the other, they are snared by him and are at his mercy.

2Ti 2:24 And the servant of THE YAHWEH must not strive; but be gentle unto all men, apt to teach, patient, 2Ti 2:25 In meekness instructing those that oppose themselves; if THE ELOHIM peradventure will give them repentance to the acknowledging of the truth; 2Ti 2:26 And that they may recover themselves out of the snare of the Diabolos/Accuser, who are taken captive (G2221 "zogreo" capture alive) by him at his will.
Like the silly women laden with sins mentioned in 2 Timothy 3:6, many of Our children are led captive by his spirit of Lusts.
2Ti 3:6 For of this sort are they which creep into houses, and lead captive silly women laden with sins, led away with divers lusts,

Like the people of this age, many of Our children are still uncircumcised and wise in their own eyes, influenced and energized in the lusts of the flesh and mind by the principalities who have authority over the air.

Eph 2:1 And you hath he quickened, who were dead in trespasses and sins; Eph 2:2 Wherein in time past ye walked according to the age of this Cosmos, according to the prince of the authority of the air, the spirit that now energizing in the children of disobedience: Eph 2:3 Among whom also we all had our conversation in times past in the lusts of our flesh, fulfilling the desires of the flesh and of the mind; and were by nature the children of wrath, even as others.

But in the last days, the captive daughter of Heavenly Zion will no more be uncircumcised or unclean. As incarnated human sojourning in Egypt, which signifies the world, they have been oppressed and are taken captive by the Assyrian, which signifies the Diabolos, through the Antichrist.

But We will change all this for ye shall proclaim the true Gospel of Peace and they will know that We indeed speak through both of you. Our true prophets who are watchmen shall exalt both of you and shall sing for they shall see eye to eye with both of you when We, THE YAHWEH turn back and redeem Heavenly Zion through both of you. We shall made known THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, our holy arm, the deliverer to the eyes of all the nations and to the ends of the earth.

Those who are called to be vessels of mercy shall come out of uncleanness from spiritual Babylon/the world to be perfeced in holiness in the fear of THE YAHWEH by both of you. We, THE YAHWEH will go before them; and ye as the Angel of THE YAHWEH will be their gatherer for us. Ye shall deal prudently and shall be exalted and extolled, and be very high.
Nevertheless, like Me, you shall suffer under the hand of the Antichrist and be tortured and your appearance shall be disfigured like Me more than all the prophets who are the sons of Adam.

Isa 52:1 Awake, awake; put on thy strength, O Zion; put on thy beautiful garments, O Jerusalem, the holy city: for henceforth there shall no more come into thee the uncircumcised and the unclean. Isa 52:2 Shake thyself from the dust; arise, and sit down, O Jerusalem: loose thyself from the bands of thy neck, O captive daughter of Zion. Isa 52:3 For thus saith THE YAHWEH, Ye have sold yourselves for nought; and ye shall be redeemed without money. Isa 52:4 For thus saith THE ADONAI YAHVIH, My people went down aforetime into Egypt to sojourn there; and the Assyrian oppressed them without cause. Isa 52:5 Now therefore, what have I here, saith THE YAHWEH, that my people is taken away for nought? they that rule over them make them to howl, saith THE YAHWEH; and my name continually every day is blasphemed. Isa 52:6 Therefore my people shall know my name: therefore they shall know in that day that I am he that doth speak: behold, it is I. Isa 52:7 How beautiful upon the mountains are the feet of him that bringeth good tidings, that publisheth peace; that bringeth good tidings of good, that publisheth salvation; that saith unto Zion, Thy ELOHIM reigneth! Isa 52:8 Thy watchmen shall lift up the voice; with the voice together shall they sing: for they shall see eye to eye, when THE YAHWEH shall bring again Zion. Isa 52:9 Break forth into joy, sing together, ye waste places of Jerusalem: for THE YAHWEH hath comforted his people, he hath redeemed Jerusalem. Isa 52:10 THE YAHWEH hath made bare his holy arm in the eyes of all the nations; and all the ends of the earth shall see the salvation of our ELOHIM. Isa 52:11 Depart ye, depart ye, go ye out from thence, touch no unclean thing; go ye out of the midst of her; be ye clean, that bear the vessels of THE YAHWEH. Isa 52:12 For ye shall not go out with haste, nor go by flight: for THE YAHWEH will go before you; and the THE ELOHIM of Israel will be your gatherer (H622 "asaph"). Isa 52:13 Behold, my servant shall deal prudently, he shall be exalted and extolled, and be very high. Isa 52:14 As many were astonied at thee; his visage was so marred more than any man, and his form more than the sons of men: Isa 52:15 So shall he sprinkle many nations; the kings shall shut their mouths at him: for that which had not been told them shall they see; and that which they had not heard shall they consider.

As The Angel of Our Presence who went before the Israelites marching through the wilderness, you shall as the teacher of righteousness with your prophetic rain of doctrine establish Our inheritance, the Heavenly Zion, when they are weary and train them and thereafter send them to proclaim the true gospel to the lowly. These are the Children of THE HOLY SPIRIT consisting of 144,000 redeemed Virgin Brides signified by the silver wings of a dove and the 7,000 Anointed Ones are signified by the yellow gold wings of a dove. They will be given authority as kings to rule after their glorification. They are the type and shadow of the chariots of THE ELOHIM that are partly made up of the Four Living Creatures. Their ordination will happen after you as The Angel of THE YAHWEH has been caught up to meet THE FATHER and given the authority to sit on your preordained throne. After which, you shall come down bearing The Name of THE EL and set our rebellious children who are in captivity free; from the lusts of the flesh and mind. Then, you shall make them captives to us by disciplining them, showing them the Way of THE YAHWEH, and giving them the gifts and empowerment to function as Apostles, Prophets, Evangelists and Pastors/Teachers.

Psa 68:7 O THE ELOHIM, when thou wentest forth before thy people, when thou didst march through the wilderness; Selah: Psa 68:8 The earth shook, the heavens also dropped at The Presence of THE ELOHIM: even Sinai itself was moved at The Presence of THE ELOHIM, THE ELOHIM of Israel. Psa 68:9 Thou, O THE ELOHIM, didst send a plentiful (H5071 "nedabah" spontaneous} rain, whereby thou didst confirm thine inheritance, when it was weary. Psa 68:10 Thy congregation hath dwelt therein: thou, O THE ELOHIM, hast prepared of thy goodness for the poor. Psa 68:11 THE ADONAI gave the speech: great was the company of those that published it. Psa 68:12 Kings of armies did flee apace: and she that tarried at home divided the spoil. Psa 68:13 Though ye have lien among the pots, yet shall ye be as the wings of a dove covered with silver, and her feathers with yellow gold. Psa 68:14 When THE SHADDAI scattered kings in it, it was white as snow in Salmon. Psa 68:15 The mountain of THE ELOHIM is as the mountain of Bashan; an high hill as the hill of Bashan. Psa 68:16 Why leap ye, ye high mountain s? this is the mountain which THE ELOHIMdesireth to dwell in; yea, THE YAHWEH will dwell in it for ever. Psa 68:17 The chariots of THE ELOHIM are twenty thousand, even thousands of angels: THE ADONAI is among them, as in Sinai, in the holy place. Psa 68:18 Thou hast ascended on high, thou hast led captivity captive (H7617 "shabah"): thou hast received gifts for men; yea, for the rebellious also, that THE YAH ELOHIM might dwell among them. Psa 68:19 Blessed be THE ADONAI, who daily loadeth us with benefits, even THE EL of our salvation. Selah. Psa 68:20 He that is our EL is THE EL of salvation; and unto YAHVIH THE ADONAI belong the issues from death.

Like Paul, they have become Our prisoners. Like the Four Living Creatures that Ezekiel saw, they will walk in unity following the direction of THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE. In walking worthily of their vocation wherewith they are called, they will be lowly and meek. They have suffered long in their tribulations and persecutions and are now walking in love endeavoring to keep the unity of the spirit in the bond of peace. They have been completed by THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, to stand in their respective function for the edification of the body of Christ before their glorification.

Eph 4:1 I therefore, the prisoner of THE YAHWEH, beseech you that ye walk worthy of the vocation wherewith ye are called, Eph 4:2 With all lowliness and meekness, with longsuffering, forbearing one another in love; Eph 4:3 Endeavouring to keep the unity of the Spirit in the bond of peace. Eph 4:4 There is one body, and one Spirit, even as ye are called in one hope of your calling; Eph 4:5 One Lord, one faith, one baptism, Eph 4:6 One THE ELOHIM and Father of all, who is above all, and through all, and in you all. Eph 4:7 But unto every one of us is given grace according to the measure of the gift of Christ. Eph 4:8 Wherefore he saith, When he ascended up on high, he led captivity captive, and gave gifts unto men. Eph 4:9 (Now that he ascended, what is it but that he also descended first into the lower parts of the earth? Eph 4:10 He that descended is the same also that ascended up far above all heavens, that he might complete all.) Eph 4:11 And he gave some, apostles; and some, prophets; and some, evangelists; and some, pastors and teachers; Eph 4:12 For the perfecting of the saints, for the work of the ministry, for the edifying of the body of Christ: Eph 4:13 Till we all come in the unity of the faith, and of the knowledge of the Son of THE ELOHIM, unto a perfect man, unto the measure of the stature of the fulness of a Christ: Eph 4:14 That we henceforth be no more children, tossed to and fro, and carried about with every wind of doctrine, by the sleight of men, and cunning craftiness, whereby they lie in wait to deceive; Eph 4:15 But speaking the truth in love, may grow up into him in all things, which is the head, even CHRIST: Eph 4:16 From whom the whole body fitly joined together and compacted by that which every joint supplieth, according to the effectual working in the measure of every part, maketh increase of the body unto the edifying of itself in love.

Psalms 69 vividly describes the tribulations that Our last days' Shoshannim/Lilies Brides have to go through as Our prisoners as they follow both of you. The Diabolos will hate them without a cause and persecute them wrongfully through the waters of different races of nations (Rev 12:15 Rev 17:15). They will be charged of stealing and have to restore that which they have not taken. They will be insulted and shamed and their siblings will break their ties of relation with them for fear of troubles. Their hearts will be broken by shame and they will find no comforters in depression. In the tribulations, both of you who bears Our Names will be their deliverer and set them on high from their persecutors. Out of gratefulness, they will praise and magnify both of you with thanksgiving. We, THE YAHWEH shall hears the lowly and despises not Our prisoners; We will save Heavenly Zion and will build the Heavenly Jerusalem that they may dwell there, and have it in possession. Their seed also shall inherit it; and they that love both of you who bear Our Names shall dwell therein.

Psa 69:1 To the chief Musician upon Shoshannim (H7799 "shoshan" lily), A Psalm of David. Save me, O THE ELOHIM; for the waters are come in unto my soul. Psa 69:2 I sink in deep mire, where there is no standing: I am come into deep waters, where the floods overflow me. Psa 69:3 I am weary of my crying: my throat is dried: mine eyes fail while I wait for my THE ELOHIM. Psa 69:4 They that hate me without a cause are more than the hairs of mine head: they that would destroy me, being mine enemies wrongfully, are mighty: then I restored that which I took not away. Psa 69:5 O THE ELOHIM, thou knowest my foolishness; and my sins are not hid from thee. Psa 69:6 Let not them that wait on thee, O THE ADONAI YAHVIH SABAOTH, be ashamed for my sake: let not those that seek thee be confounded for my sake, O THE ELOHIM of Israel. Psa 69:7 Because for thy sake I have borne reproach; shame hath covered my face. Psa 69:8 I am become a stranger unto my brethren, and an alien unto my mother's children. Psa 69:9 For the zeal of thine house hath eaten me up; and the reproaches of them that reproached thee are fallen upon me. Psa 69:10 When I wept, and chastened my soul with fasting, that was to my reproach. Psa 69:11 I made sackcloth also my garment; and I became a proverb to them. Psa 69:12 They that sit in the gate speak against me; and I was the song of the drunkards. Psa 69:13 But as for me, my prayer is unto thee, O THE YAHWEH, in an acceptable time: O THE ELOHIM, in the multitude of thy mercy hear me, in the truth of thy salvation. Psa 69:14 Deliver me out of the mire, and let me not sink: let me be delivered from them that hate me, and out of the deep waters. Psa 69:15 Let not the waterflood overflow me, neither let the deep swallow me up, and let not the pit shut her mouth upon me. Psa 69:16 Hear me, O THE YAHWEH; for thy lovingkindness is good: turn unto me according to the multitude of thy tender mercies. Psa 69:17 And hide not thy face from thy servant; for I am in trouble: hear me speedily. Psa 69:18 Draw nigh unto my soul, and redeem it: deliver me because of mine enemies. Psa 69:19 Thou hast known my reproach, and my shame, and my dishonour: mine adversaries are all before thee. Psa 69:20 Reproach hath broken my heart; and I am full of heaviness: and I looked for some to take pity, but there was none; and for comforters, but I found none. Psa 69:21 They gave me also gall for my meat; and in my thirst they gave me vinegar to drink. Psa 69:22 Let their table become a snare before them: and that which should have been for their welfare, let it become a trap. Psa 69:23 Let their eyes be darkened, that they see not; and make their loins continually to shake. Psa 69:24 Pour out thine indignation upon them, and let thy wrathful anger take hold of them. Psa 69:25 Let their habitation be desolate; and let none dwell in their tents. Psa 69:26 For they persecute him whom thou hast smitten; and they talk to the grief of those whom thou hast wounded. Psa 69:27 Add iniquity unto their iniquity: and let them not come into thy righteousness. Psa 69:28 Let them be blotted out of the book of the living, and not be written with the righteous. Psa 69:29 But I am poor and sorrowful: let thy salvation, O THE ELOHIM, set me up on high. Psa 69:30 I will praise the name of THE ELOHIM with a song, and will magnify him with thanksgiving. Psa 69:31 This also shall please THE YAHWEH better than an ox or bullock that hath horns and hoofs. Psa 69:32 The humble shall see this, and be glad: and your heart shall live that seek THE ELOHIM. Psa 69:33 For THE YAHWEH heareth the poor, and despiseth not his prisoners. Psa 69:34 Let the heaven and earth praise him, the seas, and every thing that moveth therein. Psa 69:35 For THE ELOHIM will save Zion, and will build the cities of Judah: that they may dwell there, and have it in possession. Psa 69:36 The seed also of his servants shall inherit it: and they that love his name shall dwell therein.

Psalms 79 is a prophecy regarding the Anointed Ones who are the real temple of THE ELOHIM (1Cor 3:16). They will be scorned, derided and killed for bearing testimony to the resurrection of THE CHRIST. Their dead bodies will not be buried but will be defiled by the fowls of the heaven and beasts of the earth as they feed on them. THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, the deliverer, The Angel of Our Presence, to resurrect them (Rev 11:1-19); and will avenge their blood that have been shed in Our sight. For We have heard the sighing of His prisoners and We will preserve those that are appointed to die by resurrecting them according to the greatness of Our power.

Psa 79:1 A Psalm of Asaph. O THE ELOHIM, the heathen are come into thine inheritance; thy holy temple have they defiled; they have laid Jerusalem on heaps. Psa 79:2 The dead bodies of thy servants have they given to be meat unto the fowls of the heaven, the flesh of thy saints unto the beasts of the earth. Psa 79:3 Their blood have they shed like water round about Jerusalem; and there was none to bury them. Psa 79:4 We are become a reproach to our neighbours, a scorn and derision to them that are round about us. Psa 79:5 How long? wilt thou be angry for ever? shall thy jealousy burn like fire? Psa 79:6 Pour out thy wrath upon the heathen that have not known thee, and upon the kingdoms that have not called upon thy name. Psa 79:7 For they have devoured Jacob, and laid waste his dwelling place. Psa 79:8 O remember not against us former iniquities: let thy tender mercies speedily prevent us: for we are brought very low. Psa 79:9 Help us, O THE ELOHIM of our salvation, for the glory of thy name: and deliver us, and purge away our sins, for thy name's sake. Psa 79:10 Wherefore should the heathen say, Where is their THE ELOHIM? let him be known among the heathen in our sight by the revenging of the blood of thy servants which is shed. Psa 79:11 Let the sighing of the prisoner come before thee; according to the greatness of thy power preserve thou those that are appointed to die; Psa 79:12 And render unto our neighbours sevenfold into their bosom their reproach, wherewith they have reproached thee, O THE YAHWEH. Psa 79:13 So we thy people and sheep of thy pasture will give thee thanks for ever: we will shew forth thy praise to all generations.

Chapter 2 
Offences in the New Testament
JESUS as an Offence
David: LORD JESUS, the word "offence" G4624 "skandalizo" according to Thayer Definition is:
1.To put stumbling block or impediment in the way, upon which another may trip and fall, metaphorically to offend
2. To seduce or entice them to sin, to miss the mark; and
3. To cause a person to begin to distrust and desert one whom he ought to trust and obey.
Why do you affirmed that it is necessary for offences to come?

JESUS: We use offences to offend one's mind in order to expose what lies beneath one's heart. This is Our mirror to let one realise what lies within his/her heart. One need to acknowledge what lies within oneself and repents and cries towards us (Shekinaih and Aaron K David representing us) if one wants to be delivered from this stronghold thoroughly.

I always speak in parables regarding the Kingdom of Heaven like "Whosoever eat My flesh and drink My blood, hath eternal life; and I will raise him up at the last day" or " What and if ye shall see the Son of Adam ascend up where he was before?", and made all kinds of statements that perplexed and offended many and resulted in them not following Me. I spoke in parables purposely knowing that unless My FATHER reveal to them the meaning, and they are given to Me by THE FATHER, they will definitely be offended and stop following Me. All that the Father giveth Me shall come to Me; and him that cometh to Me I will in no wise cast out (Joh 6:37. As it is written in the prophets, and they shall be all taught of THE ELOHIM. Every man therefore that hath heard, and hath learned of the Father, cometh unto Me (Joh 6:45) . Simon Peter hath learned of My FATHER when he answered Me and said, "Thou art the Christ, the Son of the living THE ELOHIM" for flesh and blood hath not revealed it unto him, but My Father which is in heaven (Mat 16:16-17).

Joh 6:54 Whoso eateth my flesh, and drinketh my blood, hath eternal life; and I will raise him up at the last day. Joh 6:55 For my flesh is meat indeed, and my blood is drink indeed. Joh 6:56 He that eateth my flesh, and drinketh my blood, dwelleth in me, and I in him. Joh 6:57 As the living Father hath sent me, and I live by the Father: so he that eateth me, even he shall live by me. Joh 6:58 This is that bread which came down from heaven: not as your fathers did eat manna, and are dead: he that eateth of this bread shall live forever. Joh 6:59 These things said he in the synagogue, as he taught in Capernaum. Joh 6:60 Many therefore of his disciples, when they had heard this, said, This is a hard saying; who can hear it? Joh 6:61 When JESUS knew in himself that his disciples murmured at it, he said unto them, Doth this offend you? Joh 6:62 What and if ye shall see the Son of Adam ascend up where he was before? Joh 6:63 It is the spirit that quickeneth; the flesh profiteth nothing: the words that I speak unto you, they are spirit, and they are life. Joh 6:64 But there are some of you that believe not. For JESUS knew from the beginning who they were that believed not, and who should betray him. Joh 6:65 And he said, Therefore said I unto you, that no man can come unto me, except it were given unto him of my Father. Joh 6:66 From that time many of his disciples went back, and walked no more with him. Joh 6:67 Then said JESUS unto the twelve, Will ye also go away? Joh 6:68 Then Simon Peter answered him, YAHWEH, to whom shall we go? thou hast the words of eternal life. Joh 6:69 And we believe and are sure that thou art that THE CHRIST, the Son of the living ELOHIM. Joh 6:70 JESUS answered them, Have not I chosen you twelve, and one of you is a Diabolos? Joh 6:71 He spake of Judas Iscariot the son of Simon: for he it was that should betray him, being one of the twelve.

Simon Peter has the revelation that I am THE CHRIST, the Anointed One, and has the words of eternal life. Peter knew that he also was the son of Adam, called to be a Christ and knew there was no other way he could go. He had become a captive.
My FATHER used Me as an offence to sift those who are called by Him. I only did what I saw My FATHER do and spoke what He wanted Me to speak.

Joh 5:19 Then answered JESUS and said unto them, Verily, verily, I say unto you, The Son can do nothing of himself, but what he seeth the Father do: for what things soever he doeth, these also doeth the Son likewise.
Joh 5:30 I can of mine own self do nothing: as I hear, I judge: and my judgment is just; because I seek not mine own will, but the will of the Father which hath sent me.
Offences through Teachings

Our last days' teachings through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT by Us, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, shall cause a lot of offences to many people in Christendom. According to traditional teachings, The Messiah (Saviour) that is to come in the last days is one person. But it is prophesied in the Book of Obadiah, in the last days there will be many.
Oba 1:21 And saviours shall come up on mount Zion to judge the mount of Esau; and the kingdom shall be THE YAHWEH'S.

The deliverers from Obadiah are also referred to as the Gentiles which are from Heavenly Zion mentioned in Romans 11:25-26. They will be sent to turn away ungodliness from Israel in the flesh. As We have saith also in Hosea, I will call them My people, which were not My people; and her beloved, which was not beloved. And it shall come to pass, that in the place where it was said unto them, Ye are not My people; there shall they be called the children of the living THE ELOHIM.

Rom 11:25 For I would not, brethren, that ye should be ignorant of this mystery, lest ye should be wise in your own conceits; that blindness in part is happened to Israel, until the fulness of the Gentiles be come in. Rom 11:26 And so all Israel shall be saved: as it is written, There shall come out of Sion the Deliverer, and shall turn away ungodliness from Jacob: Rom 11:27 For this is my covenant unto them, when I shall take away their sins. Rom 11:28 As concerning the gospel, they are enemies for your sakes: but as touching the election, they are beloved for the fathers' sakes. Rom 11:29 For the gifts and calling of THE ELOHIM are without repentance. Rom 11:30 For as ye in times past have not believed THE ELOHIM, yet have now obtained mercy through their unbelief: Rom 11:31 Even so have these also now not believed, that through your mercy they also may obtain mercy. Rom 11:32 For THE ELOHIM hath concluded them all in unbelief, that he might have mercy upon all. Rom 11:33 O the depth of the riches both of the wisdom and knowledge of THE ELOHIM! how unsearchable are his judgments, and his ways past finding out!

John the Baptist was also mentally and emotionally squeezed by the offence of THE FATHER. On one hand, he told his disciples that I am the Lamb of THE ELOHIM. On the other hand, he asked his disciples to ask Me whether I am the One to come seeing I ate and drank with publicans and sinners like glutton and winebibber; unlike him who fast often and consecrate himself.
Mat 11:2 Now when John had heard in the prison the works of CHRIST, he sent two of his disciples,
Mat 11:3 And said unto him, Art thou he that should come, or do we look for another?
The same thing will happen to many in the last days who will be offended with THE SHE/HE,

THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, who be The Moses and The Elijah that is to come. Together with the children whom We have given ye, are for signs which many will wonder. And when ye proclaim the coming of the Kingdom of Heaven, not many will rejoice. When ye warn of the coming judgment, not many will take it seriously and lament. Like John and Me, ye will also be an offence and rejected by those whom We have sent you.

Mat 11:4 JESUS answered and said unto them, Go and shew John again those things which ye do hear and see: Mat 11:5 The blind receive their sight, and the lame walk, the lepers are cleansed, and the deaf hear, the dead are raised up, and the poor have the gospel preached to them. Mat 11:6 And blessed is he, whosoever shall not be offended in me. Mat 11:7 And as they departed, JESUS began to say unto the multitudes concerning John, What went ye out into the wilderness to see? A reed shaken with the wind? Mat 11:8 But what went ye out for to see? A man clothed in soft raiment? behold, they that wear soft clothing are in kings' houses. Mat 11:9 But what went ye out for to see? A prophet? yea, I say unto you, and more than a prophet. Mat 11:10 For this is he, of whom it is written, Behold, I send my messenger before thy face, which shall prepare thy way before thee. Mat 11:11 Verily I say unto you, Among them that are born of women there hath not risen a greater than John the Baptist: notwithstanding he that is least in the Kingdom of Heaven is greater than he. Mat 11:12 And from the days of John the Baptist until now the Kingdom of Heaven suffereth violence, and the violent take it by force. Mat 11:13 For all the prophets and the law prophesied until John. Mat 11:14 And if ye will receive it, this is Elias, which was for to come. Mat 11:15 He that hath ears to hear, let him hear. Mat 11:16 But whereunto shall I liken this generation? It is like unto children sitting in the markets, and calling unto their fellows, Mat 11:17 And saying, we have piped unto you, and ye have not danced; we have mourned unto you, and ye have not lamented. Mat 11:18 For John came neither eating nor drinking, and they say, He hath a devil. When My FATHER chooses His anointed to represent Him, He does not see the way men see. Men would choose those who are full of wisdom, mighty and noble, but My FATHER chooses those who are broken and humble. He searches the heart and try their thoughts.

My FATHER did not call many who are wise, mighty and noble, but instead chose many that looked foolish, weak, and base, and are despised by the world. He did this so that no one should boast in the flesh but in THE YAHWEH.

1Co 1:26 For ye see your calling, brethren, how that not many wise men after the flesh, not many mighty, not many noble, are called: 1Co 1:27 But THE ELOHIM hath chosen the foolish things of the world to confound the wise; and THE ELOHIM hath chosen the weak things of the world to confound the things which are mighty; 1Co 1:28 And base things of the world, and things which are despised, hath THE ELOHIM chosen, yea, and things which are not, to bring to nought things that are: 1Co 1:29 That no flesh should glory in his presence. 1Co 1:30 But of him are ye in CHRIST JESUS, who of THE ELOHIM is made unto us wisdom, and righteousness, and sanctification, and redemption: 1Co 1:31 That, according as it is written, He that glorieth, let him glory in THE YAHWEH.

Mat 13:20 But he that received the seed into stony places, the same is he that heareth the oracle (G3056 "logos" something said including the thought) , and anon with joy receiveth it; Mat 13:21 Yet hath he not root in himself, but dureth for a while: for when tribulation or persecution ariseth because of the oracle, by and by he is offended.

Luk 17:1 Then said he unto the disciples, It is impossible but that offences will come: but woe unto him, through whom they come! Luk 17:2 It were better for him that a millstone were hanged about his neck, and he cast into the sea, than that he should offend one of these little ones. Luk 17:3 Take heed to yourselves: If thy brother trespass against thee, rebuke him; and if he repent, forgive him. Luk 17:7 But which of you, having a servant plowing or feeding cattle, will say unto him by and by, when he is come from the field, Go and sit down to meat? Luk 17:8 And will not rather say unto him, Make ready wherewith I may sup, and gird thyself, and serve me, till I have eaten and drunken; and afterward thou shalt eat and drink? I have once used this story to talk about offences. The master commanded his servant to prepare food for him to eat. When the master is done, he did not thank the servant. But the servant instead replied to him that it was his duty to serve him. He was not offended.

Sometimes, when My FATHER asked one to do many things, one expected appreciation, reward or honour from Him. But instead, he received none of them and was offended and angry. One should not have this mentality of receiving gratification and reward from others whom we have served. Our reward is from THE FATHER who sees our works in secret and will reward us openly in its due time as We continue to humble ourselves before the Most High. Like Mordecai, who was paraded publicly clothed with the king's apparel and the king's royal crown riding on the king's horse, we shall also be clothed with the glory, crowned with the crown of glory, paraded as the armies which are in heaven that followed Me in The Angel of My Presence upon white horses, and clothed in fine linen, white and clean, if we are not offended with what seemingly to be delaying in Our restoration (Rev 19:14)
Everyone needs to come out of these offences. One should instead have this mentality of lowliness of mind and confess this to THE FATHER:

"I am doing what you have commanded me because I am your unprofitable servant. You have called me. You have chosen me. You have given me all the grace to do all these works, to sacrifice and to obey. As long as I hold on to my hope and not be offended, what you have promised will surely come to pass".
David, what is your conviction regarding us using Shekinaih as offences to you?

JESUS: David, below are three steps you should take to avoid being offended by My FATHER'S testings.
How Not to Be Offended

Psa 119:164 Seven times a day do I praise thee because of thy righteous judgments. Psa 119:165 Great peace has they which love thy law: and nothing shall offend them. Psa 119:166 THE YAHWEH, I have hoped for thy salvation, and done thy commandments

Step 1: Every time when you feel offended, remind yourself that you must keep your peace and not to be stirred up in anger so that you will not give a place to the accuser to cause you to evil speak and sin. Always praise THE FATHER and remind yourself that His Name, THE YAHWEH, is merciful, righteous and just, and He is using offences to test you in order to promote you. Therefore, you ought to be thankful to Him for giving you the opportunity to produce the fruit of the Spirit.

Step 2: Always remind yourself to be grateful and love and treasure the discipline and teaching of THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih and obey her command for My FATHER has put His Name in her. In so doing, you shall obtain great peace and nothing shall offend you for she will be an enemy unto your enemies and an adversary unto your adversaries.

Exo 23:20 Behold, I send an Angel before thee, to keep thee in the way, and to bring thee into the place which I have prepared. Exo 23:21 Beware of him, and obey his voice, provoke him not; for he will not pardon your transgressions: for my name is in him. Exo 23:22 But if thou shalt indeed obey his voice, and do all that I speak; then I will be an enemy unto thine enemies, and an adversary unto thine adversaries. Exo 23:23 in For mine Angel shall go before thee, and bring thee in unto the Amorites, and the Hittites, and the Perizzites, and the Canaanites, the Hivites, and the Jebusites: and I will cut them off.
Step 3: Always remind yourself of the Seven Offences of THE ADONAI and always keep your peace so as not to be defiled by the spirit of bitterness, discouragement and unbelief.

The Seven Squeezes of THE ADONAI 
The ADONAI's TestS
David: LORD JESUS, can you expound to me the seven offences of Their Name, THE ADONAI?
JESUS: The offences of THE FATHER through The Name, THE ADONAI, come in seven areas:
1) Financial squeeze
2) Physical squeeze
3) Mental squeeze
4) Emotional squeeze
5) Ridiculous/Absurd squeeze
6) Impossible logic/Rational squeeze
7) Completely out of this world squeeze
1) Financial Squeeze

During a famine, My FATHER, through His Name, THE ADONAI, through Elijah financially squeezed a widow woman of Zarephath of her only morsel of bread that she planned to eat with her child before they starve to death. Because she trusted in Elijah even though he was a stranger, THE ADONAI overturned her dire situation and provided her and her child with food throughout the three years of famine by multiplying her flour and oil. Many of Our children have been squeezed financially in their tithes and offerings by THE FATHER, but as they obey, We will see them through. THE FATHER usually increases their income so that they did not actually feel the squeeze at all, though they felt straitened in the beginning. Indeed, THE FATHER is faithful, and will not suffer them to be tempted above that they are able to bear; but will with the testing also make a way for them to escape, that they may be able to bear it. (1 Cor 10:13)

1Ki 17:8 And the word of THE YAHWEH came unto him, saying, 1Ki 17:9 Arise, get thee to Zarephath, which belongeth to Zidon, and dwell there: behold, I have commanded a widow woman there to sustain thee. 1Ki 17:10 So he arose and went to Zarephath. And when he came to the gate of the city, behold, the widow woman was there gathering of sticks: and he called to her, and said, Fetch me, I pray thee, a little water in a vessel, that I may drink. 1Ki 17:11 And as she was going to fetch it, he called to her, and said, Bring me, I pray thee, a morsel of bread in thine hand. 1Ki 17:12 And she said, As THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM liveth, I have not a cake, but an handful of meal in a barrel, and a little oil in a cruse: and, behold, I am gathering two sticks, that I may go in and dress it for me and my son, that we may eat it, and die. 1Ki 17:13 And Elijah said unto her, Fear not; go and do as thou hast said: but make me thereof a little cake first, and bring it unto me, and after make for thee and for thy son. 1Ki 17:14 For thus saith THE YAHWEH ELOHIM of Israel, The barrel of meal shall not waste, neither shall the cruse of oil fail, until the day that THE YAHWEH sendeth rain upon the earth. 1Ki 17:15 And she went and did according to the saying of Elijah: and she, and he, and her house, did eat many days. 1Ki 17:16 And the barrel of meal wasted not, neither did the cruse of oil fail, according to the word of THE YAHWEH, which he spake by Elijah.

There was a time, a rich young man approached Me and asked Me how he could inherit eternal life. I told him to sell whatsoever he had and give it to the poor and take up the cross and follow Me in exchange for the treasure in heaven. He went away grieving for he could not give up his great possessions. Mar 10:21 Then JESUS beholding him loved him, and said unto him, One thing thou lackest: go thy way, sell whatsoever thou hast, and give to the poor, and thou shalt have treasure in heaven: and come, take up the cross, and follow me. Mar 10:22 And he was sad at that saying, and went away grieved: for he had great possessions. Mar 10:24 And the disciples were astonished at his words. But JESUS answereth again, and saith unto them, Children, how hard is it for them that trust in riches to enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM! Mar 10:26 And they were astonished out of measure, saying among themselves, Who then can be saved? Mar 10:29 And JESUS answered and said, Verily I say unto you, There is no man that hath left house, or brethren, or sisters, or father, or mother, or wife, or children, or lands, for my sake, and the gospel's, Mar 10:30 But he shall receive an hundredfold now in this time, houses, and brethren, and sisters, and mothers, and children, and lands, with persecutions; and in the world to come eternal life. Mar 10:31 But many that are first shall be last; and the last first.

Like Barnabas, they will gladly sell their land, bring the money, and lay them at the feet of the apostles of the true church as they witness Our great power through THE SHE/HE THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE.

Act 4:33 And with great power gave the apostles witness of the resurrection of THE YAHWEH JESUS: and great grace was upon them all. 2) Physical Squeeze
Elijah was squeezed by us physically when he was asked to ascend to Horeb, the mount of THE ELOHIM, after taking his last meal. The journey took him 40 days.

1Ki 19:1 And Ahab told Jezebel all that Elijah had done, and withal how he had slain all the prophets with the sword. 1Ki 19:2 Then Jezebel sent a messenger unto Elijah, saying, So let the gods do to me, and more also, if I make not thy life as the life of one of them by tomorrow about this time. 1Ki 19:3 And when he saw that, he arose, and went for his life, and came to Beersheba, which belongeth to Judah, and left his servant there. 1Ki 19:4 But he himself went a day's journey into the wilderness, and came and sat down under a juniper tree: and he requested for himself that he might die; and said, It is enough; now, O THE YAHWEH, take away my life; for I am not better than my fathers. 1Ki 19:5 And as he lay and slept under a juniper tree, behold, then an angel touched him, and said unto him, Arise and eat. 1Ki 19:6 And he looked, and, behold, there was a cake baken on the coals, and a cruse of water at his head. David, would you like to share with Shekinaih your experience on the squeezes of THE FATHER in your early years of His discipline?

David: I could recall how THE FATHER squeezed me physically when I first came back to THE YAHWEH 20 years ago. In the first two years, I was asked to fast often. For the first time, I also marveled at my self-restraint for a person who loves food. Indeed, THE FATHER will not overwhelm us with testings that We are not able to bear but will help us to overcome it by giving us the grace to do it if we humble ourselves and submit to His discipline.

I still could remember many times I had sinned against THE FATHER and was commanded by Him through the word of knowledge given to you to do push-ups one thousand times as fruit meet for repentance. In the beginning, I would gainsay and reason with you that this was impossible and this demand was not from THE FATHER and I would lose my peace. However, after some struggles, I would be convicted that I have indeed sinned and need to humble myself and submit to His discipline. So I yielded. As I was doing the push-ups and counting the impossible endeavor, you would suddenly stop me and tell me that you have heard THE FATHER says: "It is enough, he has passed the test of lowliness of mind and walking in truth." At those moments, I would always be convicted and comforted that THE FATHER is righteous and just. Indeed, THE FATHER has made me to know His way. For the past 7 years, THE FATHER has been using you to humble and break me and I am grateful for the intense chastening though at times I had felt bitter against you and accused you often for debasing me. In the past, when THE FATHER humbled me by persecution and tribulation through others, I would always avoid them so that I would not be afflicted as it is very painful to be broken by reproach. But now, He has intensified my breaking and I am still trying to get used to the offences that He uses you to break my pride, ego and self-righteousness.
3) Mental Squeeze

JESUS: Bravo! Bravo! Bravo!, you have crossed the Red Sea of impossiblilities and have come forth as gold. What you go through, others have to follow your footsteps. (JESUS patted on David's shoulder and then put His arm around his shoulder. JESUS then continued expounding.)

Ezekiel was mentally squeezed by us when he was asked to eat bread that was made from a mixture of wheat, beans, lentils, millet and fitches mixed with cow's dung. He was to eat by weight 226 grams a day for 390 days and drink water by measure. At first, he was asked to mix them with human's dung but upon his protest, we substituted it with cow's dung. This was to signify that the Children of Israel shall eat their defiled bread among the Gentiles where they were driven. They shall eat bread by weight, and with care; and they shall drink water by measure, and with astonishment: that they may want bread and water, and be astonished one with another, and consume away for their iniquity. In the beginning, as a priest, he was struggling with his theologian's mind as this is contrary to the law of uncleanness but at last he overcame it.

Eze 4:9 Take thou also unto thee wheat, and barley, and beans, and lentiles, and millet, and fitches, and put them in one vessel, and make thee bread thereof, according to the number of the days that thou shalt lie upon thy side, three hundred and ninety days shalt thou eat thereof. Eze 4:10 And thy meat which thou shalt eat shall be by weight, twenty shekels a day: from time to time shalt thou eat it. Eze 4:11 Thou shalt drink also water by measure, the sixth part of an hin: from time to time shalt thou drink. Eze 4:12 And thou shalt eat it as barley cakes, and thou shalt bake it with dung that cometh out of man, in their sight. Eze 4:13 And THE YAHWEH said, Even thus shall the children of Israel eat their defiled bread among the Gentiles, whither I will drive them. Eze 4:14 Then said I, Ah THE ADONAI YAHVIH! behold, my soul hath not been polluted: for from my youth up even till now have I not eaten of that which dieth of itself, or is torn in pieces; neither came there abominable flesh into my mouth. Eze 4:15 Then he said unto me, Lo, I have given thee cow's dung for man's dung, and thou shalt prepare thy bread therewith. Eze 4:16 Moreover he said unto me, Son of Adam, behold, I will break the staff of bread in Jerusalem: and they shall eat bread by weight, and with care; and they shall drink water by measure, and with astonishment: Eze 4:17 That they may want bread and water, and be astonied one with another, and consume away for their iniquity.

Isaiah was also mentally squeezed by us when he was commanded to walk naked and barefoot for 3 years to signify the captivity of Egypt and Ethiopia by the King of Assyria. He fasted for days and nights to confirm , double confirm,and triple confirm that he was hearing from us correctly. He gave in to us at last and resigned to his fate to be a sign to be wondered in order to deliver Our message and to make a spiritual proclaimation through this prophetic act.

Isa 20:1 In the year that Tartan came unto Ashdod, (when Sargon the king of Assyria sent him,) and fought against Ashdod, and took it; Isa 20:2 At the same time spake THE YAHWEH by Isaiah the son of Amoz, saying, Go and loose the sackcloth from off thy loins, and put off thy shoe from thy foot. Isa 20:5 And they shall be afraid and ashamed of Ethiopia their expectation, and of Egypt their glory. JESUS: THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and Myself applaud to your getting it at last after much struggles. Once you are recovered by us, you must recover others.
