After hearing that it is impossible for someone who trusts in riches to enter into the Kingdom of THE ELOHIM, they said among themselves in their astonishment: "Who then can be saved?" This is what all My true disciples will experience when they decide to follow Me. They will all be squeezed ridiculously like: forsaking their house, or brethren, or sisters, or father, or mother, or wife, or children, or lands for My sake and for the Gospel's sake even to the extent of forsaking their life.

Mar 10:23 And JESUS looked round about, and saith unto his disciples, How hardly shall they that have riches enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM! Mar 10:24 And the disciples were astonished at his words. But JESUS answereth again, and saith unto them, Children, how hard is it for them that trust in riches to enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM! Mar 10:25 It is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle, than for a rich man to enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM. Mar 10:26 And they were astonished out of measure, saying among themselves, Mar 10:27 And JESUS looking upon them saith, With men it is impossible, but not with THE ELOHIM: for with THE ELOHIM all things are possible. Mar 10:28 Then Peter began to say unto him, Lo, we have left all, and have followed thee. Mar 10:29 And JESUS answered and said, Verily I say unto you, There is no man that hath left house, or brethren, or sisters, or father, or mother, or wife, or children, or lands, for my sake, and the gospel's, Mar 10:30 But he shall receive an hundredfold now in this time, houses, and brethren, and sisters, and mothers, and children, and lands, with persecutions; and in the world to come eternal life. Mar 10:31 But many that are first shall be last; and the last first.
6) Impossible Squeeze

On one occasion, My disciples felt Our impossible squeeze when I asked them to give food to more than five thousand men who were following Me in the desert with no access to food except five loaves and two fishes.

In the beginning, they were offended and felt that it was an illogical and impossible task for them to do. But soon, they learned to pull down their stronghold of rational thinking and of the wisdom they learned from men, which is from the Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil, and to submit and obey what was commanded of them after they have been taught of Our Way that all things are possible with THE ELOHIM to those who believe. (Luk 9:11-17)
7) Completely Out Of This World Squeeze

Shadrach, Meshach and Abednego were squeezed by us with squeezes that were completely out of this world when they were cast into the midst of the burning furnace that was heated seven times hotter than usual because they fell down not on the floor to worship the golden image that Nebuchadnezzar the King erected when the sound of the cornet, flute, harp, sackbut, psaltery, and dulcimer, and all kinds of music were sounded. But after approving their faith, We sent an angel to protect them so that the fire had no power upon their bodies, nor was a hair of their head singed, neither were their coats changed, nor the smell of fire had passed on them. (Dan 3:1-30)

Daniel was also squeezed by THE ADONAI with squeezes that were completely out of this world when he was thrown into the lion's den for not obeying the decree of King Darius. Daniel did not try to save his soul but as usual, he went into his house facing Jerusalem and kneeled upon his knees three times a day, and prayed, and gave thanks before his ELOHIM. We sent angel and shut the lions' mouths so that they did not hurt him but when they cast the men that accused Daniel into the den of lions with their children and their wives, the lions broke all their bones in pieces. (Dan 6:1-38)
David, would you like to share with Shekinaih what you have learned from the ten testings of Abraham to Shekinaih?
The Squeeze of THE ADONAI on Abraham
David: THE FATHER through His Name, THE ADONAI, squeezed Abraham through ten tests at certain appointed time of his life. This is known as the Ten Trials of Abraham.

He was squeezed financially, physically, mentally, emotionally and ridiculously when he was commanded to leave his comfort zone in the land of Chaldea for a strange land where He will make him a great nation. This sounds absurd to most of us and is definitely not practical and economical. Abraham must have had a hard time convincing his wife and Lot to follow him (Gen 12:1).

Upon arriving in Canaan, THE ADONAI again squeezed Abraham physically, mentally and emotionally by bringing a famine in the land. At that time, those who followed him, including Sarah and Lot, must have struggled much to believe Abraham whether he had really heard from THE ELOHIM. Abraham must be very stressed and perplexed about the outcome of his decision. But still holding on to the promises, he convinced them to follow him to Egypt (Gen 12:10).

(This happened many times to me when you told me that THE FATHER instructed us to go somewhere and when we were there, He suddenly changed His mind and instructed us to go elsewhere. I was offended at the beginning but after having experienced the Way of THE YAHWEH regarding His offences, I have learned to keep my peace knowing that THE FATHER speaks in part).
Upon reaching Egypt, THE ADONAI orchestrated that Sarah was to be taken by Pharaoh and permitted Abraham to be squeezed emotionally and mentally (Gen 12:15).

(This happened to me as well. Occasionally, when I obeyed His counsel to make a certain decision, I received more troubles and hindrances instead of a breakthrough. But amidst all my troubles, He got me out of them because I continued to trust and obey Him like Abraham).

Again in the times of testing, THE ADONAI squeezed Abraham physically and ridiculously by putting him to an impossible and incredibly out of this world odds to war against Chedorlaomer King of Elam, Tidal King of Nations, Amraphel King of Shinar, and Arioch King of Ellasar with only 318 trained servants in order to rescue Lot and his family (Gen 14:14).

THE ADONAI YAHVIH again squeezed Abraham emotionally and mentally by promising Abraham and Sarah who was barren, a boy in their old age, but delaying it for many years without any sign of pregnancy. The ridicule and the zeal to vindicate THE ADONAI in the flesh must have instigated them to fulfil the prophecy by marrying Hagar to give Abraham a son as the last resort (Gen 16:3).
THE ADONAI again squeezed Abraham physically by commanding him to be circumcised at an advanced age which is also a ridiculous demand to some of us due to his old age (Gen 17:24).
Years later, THE ADONAI permitted the same turmoil of having his wife taken by another man to squeeze Abraham emotionally and mentally again (Gen 20:2).

Abraham was again squeezed emotionally and mentally for having to send Hagar and his son Ishmael away. At that time, he was already emotionally attached to Hagar and Ishmael and it really grieved Abraham for having to do this (Gen 21:12).

Abraham was finally squeezed by THE ADONAI physically, mentally and emotionally when he was commanded to do the ridiculous and impossible task of slaying his only son to sacrifice him upon an altar. This is mind boggling and out of this world and he must have struggled hard whether The Angel of THE YAHWEH who demanded him to do this was from THE YAHWEH or whether he was an Angel of Satan in disguise. But in the end, he overcame all fear of being deceived, being convicted that THE ADONAI was able to resurrect Isaac even if he had been deceived to slay Isaac.

(This also happened to me when I was instructed to commit my loved ones to the discipline of THE FATHER in which what happened brought much pain to my heart. Like Abraham, I also struggled whether the counsel of THE FATHER from Shekinaih was indeed from Him or from a spirit of error. But like Abraham, I convinced myself and submitted to the commands of THE FATHER knowing that THE ADONAI is more than able to overturn all evil if I had fallen into the enemy's plot for me and my loved ones. I believed that all things work for good to those who love Him and continued to trust and obey Him. After I have committed my loved ones to the discipline of THE FATHER, they have been blessed spiritually and physically ever since).

The squeezes of THE ADONAI are called the chastenings of THE FATHER. THE ADONAI did this to perfect us to yield the Fruit of Peace of Righteousness unto Holiness so that we can see THE YAHWEH JESUS and inherit His Holy Mountain. We must not let any bitterness to overwhelm us and let our inheritance slip away but to remember that THE YAHWEH had delivered Abraham from all his troubles, for He had put him in Them in the first place.

Heb 12:5 And ye have forgotten the exhortation which speaketh unto you as unto children, My son, despise not thou the chastening of THE YAHWEH, nor faint when thou art rebuked of him: Heb 12:6 For whom THE YAHWEH loveth he chasteneth, and scourgeth every son whom he receiveth. Heb 12:7 If ye endure chastening, THE ELOHIM dealeth with you as with sons; for what son is he whom the father chasteneth not? Heb 12:8 But if ye be without chastisement, whereof all are partakers, then are ye bastards, and not sons. Heb 12:9 Furthermore we have had fathers of our flesh which corrected us, and we gave them reverence: shall we not much rather be in subjection unto the Father of spirits, and live? Heb 12:10 For they verily for a few days chastened us after their own pleasure; but he for our profit, that we might be partakers of his holiness. Heb 12:11 Now no chastening for the present seemeth to be joyous, but grievous: nevertheless afterward it yieldeth the peaceable fruit of righteousness unto them which are exercised thereby. Heb 12:12 Wherefore lift up the hands which hang down, and the feeble knees; Heb 12:13 And make straight paths for your feet, lest that which is lame be turned out of the way; but let it rather be healed. Heb 12:14 Follow peace in everything, and holiness, without which no man shall see THE YAHWEH: Heb 12:15 Looking diligently lest any man fail of the grace of THE ELOHIM; lest any root of bitterness springing up trouble you, and thereby many be defiled; Heb 12:16 Lest there be any fornicator, or profane person, as Esau, who for one morsel of meat sold his birthright. Heb 12:17 For ye know how that afterward, when he would have inherited the blessing, he was rejected: for he found no place of repentance, though he sought it carefully with tears.
JESUS: David, would you like to share with Shekinaih the many squeezes you have experienced when We called you out of the world to serve us singly?
K.DAVID'S Testimony Regarding the 7 Squeezes of THE FATHER

David: Twenty years ago, I owned a real estate company and was doing well. I was living in my newly renovated three storey corner terrace and driving a Mercedes 280 SE sedan. Spiritually, I was backslidden but THE YAHWEH had not given me up. One day, while driving to Johore Bahru for shopping, I heard a still small voice speaking to me asking me whether I was happy. My spirit responded to the voice and replied, "Why not?" I was doing well financially, happily married with a beautiful wife and had 3 beautiful and lovely children. I was enjoying life every day with no worry of lack. The voice replied saying, "Be truthful, are you really happy?" Immediately, it seemed that some video clips of moments of my unhappiness started to play in my mind especially of my daily encounters with people whom I knew that were jealous of my success. Many had attempted to smear my reputation and I was tormented, agitated and grieved with all the evil speaking and defamation. I began to realize that I did not really have many true friends for I did not put my trust in any of them. This was because in the past, I realized that the people whom I treated as close acquaintances did not treat me the same as I had treated them. I started to be a loner and my success was my pride and comfort. Unconsciously, I told myself that I would not permit myself to be so easily and emotionally attached to any person anymore. My solitude was also due to realizing that the Christian ministers whom I followed, respected and trusted were also not real and sincere in their intentions.
As I was wallowing in my grief, the lyrics of a song that I had written many years ago started to play in my heart:

"What are you brooding about? Don't you think you have enough? Of misery and pain, of suffering and sadness in your eye. Come, come, come, and come to me. Peace will I give to thee. From misery to joy, unhappiness. I will bring sweet love to thee."

Spontanously, I started to cry and sang the song "This world is not my home" which I have learned in the "Youth for Christ" meeting in my secondary school. As I sang, tears kept flowing out of my eyes and I realized for the first time that this world is not my home and I am just a passing through; and if heaven is not my home, where will I go? Suddenly I really don't feel at home in this world anymore. Then a strange thing happened. Suddenly, I found myself singing in an unknown language and my tongue and lips were not the cause of the utterance as they were not moving at all. I felt an angel inside me was singing. This caused me to marvel and it continued for many hours as I drove aimlessly on the road. I was fascinated by this experience and was enjoying the song as it sounded holy and divine. After it stopped, I headed back for home. Upon I reaching home, I locked myself in my home theatre room and told my wife that I needed to be alone to figure out something. Whilst alone, I kept hearing the voice within me beckoning me with these words, "Come back to Me. I have great works for you to do. You will be joyful in Me and find rest for your soul." At that time, my reasoning was excusing me that it was not profitable I should serve THE ELOHIM as this would involve giving up all the things of the world and be deprived of all the lusts of the eyes, the lusts of the flesh and the pride of life. I was there for many days and nights being accused by my conscience for procrastinating to obey; at the same time excusing myself that it was the only logical thing to do, especially when I have started to take pride in my success and was becoming attached to the things of the world.

On the 7th day, I experienced a change in heart. For the first time, the things of the world that I used to esteem and love seemed to be of no value to me and suddenly I had no affections for them anymore. In the middle of that night, I came out the home theatre room and walked into my own bedroom and destroyed all the abominable and ungodly things which I was convicted to get rid of in order to be at peace and be reconciled with THE FATHER again. Later my wife woke up and was shocked to find me destroying many things that she knew I had treasured before.

For the next few months, hell broke loose. My wife was worried for me and confused over my radical behavior. She complained to her mother and my parents. I was asked to return to my business but I did not give in. I told them that I had lost the passions and interest in the things of this world.

As time passed, I started to feel the squeeze of THE ADONAI financially, mentally, and emotionally as He put me in the crucible to see whether I would succumb to my family's pressures and rationalise that it was only sensible, economical and accountable to continue my real estate business and serve THE YAHWEH at the same time. But something inside me convicted me that I had to walk by faith and not by sight. I felt the need to forsake all and deny myself in crucifying the flesh with my all affections and lusts thereof.

I continued to delight in THE YAHWEH and committed my wife and children to Him. They did not understand why the change was so sudden and thought I had gone crazy. My wife was confused and even threatened to divorce me. I told her that I had decided to serve THE YAHWEH fulltime and was preparing for my ministry and my mind was totally fixed on this. I assured her that THE FATHER would be faithful to take care of all our needs. I started to sleep in the home theatre room and this continued for the next 10 years. I was studying the Bible or reading a Christian book in most of my waking hours. When I was tired, I listened to the audio bible till I have fallen asleep with the CD still playing continuously in the background.

Meanwhile, THE ADONAI had energized me to fast for 40 days three times in the first year with water only and a few times of 21 days fastings with juice in the second year while delighting in the revelation of the Way of THE YAHWEH while searching the scriptures for the truth. I even consecrated myself as a Nazarite and eventually became a vegetarian for many years. This radical change of lifestyle perplexed many of my siblings as well as my relatives and I was even shunned by Pastors of many Churches for they were not comfortable with my extreme behavior. I was misunderstood by many brothers and sisters of the Church I was attending and was taken as a hyper spiritual fanatic. I was misunderstood by my siblings and was derided and taken to be like a Muslim fanatic terrorist because during those times, I did not cut my hair or shave my beard to overcome my vanity.

As years went by, I began to feel the financial squeezes of THE ADONAI as my savings became depleted because of the expenses for mission works to many countries. I had to sell my corner terrace house as I could no more service the bank mortgage loan. But THE FATHER was faithful for He had already reserved a 4 room condominium for my family which was owned by a foreigner who bought that unit from me during my real estate days. That unit was vacant for many years as the owner had went back to her country. She suggested that my family should stay there and take care of her apartment. I only needed to pay her a small rent. So, we stayed there for 10 years until it was finally sold.

I was still doing ministry work on my own because no Christian ministry was ready to take me due to my radical ways. My wife volunteered to work helping her brother-in-law at his vegetarian food stall. She also did part time house cleaning work in order to provide for the basic needs of my three children. At that time, my eldest son was 15 years old, my eldest daughter was 14 years old and my youngest daughter was 9 years old. That was the most difficult time for my wife and my children because we had to downgrade from staying in a big house to a rented apartment. My wife used to drive my children to school with our maid in our Mercedes Benz, but for the first time, she had to cycle my youngest daughter to school. My youngest daughter was deprived of many things compared to her peers in school thus she started to harbor bitterness towards me. By and by, my wife also felt the financial squeeze and started to disrespect and doubt my calling. Her siblings started to despise me as well.

I began to lose my self-respect and I thought many times of giving up serving THE YAHWEH and going back to my real estate business to provide for my loved ones, but each time when I inquired of THE YAHWEH to ask for His permission, He would comfort me and assure me that I was still in His will and He needed to squeeze me further financially, physically, mentally, emotionally, ridiculously, and illogically, and asked me to do and trust the things that were out of this world as revealed to me.

The Father would comfort me by moving the hearts of many Christian brothers and sisters who gave me the tithes or offerings as unto THE YAHWEH. This went on for 10 years and so our basic needs were met.

What I did was not acceptable by many in Christendom or among the people I knew because of the stronghold of rational thinking and the wisdom of men in them were rooted in the Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil. The Way of THE YAHWEH and His plans are not the same with the people of the world.

Pastors and Christian friends whom I knew would always counsel me that I needed to prioritize my life. They said that although my relationship with THE ELOHIM should come first, my spouse and kids were equally important and the preparation of my ministry should come last. Through this pressure, I was squeezed mentally and emotionally, but somehow THE HOLY SPIRIT kept bringing me to my remembrance what JESUS had spoken concerning His requirement if I wanted to be His disciple.

Firstly, I needed to seek His Kingdom and His righteousness and not to be anxious of my daily need by trusting in the love and faithfulness of THE FATHER to take care of me and my loved ones. That was the reason why I was so focused and hungry to study the word of THE ELOHIM to find out what the Kingdom and His righteousness is that I needed to seek. Through the scriptures, THE HOLY SPIRIT revealed to me that I must be single-hearted if I wanted to be illuminated in my eyes and heart to perceive what the Kingdom is. As He had given me the grace not to trust in earthly riches anymore, I needed to overcome the emotional and financial squeezes to trust Him for the provision of my loved ones. He told me that if I give in to anxiety, I would be overcome by unbelief and be disqualified from the Kingdom. I needed to trust Him and commit my loved ones to Him for He cares for us.

Mat 6:19 Lay not up for yourselves treasures upon earth, where moth and rust doth corrupt, and where thieves break through and steal: Mat 6:20 But lay up for yourselves treasures in heaven, where neither moth nor rust doth corrupt, and where thieves do not break through nor steal: Mat 6:21 For where your treasure is, there will your heart be also. Mat 6:22 The light of the body is the eye: if therefore thine eye be single, thy whole body shall be full of light. Mat 6:23 But if thine eye be evil, thy whole body shall be full of darkness. If therefore the light that is in thee be darkness, how great is that darkness! Mat 6:24 No man can serve two masters: for either he will hate the one, and love the other; or else he will hold to the one, and despise the other. Ye cannot serve THE ELOHIM and mammon. Mat 6:25 Therefore I say unto you, Take no thought for your life, what ye shall eat, or what ye shall drink; nor yet for your body, what ye shall put on. Is not the life more than meat, and the body than raiment? Mat 6:26 Behold the fowls of the air: for they sow not, neither do they reap, nor gather into barns; yet your heavenly Father feedeth them. Are ye not much better than they? Mat 6:27 Which of you by taking thought can add one cubit unto his stature?

I later found out through revelation that the Kingdom refers to us being clothed with the glory of THE ELOHIM so as to be a part of the Heavenly Jerusalem as the anointed lily Brides of JESUS and given the power and authority to rule the kingdoms of this universe with Him for a thousand years and live eternally with Him.

Mat 6:28 And why take ye thought for raiment? Consider the lilies of the field, how they grow; they toil not, neither do they spin: Mat 6:29 And yet I say unto you, That even Solomon in all his glory was not arrayed like one of these. Mat 6:30 Wherefore, if THE ELOHIM so clothe the grass of the field, which today is, and tomorrow is cast into the oven, shall he not much more clothe you, O ye of little faith? Mat 6:31 Therefore take no thought, saying, What shall we eat? Or, what shall we drink? Or, Wherewithal shall we be clothed? Mat 6:32 (For after all these things do the Gentiles seek ) for your heavenly Father knoweth that ye have need of all these things. Mat 6:33 But seek ye first the kingdom of THE ELOHIM, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you. Mat 6:34 Take therefore no thought for the morrow: for the morrow shall take thought for the things of itself. Sufficient unto the day is the evil thereof.

Rev 11:15 And the seventh angel sounded; and there were great voices in heaven, saying, The kingdoms of this Cosmos (G2889 "Kosmos" are become the kingdoms of our YAHWEH (JESUS), and of his CHRIST (anointed one); and he shall reign for ever and ever.

I also found out that as we seek the Kingdom, THE FATHER will permit tribulations to come our way to test us whether we are in the faith so that He can impute unto us His righteousness. This is what it means to seek His righteousness.
Act 14:22 Confirming the souls of the disciples, and exhorting them to continue in the faith, and that we must through much tribulation enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM.

Rom 1:16 For I am not ashamed of the gospel of CHRIST: for it is the power of THE ELOHIM unto salvation (restoration of the glory of THE ELOHIM which Adam had lost) to every one that believeth; to the Jew first, and also to the Greek. Rom 1:17 For therein is the righteousness of THE ELOHIM revealed from faith to faith: as it is written, the righteous shall live by faith.
If I were to follow Him and be counted worthy to be His disciple, I must love Him more than my father, mother, wife, children, brethren, sisters, and my life.

From the day I decided to follow Him, I have learned to count the cost that I have to pay if I were to lay the foundation to receive the Kingdom. I will continue to prepare myself with the armor of THE ELOHIM so that I may be able to stand against the methods of the Accuser. All the troubles that I received from my loved ones, siblings, and friends which were energized by his principalities, his authorities, his rulers of darkness of this age and the spiritual wickedness in high places were permitted by THE FATHER for my approval unto righteousness unto holiness. I must be perfected in mercy and not to be bitter against them for they really didn't know what they were doing. I must uphold my faith by having my mind renovated with the truth of the Way of THE YAHWEH by being at peace with THE FATHER. I would go through the troubles with peace and joy, in meekness of love towards them, in lowliness of mind bearing the shame and reproach by yielding and trusting in THE FATHER 100%.

Luk 14:26 If any man come to me, and hate not his father, and mother, and wife, and children, and brethren, and sisters, yea, and his own life also, he cannot be my disciple. Luk 14:27 And whosoever doth not bear his cross, and come after me, cannot be my disciple. Luk 14:28 For which of you, intending to build a tower, sitteth not down first, and counteth the cost, whether he have sufficient to finish it? Luk 14:29 Lest haply, after he hath laid the foundation, and is not able to finish it, all that behold it begin to mock him, Luk 14:30 Saying, This man began to build, and was not able to finish. Luk 14:31 Or what king, going to make war against another king, sitteth not down first, and consulteth whether he be able with ten thousand to meet him that cometh against him with twenty thousand? Luk 14:32 Or else, while the other is yet a great way off, he sendeth an ambassage, and desireth conditions of peace. Luk 14:33 So likewise, whosoever he be of you that forsaketh not all that he hath, he cannot be my disciple. Luk 14:34 Salt is good: but if the salt have lost his savour, wherewith shall it be seasoned? Luk 14:35 It is neither fit for the land, nor yet for the dunghill; but men cast it out. He that hath ears to hear, let him hear.
Reasons for the Squeeze
Through all these squeezes, I have learned that all things are possible to those who believe in THE FATHER. They are but means to the end which is to obtain the Kingdom.

After being squeezed financially, I have learned to trust in THE FATHER for my provision and would no more put my trust in earthly riches. Riches have lost its hold on me and I am no more choked by the deceitfulness of riches.

Mar 10:24 And the disciples were astonished at his words. But JESUS answereth again, and saith unto them, Children, how hard is it for them that trust in riches to enter into the kingdom of THE ELOHIM!

After being squeezed physically through fastings, I am able to have self-control over the flesh with its affections and lusts. I can keep my body under subjection and I am able to fast when required by THE YAHWEH for certain tasks that need holiness in manifesting His glory and power.

1Co 9:24 Know ye not that they which run in a race run all, but one receiveth the prize? So run, that ye may obtain. 1Co 9:25 And every man that striveth for the mastery is temperate in all things. Now they do it to obtain a corruptible crown; but we an incorruptible. 1Co 9:26 I therefore so run, not as uncertainly; so fight I, not as one that beateth the air: 1Co 9:27 But I keep under my body, and bring it into subjection: lest that by any means, when I have preached to others, I myself should be a castaway.

Gal 5:19 Now the works of the flesh are manifest, which are these; Adultery, fornication, uncleanness, lasciviousness, Gal 5:20 Idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, strife, seditions, heresies, Gal 5:21 Envyings, murders, drunkenness, revellings, and such like: of the which I tell you before, as I have also told you in time past, that they which do such things shall not inherit the kingdom of THE ELOHIM.

After being squeezed mentally, I have realized that there are many strongholds that Satan has planted in our minds. I need to pull them down and subject to what THE YAHWEH has made known to us. The carnal minded man cannot please THE ELOHIM nor can he subject to His law. Therefore, to be carnally minded is death, but to be spiritually minded is life and peace.

2 Co 10:2 But I beseech you, that I may not be bold when I am present with that confidence, wherewith I think to be bold against some, which think of us as if we walked according to the flesh. 2 Co 10:3 For though we walk in the flesh, we do not war after the flesh: 2 Co 10:4 (For the weapons of our warfare are not carnal, but mighty through THE ELOHIM to the pulling down of strong holds;) 2 Co 10:5 Casting down imaginations, and every high thing that exalteth itself against the knowledge of THE ELOHIM, and bringing into captivity every thought to the obedience of a Christ; 2 Co 10:6 And having in a readiness to revenge all disobedience, when your obedience is fulfilled.

After being emotionally squeezed, I have learned not to be easily manipulated by others who are energized by Satan, but will only set my affections on that of THE ELOHIM'S so that His works are not thwarted or delayed because of my emotions. I must not commit the mistake of Peter who tried to stop JESUS from fulfilling the will of THE FATHER which was to go to the cross. In the last days, many are appointed unto death; like JESUS, they will be martyred and resurrected to rule with Him. We must rejoice with them and not try to prevent or discourage them from their destiny.

Mat 16:22 Then Peter took him, and began to rebuke him, saying, Be it far from thee, Lord: this shall not be unto thee. Mat 16:23 But he turned, and said unto Peter, Get thee behind me, Satan: thou art an offence unto me: for thou savourest not the things that be of THE ELOHIM, but those that be of men. Mat 16:24 Then said JESUS unto his disciples, If any man will come after me, let him deny himself, and take up his cross, and follow me. Mat 16:25 For whosoever will save his life shall lose it: and whosoever will lose his life for my sake shall find it.

After being ridiculously squeezed by obeying THE YAHWEH in doing certain things that made us look eccentric, insane, or weird, I have learned to overcome the fear of man, and I am no more affected by how people think of me. I can easily do ridiculous prophetic acts or speak without fear of being ridiculed.

2 Co 5:12 For we commend not ourselves again unto you, but give you occasion to glory on our behalf, that ye may have somewhat to answer them which glory in appearance, and not in heart. 2 Co 5:13 For whether we look insane (G1839 "existemi"), it is to THE ELOHIM: or whether we be sober, it is for your cause. 2 Co 5:14 For the love of THE CHRIST constraineth us; because we thus judge, that if one died for all, then were all dead: 2 Co 5:15 And that he died for all, that they which live should not henceforth live unto themselves, but unto him which died for them, and rose again. 2 Co 5:16 Wherefore henceforth know we no man after the flesh: yea, though we have known THE CHRIST after the flesh, yet now henceforth know we him no more. 2 Co 5:17 Therefore if any man be in Christ, he is a new creature: old things are passed away; behold, all things are become new.

After going through the impossible squeezes of THE ADONAI to do tasks that seemed impossible, I have learned to believe that all things are possible with Him. It is not through our faith in ourselves that can move mountains, but it is by the faith of THE ELOHIM that all things are possible.

Mat 17:20 And JESUS said unto them, Because of your unbelief: for verily I say unto you, If ye have faith as a grain of mustard seed, ye shall say unto this mountain, Remove hence to yonder place; and it shall remove; and nothing shall be impossible unto you.
Mat 19:26 But JESUS beheld them, and said unto them, with men this is impossible; but with THE ELOHIM all things are possible.
After being squeezed to believe and hope for things that are completely out of this world, I am now able to believe in all things that THE FATHER has promised me.
(THE TRINITY took out their white handkerchieves as tears rolled down from their eyes, began to wipe and sob. Turning their heads at each other, they started conversing with each other.)
THE FATHER (THE TRINITY): At last, We have found a precious jewel whom no matter how We have squeezed and tested him, he persevered all the way to the end just like you, JESUS.
(THE TRINITY began to cry aloud as they put their arms over each other shoulders and hug each other and comfort one another.
THE TRINITY then holding a white board each, with the word, "Alas" written on it, broke out in unison and said):

THE FATHER (THE TRINITY): He was lost but was found by us and carried by us across the challenging terrains of the difficult climb to MOUNT ZION; across the stormy sea of roaring waves and uncertain future; across the broken path of broken glasses and protruding and piercing nails; to surf across the sea of turbulent fiery trials through the surf board called "Faith" in us and through Our representative to reach his final destiny and to obtain what was promised to him. Such rare pursuit, unquenchable thirst, undying faith is highly valued in Our eyes.
All My children, do learn from Our chief (David and Shekinaih), from their life stories and testimony and how they overcame the odds that were against them to stand tall all the way to the end.

ACT 2 Scene 4 
Submit to THE TRINITY
Time Frame: Daily Event
Location: Worldwide
On a bright, hot, sunny noon day, many UFOs were spotted hovering above tall buildings worldwide radiating piercing light into these tall buildings causing them to explode into fire subsequently.
Panic crowds were screaming as they ran in every directions to search for safe places to hide for their safety.

Many helicopters hovering above these tall buildings were announcing with loud speakers calling for full evacuation of these buildings as they broadcasted these warnings in the air, "We are under attack by aliens."
Government Agencies worldwide were summoning their military forces to bring these UFOs down.

Meanwhile, Shekinaih seated in her Heavenly Throne, with David standing as her scribe were watching all these happenings. Suddenly, Satan with his evil host came and stood at Shekinaih's right hand seeking for permission to completely destroy the land that are full of wickedness and have willingly surrendered their remote controls to him; and did not put THE TRINITY before their eyes.

THE TRINITY suddenly stood in front of Shekinaih and showed her three white boards with these words written on them, "Do not touch My holy ones but they are permitted to destroy the wicked and those who lightly esteem us, and THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE".

At once, Shekinaih read out THE TRINITY's decree and together with David, they executed and co-execute the judgment; Satan and his evil forces upon receiving their verdict then disappeared before them.

JESUS then said to them, "This vision you both have just seen is to assure you that heavens, earth and beneath earth have been informed that we have put Our Names in you both, and have given Our authority and power to judge the Cosmoses with its inhabitants".

Chapter 3 
Submit to THE ELOHIM and Resist the Accuser

JESUS: Reveal to My brothers/sisters that they will also be given this authority and power if they have submitted to THE FATHER and resisted the Accuser and successfully ascended to My Heavenly Mount Zion to be My archangels.

The whole purpose of My potential Brides and Anointed Ones ascending to the Holy Mountain is to be restored back to the image of THE ELOHIM, in Adamic glory before the fall, and to take back the dominion of the Cosmos from the Diabolos which was surrendered to him by Adam.

Luk 4:5 And the Diabolos, taking him up into an high mountain, shewed unto him all the kingdoms of the world in a moment of time. Luk 4:6 And the Diabolos said unto him, All this authority will I give thee, and the glory of them: for that is surrendered (G3860 "paradidomi") unto me; and to whomsoever I will I give it. Luk 4:7 If thou therefore wilt worship me, all shall be thine.

This can only be accomplished through their total submission to My FATHER according to the obedience of faith in walking according to Our will. In so doing, they will be justified freely by My grace and not miss the mark to regain the Glory of THE ELOHIM which Adam had lost when he disobeyed us.

Rom 3:23 For all have missed the mark (sinned) , and come short of the glory of THE ELOHIM; Rom 3:24 Being justified freely by his grace through the redemption that is in CHRIST JESUS: Rom 3:25 Whom THE ELOHIM hath set forth to be a propitiation through faith in his blood, to declare his righteousness for the remission of sins that are past, through the forbearance of THE ELOHIM; Rom 3:26 To declare, I say, at this time his righteousness: that he might be just, and the justifier of him which believeth in JESUS.

They have to deny themselves of their ego, self-righteousness and pride; in single-heartedness and lowliness of mind submitting to the chastisement of THE FATHER by resisting the Accuser through walking in the spirit and not fulfilling the lusts of the flesh nor loving this present Cosmos.

Jas 4:4 Ye adulterers and adulteresses, know ye not that the friendship of the Cosmos (G2889 "kosmos" world) is enmity with THE ELOHIM? whosoever therefore will be a friend of the Cosmos (G2889 "kosmos" world) is the enemy of THE ELOHIM. Jas 4:5 Do ye think that the scripture saith in vain, The spirit that dwelleth in us lusteth to envy? Jas 4:6 But he giveth more grace. Wherefore he saith, THE ELOHIM resisteth the proud, but giveth grace unto the humble. Jas 4:7 Submit yourselves therefore to THE ELOHIM. Resist the diabolos, and he will flee from you. Jas 4:8 Draw nigh to THE ELOHIM, and he will draw nigh to you. Cleanse your hands, ye sinners; and purify your hearts, ye double minded. Jas 4:9 Be afflicted, and mourn, and weep: let your laughter be turned to mourning, and your joy to heaviness. Jas 4:10 Humble yourselves in the sight of THE YAHWEH, and he shall lift you up.

Humbling themselves like little children, knowing who they are and where they came from before their incarnation, and being strong and steadfast in the oracles of THE ELOHIM are essential for them to resist and overcome the Diabolos and thwart all of his arrows of accusation. The Diabolos is betting on his presumptuous belief that, like the first Adam, all future Adams will not submit to My FATHER and will deny themselves of their right in the pleasure of the lust of the eye, the lust of the flesh and the pride of life that the present transient Cosmos has to offer.

1Jn 2:12 I write unto you, little children, because your missing the mark (H2401 from H2398 "chatta" to miss) are forgiven you for his name's sake. 1Jn 2:13 I write unto you, fathers, because ye have known him that is from the beginning. I write unto you, young men, because ye have overcome the wicked one. I write unto you, little children, because ye have known the Father. 1Jn 2:14 I have written unto you, fathers, because ye have known him that is from the beginning. I have written unto you, young men, because ye are strong, and the word of THE ELOHIM abideth in you, and ye have overcome the wicked one. 1Jn 2:15 Love not the Cosmos, neither the things that are in the Cosmos. The Diabolos was allowed to prove Me that I, like Adam, would deny THE FATHER, but I proved him wrong when I was led up of the Spirit into the wilderness to be tested by him. After I had fasted for forty days and nights and was afterwards hungry, the Diabolos/Accuser tempted Me when I was most vulnerable. I was tested in the areas of the lust of the flesh, the lusts of the eye and the pride of life which were signified by the bread and the kingdoms of the Cosmos, but I did not fall for his temptation.

Mat 4:1 Then was JESUS led up of the Spirit into the wilderness to be tempted (G3985 "peirazo") of the Diabolos/Accuser. (G1228 "diabolos") Mat 4:2 And when he had fasted forty days and forty nights, he was afterward an hungred. Mat 4:10 Then saith JESUS unto him, Get thee hence, Satan: for it is written, Thou shalt worship THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM, and him only shalt thou serve.

My FATHER will crown them with glory and honour and make them to rule over heavens, earth and beneath the earth (the three realms), which are signified by the fowl of the air, the beasts of the field and fish of the sea.

Psa 8:9 O YAHWEH our ADON, how excellent is thy name in all the earth!

They will be tempted by the Diabolos and put in a situation which they have to make a choice, whether they will deny Me and choose to stand on the side of their father, mother, son, daughter or their own life.

Vision of A Baby in A Mortar

Shekinaih: I see a vision of THE FATHER placed a baby inside a granite mortar and pounded it with a pestle to crush it. He poured the blood that came out inside a test-tube with the word "Character" written on it and pasted the pounded meat paste with the word "the will of man" written on it from the crown on the head to the sole of the feet of JESUS who was hung on a cross. Next, the light of JESUS went into the human form meat paste and the form became a living light being that had a face of a baby with blue eyes.
David: ABBA FATHER, what is the interpretation of this vision?

THE FATHER: Every babe and suckling that is ordained to be crowned with glory and honour to silence the enemy and the avenger (Psa 8:1-9) must be crushed of his self-will to submit to My will and tested in the test tube of character until it is proven that he has the character of My SON JESUS in him. Unless he is in Christ and has deadened the flesh with its affections and lusts, I will not be able to fill him with the blue divine eyes of wisdom and understanding for him to be a light to the world to manifest My glory.

Those who are prompt to yield to the training and discipline of My two representatives Shekinaih and Aaron K David will be commended for this glory. But those who determine to go counter to what is determined willfully will be rejected and hated by us and will lose their birthright like Esau because they have insulted My spirit of grace in both of them. These will fall into great judgment by them who are Our strong hand.

Heb 10:26 For if we sin wilfully after that we have received the knowledge of the truth, there remaineth no more sacrifice for sins, Heb 10:27 But a certain fearful looking for of judgment and fiery indignation, which shall devour the adversaries. Heb 10:28 He that despised Moses' law died without mercy under two or three witnesses: Heb 10:29 Of how much sorer punishment, suppose ye, shall he be thought worthy, who hath trodden under foot the Son of THE ELOHIM, and hath counted the blood of the covenant, wherewith he was sanctified, an unholy thing, and hath done despite unto the Spirit of grace? Heb 10:30 For we know him that hath said, Vengeance belongeth unto me, I will recompense, saith the Lord. And again, The Lord shall judge his people. Heb 10:31 It is a fearful thing to fall into the hands of the living THE ELOHIM.

But those who submit to My counsel through them have sanctified Our Names for they are The Cherubim of Glory that manifest Our glory. We have used both of them as wisdom and understanding to lay the foundation of the heavens and earth in the beginning (Pro 8:1-36). In the last days, Shekinaih representing THE ADONAI YAHVIH and Aaron K David representing the Spirit/Angel of THE YAHWEH (Heb 1:7) will give breakthroughs to those whom We have called. They shall lead them to My way of peace. They shall no more commit adultery with the world/Mystery Babylon and their seed shall multiply and be blessed.

As for those who reject Our determination and refuse to be broken and refined by them, they will be rejected by us like reprobate silver for they have not rejected My two representatives but have rejected us. (Jer 6:28-30) Our word in them shall be as fire and will refine and purify the babes and infants as gold and silver respectively (Mal 3:1-4), and as a hammer (Jer 23:29), it shall crush their hearts of stones so that We will make Our dwelling in them when they are made lowly and contrite.

Isa 57:14 And shall say, Cast ye up, cast ye up, prepare the way, take up the stumblingblock out of the way of my people. Isa 57:15 For thus saith the high and lofty One that inhabiteth eternity, whose name is Holy; I dwell in the high and holy place, with him also that is of a contrite and humble spirit, to revive the spirit of the humble, and to revive the heart of the contrite (H1792 "daka" crush) ones.

Through Our two representatives, We will turn all the sons of Adam back to Our way of righteousness unto holiness after the strongholds in their minds which are stumblingblocks are taken out of their way.
Psa 90:3 Thou turnest man to brokenness (H1793 "dakka" crush); and sayest, Return, ye sons of Adam.

THE FATHER has purposed to use the waves of tumultuous people of the Antichrist to cast down the Brides/Anointed Ones to the land of Jordan of lowliness in mind, and Hermonites of consecration, and Mount Mizar of smallest as they submit to His chastening in order to partake of his holiness.

But we shall smite his tumultuous people and humble him through The Angel of Our Presence, THE SHE/HE THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, and give the rule of the world to Our anointed who will rule in Our Name. But if they are not prepared and made ready to stand steadfast in the evil days, they will deny Him and end up in the lake of fire.

Zec 10:12 And I will strengthen them in THE YAHWEH; and they shall walk up and down in his name, saith THE YAHWEH.

Shekinaih: I see Satan tempting another man through the lusts of the flesh and lusts of the eyes. He placed before him a woman of exceeding beauty, and comeliness, and of subtle wit, and of a ready and understanding composure. She looked very attractive like a Chinese fairy in the movies, but inside her was a witch sent to cause his downfall. I saw Satan then whispered to him and said: "Take her as you will for her desire is unto you, and you shall have love, happiness and comfort all your life, and see your children's children.
