She reciprocated and placed her hand on his hand and they entered by a door into a room full of fire with the word "Perdition" written on the door post. Then, I saw JESUS crossed his name out from His enlistment list and wrote the word "Replaced".

JESUS: This is My warning for every one of My Brides and Anointed ones. For men, be admonished for you might end up with a woman who is a witch sent to seduce and trap you. You might end up like King Ahab who was controlled by Jezebel.
As for women, be admonished for if you are not careful, you might end up with a prince charming who is a wizard, a child of the Diabolos. He would ruin your life and divert you from your calling.
Thus be careful. If My FATHER has prepared a wife or a husband for you, THE HOLY SPIRIT will reveal to you when the time comes.

Do not be too anxious and keep pestering THE FATHER for a husband or a wife, for He might give in to the idols in your heart and put a lying spirit in the mouth of all the prophets whom you enquire to mislead you to your destruction. As He had done to King Ahab for having an idol in his heart departing from us (1Ki 22:1-40), We will not hesitate to do it again to anyone who willfully tests us by putting an idol in his heart. Be not deceived, My FATHER is not mocked; for whatever a man soweth, so shall he reap.

Eze 14:7 For every one of the house of Israel, or of the stranger that sojourneth in Israel, which separateth himself from me, and setteth up his idols in his heart, and putteth the stumblingblock of his iniquity before his face, and cometh to a prophet to enquire of him concerning me; I THE YAHWEH will answer him by myself: Eze 14:8 And I will set my face against that man, and will make him a sign and a proverb, and I will cut him off from the midst of my people; and ye shall know that I am THE YAHWEH. Eze 14:9 And if the prophet be deceived when he hath spoken a thing, I THE YAHWEH have deceived that prophet, and I will stretch out my hand upon him, and will destroy him from the midst of my people Israel. Eze 14:10 And they shall bear the punishment of their iniquity: the punishment of the prophet shall be even as the punishment of him that seeketh unto him;

The Diabolos is very good at setting up situations to destroy My potential Brides/Anointed Ones in this area. If they are famous and influential in the ministry, he will use women or men to seduce and trap them and ruin their reputation and credibility.
My potential Brides/Anointed Ones are admonished and reminded to take heed to Our warnings in the Verses below to stay close to THE HOLY SPIRIT in Shekinaih.

Pro 7:4 Say unto wisdom, Thou art my sister; and call understanding thy kinswoman: Pro 7:5 That they may keep thee from the strange woman, from the stranger which flattereth with her words. Pro 7:6 For at the window of my house I looked through my casement, Pro 7:7 And beheld among the simple ones, I discerned among the youths, a young man void of understanding, Pro 7:8 Passing through the street near her corner; and he went the way to her house, Pro 7:9 In the twilight, in the evening, in the black and dark night: Pro 7:10 And, behold, there met him a woman with the attire of an harlot, and subtil of heart. Pro 7:11 (She is loud and stubborn; her feet abide not in her house: Pro 7:12 Now is she without, now in the streets, and lieth in wait at every corner.) Pro 7:13 So she caught him, and kissed him, and with an impudent face said unto him, Pro 7:14 I have peace offerings with me; this day have I payed my vows. Pro 7:15 Therefore came I forth to meet thee, diligently to seek thy face, and I have found thee. Pro 7:16 I have decked my bed with coverings of tapestry, with carved works, with fine linen of Egypt. Pro 7:17 I have perfumed my bed with myrrh, aloes, and cinnamon. Pro 7:18 Come, let us take our fill of love until the morning: let us solace ourselves with loves. Pro 7:19 For the goodman is not at home, he is gone a long journey: Pro 7:20 He hath taken a bag of money with him, and will come home at the day appointed. Pro 7:21 With her much fair speech she caused him to yield, with the flattering of her lips she forced him. Pro 7:22 He goeth after her straightway, as an ox goeth to the slaughter, or as a fool to the correction of the stocks; Pro 7:23 Till a dart strike through his liver; as a bird hasteth to the snare, and knoweth not that it is for his life. Pro 7:24 Hearken unto me now therefore, O ye children, and attend to the words of my mouth. Pro 7:25 Let not thine heart decline to her ways, go not astray in her paths. Pro 7:26 For she hath cast down many wounded: yea, many strong men have been slain by her. Pro 7:27 Her house is the way to hell, going down to the chambers of death.

Shekinaih: I see Satan approached another man and offered him position, fame and recognition if he submit to an International Ministry which is lawless, and this man also succumbed to the temptation and was disqualified by JESUS.
I realized that with all these temptations, only the man who is the first choice of THE FATHER from the five men managed to overcome.
David: LORD JESUS, how did this man pass through all the tests?
(Staring straight into David's eyes, JESUS answered him.)

JESUS: Thou art that man, My son. When your eyes are single, your whole body will thereby be full of light. By hearing and hearken to My words always and obey them by walking them out thou thereby made it.
(THE HOLY SPIRIT on his left and THE FATHER on his right, nodded their heads in unision fully agreed with what JESUS had just spoken. JESUS then continued to speak.)

You overcame them by always listening to Our word on your headphone. As you do it, you are increasing in faith as Our word cleanses you. You also listened to Our prophetic words which you had recorded and received from Our true prophets in your early years and from Shekinaih in the later years. As you continued to let Our prophetic words wash and renovate your mind, you are encouraging yourself every time you are discouraged. You have also learned to avoid profane and fruitless discussions with the ungodly intellects so that you will be not defiled by their ungodliness.

2Ti 2:14 Of these things put them in remembrance, charging them before THE YAHWEH that they strive not about words to no profit, but to the subverting of the hearers. 2Ti 2:15 Be prompt (G4707 "spoudazo") to yield (G3936 "paristemi") thyself approved unto THE ELOHIM, a workman that needeth not to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth. 2Ti 2:16 But shun profane and vain babblings: for they will increase unto more ungodliness.

You overcame the bitterness that you had at times with THE FATHER due to His chastenings. You have also learned to forgive and not to take to heart the shit of rejection, mocking, and scoffing from others. You have learned to be prompt to yield to do the will of THE FATHER and continued in patience to gird you mind with the word of truth as you walked in the preordained path by denying yourself. You continued to stand with the full armor of trusting and living out every word that proceeded from Our mouth. Through the walk of debasement, you have learned to boast of your weaknesses and not be easily overcome by pride or condemnation; for you knew that it is by grace through faith that you are saved if you obediently walk the ordained path of the 5 levels or the 7 levels to holiness without wavering in unbelief.

Eph 2:8 For by grace are ye saved through faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the gift of THE ELOHIM: Eph 2:9 Not of works, lest any man should boast. Eph 2:10 For we are his workmanship, created in CHRIST JESUS unto good works, which THE ELOHIM hath before ordained that we should walk in them.

Shekinaih: David, when you had overcome all the shit of shame and reached the end of the sewer channel, I saw you came to a dead end with a black brass gate which were locked with bars of iron. I saw you lose your peace and banged forcefully at it continuously hoping that someone will open the door.

JESUS: The black door is called the treasures of darkness. You are banging for the breakthrough of fame and riches of the world that We had promised you for the ministry so as be a voice of influence that the truth you had received from THE HOLY SPIRIT may be accepted. The octopus behind the door waiting to come out represents the abyss. Did you watch the movie "the Pirates of the Caribbean? If so, do you remember the octopus in the movie? It is from the bottomless pit. Octopi hides at the bottom of the sea, and they squirt out dark matters to blind its prey.

Satan had repeatedly used people who were energized by demons to reject and despise you like the rest of the people who were called. Through the shit of reproach, derision, and mocking, he had subtlety planted a seed of hunger for recognition or breakthrough which the victim was not conscious of. When you had overcome all the shame and was expecting a breakthrough, you will lose your peace when you see the dead end with the black gate locked by iron bars. That is why you are pounding at the gate in the flesh feeling intimidated in anxiety and confusion. At your most fragile moment, Lucifer, who had already positioned herself, will open the gate and offer you the treasure of darkness if you compromise with her offer by committing spiritual adultery with the world. Be warned of her seductive offers at your most venerable moment which We will permit you to be tested like when I was permitted to be tested by her in the wilderness. I did not fell for her seduction but returned in the power of the Spirit and fame of Me went throughout all the region (Luk 4:1-14).

Cyrus in Isaiah 45 was a type and shadow of you, Our Anointed One. My FATHER shall strengthen you to subdue nations, loose the loins of kings, and open this black gate of brass. However, it would only be opened for you when you overcome this intimidation, anxiety, confusion, and had kept your faith of righteousness, peace and joy in THE HOLY GHOST to have victory over Lucifer, the giant black octopus of death, and come forth and transform to be The Angel, "THE VICTORY".

Then, My FATHER will enpowered you to subdue nations; direct those kings to show you the two green leaved gates of favor and honor on the left and right respectively; and the gates shall not be shut; We will go before you, and We will remove all obstacles and hindrances along your paths and make your journey smooth: We will give you the treasures of darkness which is the stored house of heaven, and the hidden riches that are hidden in different parts of the earth which Lucifer through her princes have hidden in ancient time, that you may know that We, THE YAHWEH which have called your Name, the Sun of righteousness, am THE ELOHIM in Spiritual Israel.
What you have gone through is used as a precedent for My Anointed Ones, those who will be tested by THE FATHER to be a mini Cyrus. Like you, they will also rule with Me as Spiritual Israel.

Isa 45:1 Thus saith THE YAHWEH to his anointed, to Cyrus, whose right hand I have holden, to subdue nations before him; and I will loose the loins of kings, to open before him the two leaved gates; and the gates shall not be shut; Isa 45:2 I will go before thee, and make the crooked places straight: I will break in pieces the gates of brass, and cut in sunder the bars of iron: Isa 45:3 And I will give thee the treasures of darkness, and hidden riches of secret places, that thou mayest know that I, THE YAHWEH, which call thee by thy name, am THE ELOHIM of Israel.
Vision of K.DAVID Kneeling before THE FATHER in Shekinaih and Being Crowned

Shekinaih: I see you kneeling down before me who is inside THE FATHER. I recommended you for promotion. JESUS then endorsed my recommendation and gave you the title "King of kings" and "Lord of lords". He also gave me a golden robe, a scepter, a pair of shoes, and a belt to represent Him.

JESUS: When you are promoted by THE FATHER through Shekinaih, there will be many offers coming to you concurrently offering to promote you. I will do many miracles through you. Many dead will be raised and many who are sick and diseased will be healed through your hand as we have revealed to you through many visions and dreams by My prophets in the past and even now so through Shekinaih.
Vision of a Contract

Shekinaih: I see JESUS pass a contract to me with the words, "David's Book" written on it. He then said to me : "THE FATHER has given you equal rights and participation regarding David. Whatever THE FATHER intends to do to him, you also has a say in it."

JESUS: David, you must fear THE FATHER always. Submit to His representative Shekinaih whom THE FATHER has placed above you and your throne will be secured. There will come a time, when your fame is so great, that you feel you do not need to consult THE FATHER through her anymore, because you think you can hear directly from Me yourself; that moment will be the beginning of your downfall.

Shekinaih: I see a vision of you falling headlong from a cliff, and your head and bones were cracked, and you are bleeding. I then heard THE FATHER says to you, "I warn you now in order that this will not happen to you one day. Do not let your pride swell in your heart. My son, take heed to My warning."
Therefore, may THE FATHER gives you the grace to be humble.
Vision of K.DAVID Walking on a Tight Rope

In another vision, I saw THE FATHER in me was using my hand to support your hand as you climbed upward on a tight rope from a lower point to a higher point for every new breakthrough. After you have made it, THE TRINITY will use both our hands to support and help the rest of the army to obtain their every breakthrough.

JESUS: Warn My potential Brides/ Anointed Ones to guard their heart for it is easily polluted to supplant by force or treachery and made wicked, who can know? Therefore, whosoever My FATHER has put them under (especially Shekinaih and Aaron K David who represent us), they are to be faithful and sincere towards them as unto us for we will search their hearts and try their thoughts and rewards them according to their ways, and according to the fruit of their doings. As long as there is a stain or speck of untruthfulness or unfaithfulness in them, we will know and will confront and expose them.

Jer 17:9 The heart supplant (H6121 "aqob" from H6117 "aqab" to supplant) above all things, and desperately wicked: who can know it? Jer 17:10 I THE YAHWEH search the heart, I try the reins, even to give every man according to his ways, and according to the fruit of his doings.
Vision of How the Diabolos Enters a Person through His Evil Spirits

Shekinaih: I see a vision of how the Diabolos enters a person through evil spirits. Firstly, I saw the Diabolos/Accuser through his evil spirit in a form of a snake first whispers lies into a person's ear. If the person agrees with it, the authority or power that he received from THE YAHWEH over the evil spirit will leave him and return to us, and the snake will go inside him and energizes him. The person will become a captive and a host of the snake. He will feel the feeling of the snake. This snake can be the evil spirit of lust, bitterness, unbelief, jealousy and etc. If the person sincerely repents and asks my FATHER for forgiveness for agreeing with the snake and permitting it to enter him and control him at its will, after he had chose to submit to us through our representatives, the authority and power over the snake will be reinstated to him from us. He must then immediately command the snake to leave from him and all the people that are under him, and command it to go to the lake of fire to be burnt. He must continue to put the Adversary/Satan under his feet by submitting to us continually. He must be wise in things that are good and be unmixed with all appearance of evil by keeping peace in all situations so as not to be defiled (Diagram 1A).

Rom 16:19 For your obedience is come abroad unto all men. I am glad therefore on your behalf: but yet I would have you wise unto that which is good, and simple concerning evil. Rom 16:20 And THE ELOHIM of peace shall bruise Satan under your feet shortly. The grace of our YAHWEH JESUS CHRIST be with you. Amen.

JESUS: Yes, when a person resists to submit to Our representatives even slightly due to the offences scripted by My FATHER, his authority and power over the snakes/evil spirits will be returned to Me. And when the door of the heart of a person opens but slightly for about 0.1 cm, many snakes which are waiting outside will push open the door and fill his/her whole heart with themselves. They will defile and darken his affections and manifest all their affections and lusts through him. If that person repents and asks for forgiveness and choose to submit to THE FATHER, his authority will be returned to him. He must now command those evil spirits to leave from him and the people that are under him, and command them to go to the lake of fire to be burned. He must walk sincerely in holiness, shun from evil, and continue in the offences of THE TRINITY by keeping peace (Diagram 1B).
Shekinaih: I see JESUS carrying a white board with these words written on it: "SUBMIT TO THE ELOHIM, RESIST THE DIABOLOS/ACCUSER, AND HE WILL FLEE FROM YOU." (Diagram 1C)

JESUS: Yes, it is only through your true submission to the protocol of THE FATHER that the Daibolos/Accuser is bound by Our protocol to submit to you because he knows that he is bound by law to submit to you. If you submit to Our protocol, he will avoid you at all costs.

Jas 4:7 Submit yourselves therefore to THE ELOHIM. Resist (G436 "anthistemi" stand against) the devil (G1228 "diabolos" accuser), and he will flee (G5343 "phuego" to run away, to avoid, to shun) from you.
David: ABBA FATHER, teach me how we can submit to you.
How we CAN submit to THE ELOHIM?
1) Mind the Things of the Spirit

JESUS: As long as you walk in the flesh, you will be condemned by the Diabolos because the flesh delights in the lusts of the eyes, the lusts of the flesh and the pride of life, and is hostile against Our Law. Because of this, those who are in the flesh will neither be able to submit to THE FATHER nor please him. You must endeavor to mind the things of the spirit and not set your mind on transient things which will pass away with the Cosmos.

Rom 8:1 There is therefore now no condemnation to them which are in CHRIST JESUS, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit. Rom 8:2 For the law of the Spirit of life in CHRIST JESUS hath made me free from the law of sin and death. Rom 8:3 For what the law could not do, in that it was weak through the flesh, THE ELOHIM sending his own Son in the likeness of sinful flesh, and for sin, condemned sin in the flesh: Rom 8:4 That the righteousness of the law might be fulfilled in us, who walk not after the flesh, but after the Spirit. Rom 8:5 For they that are after the flesh do mind the things of the flesh; but they that are after the Spirit the things of the Spirit. Rom 8:6 For to be carnally minded is death; but to be spiritually minded is life and peace. Rom 8:7 Because the carnal mind is enmity against THE ELOHIM: for it is not subject to the law of THE ELOHIM, neither indeed can be. Rom 8:8 So then they that are in the flesh cannot please THE ELOHIM.
2) Stop Standing in YOur Own Righteousness

You can never appear righteous before THE FATHER through the flesh. This righteousness of the law is fulfilled through you believing, obeying, and submitting to the command of THE FATHER through Faith (PISTIS/ THE HOLY SPIRIT) in walking according to the Way of THE FATHER which will lead to your salvation. Only those who believe that I was raised from the dead through THE HOLY SPIRIT PISTIS, the Angel of Our Presence, SHE/HE (Shekinaih representing THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT/ He, Aaron K David representing JESUS) and submit to them who come in Our Name shall be restored to their pre-Adamic state.

Rom 10:3 For they being ignorant of THE ELOHIM's righteousness, and going about to establish their own righteousness, have not submitted themselves unto the righteousness of THE ELOHIM. Rom 10:4 For CHRIST is the end of the law for righteousness to everyone that believeth. Rom 10:5 For Moses describeth the righteousness which is of the law, That the man which doeth those things shall live by them. Rom 10:6 But the righteousness which is of faith (G4110 "Pistis"), speaketh on this wise, Say not in thine heart, Who shall ascend into heaven? (that is, to bring THE CHRIST down from above) Rom 10:7 Or, Who shall descend into the deep? (that is, to bring up THE CHRIST again from the dead.) Rom 10:8 But what saith it? The word is nigh thee, even in thy mouth, and in thy heart: that is, the word of faith (G4110 "Pistis"), which we preach; Rom 10:9 That if thou shalt confess with thy mouth THE YAHWEH JESUS, and shalt believe in thine heart that THE ELOHIM(through THE HOLY SPIRIT PISTIS) hath raised him from the dead, thou shalt be saved. Rom 10:10 For with the heart man believeth unto righteousness; and with the mouth confession is made unto salvation. Rom 10:11 For the scripture saith, Whosoever believeth on him shall not be ashamed. Rom 10:12 For there is no difference between the Jew and the Greek: for the same YAHWEH over all is rich unto all that call upon him. Rom 10:13 For whosoever shall call upon the name of THE YAHWEH shall be saved. Rom 10:14 How then shall they call on him in whom they have not believed? and how shall they believe in him of whom they have not heard? and how shall they hear without a preacher? Rom 10:15 And how shall they preach, except they be sent? as it is written, How beautiful are the feet of them that preach the gospel of peace, and bring glad tidings of good things!
3) Submit To the Higher Authorities

All authorities are ordained by THE FATHER. They are His ministers. Whether they are just or unjust, one is to submit to them as unto THE FATHER for conscience's sake. If anyone resist them, he shall fall into condemnation from the Diabolos as these authorities have the authority to punish any who break the law.

Rom 13:1 Let every soul be submit (G5293 "hupotasso") unto the higher authorities. For there is no authority but of THE ELOHIM: the authorities that be are ordained of THE ELOHIM. Rom 13:2 Whosoever therefore resisteth the authority, resisteth the ordinance of THE ELOHIM: and they that resist shall receive to themselves damnation.
Everyone ought to be mindful not only to submit to them but also to obey and be peaceable, gentle and meek towards them and not evil speak against them.
David, would you like to share with Shekinaih your conviction through THE HOLY SPIRIT in this area?

David: Once, I was in a taxi and the driver started a conversation with me. He was pouring out his frustrations and complained how the policies of the authorities had made his livelihood miserable. I was also affected as I listened to him and started to evil speak of them as well. Immediately, I had a headache, and I heard THE HOLY SPIRIT whispering to me that I must stop My evil speaking and repent, for I had given an occasion for the Diabolos to condemn me. From this incident, I started to understand this protocol of THE FATHER.

Tit 3:1 Put them in mind to be submit (G5293 "hupotasso") to principalities and authorities, to obey, to be ready to every good work, Tit 3:2 To speak evil of no man, to be no brawlers, but gentle, shewing all meekness unto all men.
JESUS: Everyone is to submit to every ordinance of the king or governors as servants of THE ELOHIM for THE YAHWEH'S sake.

1Pe 2:13 Submit (G5293 "hupotasso") yourselves to every ordinance of man for THE YAHWEH's sake: whether it be to the king, as supreme; 1Pe 2:14 Or unto governors, as unto them that are sent by him for the punishment of evildoers, and for the praise of them that do well.

Whether they are good and gentle or crooked, everyone is to submit to them for conscience's sake toward us even if one had suffered wrongfully. Learn of Me to take it patiently: when reviled, I revile not again; when suffered, I threaten not but commit myself to THE FATHER, the Righteous Judge.

1Pe 2:18 Servants, submit (G5293 "hupotasso") to your masters with all fear; not only to the good and gentle, but also to the froward. 1Pe 2:19 For this is thankworthy, if a man for conscience toward THE ELOHIM endure grief, suffering wrongfully. 1Pe 2:20 For what glory is it, if, when ye be buffeted for your faults, ye shall take it patiently? but if, when ye do well, and suffer for it, ye take it patiently, this is acceptable with THE ELOHIM.

Submitting to higher authorities also involves submitting to those whom THE FATHER has ordained to be over you. The wife submitting to the husband is an example of the order of THE ELOHIM. One is to submit to them in the fear of THE FATHER for conscience's sake so as not to fall into His wrath because of the blasphemy of the Diabolos.

1Pe 5:5 Likewise, ye younger, submit (G5293 "hupotasso") yourselves unto the elder. Yea, all of you submit (G5293 "hupotasso") one to another, and be clothed with humility: for THE ELOHIM resisteth the proud, and giveth grace to the humble. 1Pe 5:6 Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of THE ELOHIM, that he may exalt you in due time: 1Pe 5:7 Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you.

Eph 5:21 Submitting yourselves one to another in the fear of THE ELOHIM. Eph 5:22 Wives, submit yourselves unto your own husbands, as unto YAHWEH. Eph 5:23 For the husband is the head of the wife, even as THE CHRIST is the head of the church: and he is the saviour of the body. Eph 5:24 Therefore as the church is subject unto THE CHRIST, so let the wives be to their own husbands in everything.
4) Submit To the Chastening of THE FATHER

To submit to THE FATHER is to submit to His discipline. THE FATHER has orchestrated many tribulations, persecutions and oppressions in the path of those whom He have called to give them many opportunities to bear the Fruits of the Spirit of Holiness in order for them to partake of His holiness. The flesh will always protest and at times, due to being overwhelmed with grief, some will lose their peace and become discouraged and defiled by the spirit of bitterness and rebellion, thus giving an occasion for the Diabolos to condemn them as well as to disqualify them from going to Mount Zion and unto the Heavenly Jerusalem. Therefore, serve THE FATHER acceptably with reverence and godly fear through submitting to His chastening.

Heb 12:9 Furthermore we have had fathers of our flesh which corrected us, and we gave them reverence: shall we not much rather submit (GG5293 "hupotasso") unto the Father of spirits, and live? Heb 12:10 For they verily for a few days chastened us after their own pleasure; but he for our profit, that we might be partakers of his holiness. Heb 12:11 Now no chastening for the present seemeth to be joyous, but grievous: nevertheless afterward it yieldeth the peaceable fruit of righteousness unto them which are exercised thereby. Heb 12:12 Wherefore lift up the hands which hang down, and the feeble knees; Heb 12:13 And make straight paths for your feet, lest that which is lame be turned out of the way; but let it rather be healed. Heb 12:14 Follow peace with all men, and holiness, without which no man shall see THE YAHWEH: Heb 12:15 Looking diligently lest any man fail of the grace of THE ELOHIM; lest any root of bitterness springing up trouble you, and thereby many be defiled; Heb 12:16 Lest there be any fornicator, or profane person, as Esau, who for one morsel of meat sold his birthright.
Only after submitting to THE FATHER in the above areas will one be given authority over the angels and the authorities and powers.

1Pe 3:18 For CHRIST also hath once suffered for sins, the just for the unjust, that he might bring us to THE ELOHIM, being put to death in the flesh, but quickened by the Spirit: 1Pe 3:19 By which also he went and preached unto the spirits in prison; 1Pe 3:20 Which sometime were disobedient, when once the longsuffering of THE ELOHIM waited in the days of Noah, while the ark was a preparing, wherein few, that is, eight souls were saved by water. 1Pe 3:21 The like figure whereunto even baptism doth also now save us (not the putting away of the filth of the flesh, but the answer of a good conscience toward THE ELOHIM,) by the resurrection of JESUS CHRIST: 1Pe 3:22 Who is gone into heaven, and is on the right hand of THE ELOHIM; angels and authorities and powers being submitted (G5293 "hupotasso") unto him.
Resist the Diabolos
David: ABBA FATHER, how can one resist the Diabolos/Accuser?
JESUS: Before one learn how to resist the Diabolos, We must know who he is and his methods of deception against those whom We called into glory

The word "Diabolos" means the Accuser or Defamer. He is ordained by THE FATHER to be a tester for all who are called to glory. I am the leader and completer of the obedience of faith in the testing of THE FATHER. During the tests, the Diabolos accused Me every time that I was not worthy to be the Son of THE ELOHIM and tried to snare and provoke Me to miss the mark/sin. Firstly, he tested Me in the lust of the flesh by asking Me to command the stone to turn into bread. Secondly, he tried to snare Me in the pride of life by offering Me the kingdoms of the world. Lastly, he tried to snare Me in self-righteousness by asking Me to prove Myself as the Son of THE ELOHIM by throwing Myself from the pinnacle of the temple. After I had passed the entire tests, he left Me for a season but continued to test Me with the approval of THE FATHER. It was after these 3 tests that I was empowered by the Spirit to start My ministry and had authority and power over the Diabolos and his demons.

Luk 4:1 And JESUS being full of the Holy Ghost returned from Jordan, and was led by the Spirit into the wilderness, Luk 4:2 Being forty days tempted of the Diabolos. And in those days he did eat nothing: and when they were ended, he afterward hungered. Luk 4:3 And the Diabolos said unto him, If thou be the Son of THE ELOHIM, command this stone that it be made bread. Luk 4:4 And JESUS answered him, saying, It is written, That man shall not live by bread alone, but by every speech of THE ELOHIM. Luk 4:5 And the Diabolos, taking him up into an high mountain, shewed unto him all the kingdoms of the world in a moment of time. Luk 4:6 And the Diabolos said unto him, All this authority will I give thee, and the glory of them: for that is surrender (G3860 "paradidomi") unto me; and to whomsoever I will I give it. Luk 4:7 If thou therefore wilt worship me, all shall be thine. Luk 4:8 And JESUS answered and said unto him, Get thee behind me, Satan: for it is written, Thou shalt worship THE YAHWEH thy THE ELOHIM, and him only shalt thou serve. Luk 4:9 And he brought him to Jerusalem, and set him on a pinnacle of the temple, and said unto him, If thou be the Son of THE ELOHIM, cast thyself down from hence: Luk 4:10 For it is written, He shall give his angels charge over thee, to keep thee: Luk 4:11 And in their hands they shall bear thee up, lest at any time thou dash thy foot against a stone. Luk 4:12 And JESUS answering said unto him, It is said, Thou shalt not tempt THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM. Luk 4:13 And when the Diabolos had ended all the temptation, he departed from him for a season. Luk 4:14 And JESUS returned in the power of the Spirit into Galilee: and there went out a fame of him through all the region round about.

David, be like Me, THE FATHER has ordained the Diabolos to test you and those whom We have given both of you to be tested. The Diabolos will seek and study everyone of you by laying snares after learning all your weaknesses. Those seeds that fell by the way side refers to those who were always busy traversing in their daily endeavors and had no time to take the calling of THE FATHER seriously. To these people, the Diabolos will give them more work and enterprises to keep them busy so as to let them forget Our oracles regarding their destiny. Those seeds that fell on the rock refers to those who heard the oracle regarding their destiny but did not take the message seriously by rooting themselves in the oracle of truth and the love of THE FATHER. The Diabolos will make them fall away easily by making life harder for them by asking permission to test them more to try their hearts. Those seeds that fell among the thorns refers to them that heard the message but the Diabolos seduced them with the cares, riches, and pleasures of this life, thus he bound them with the spirit of error and whoredom with the world. These people will not be able to bear the Fruits of Holiness that are necessary to enter the Holy Mountain. Only the oracle that fell on the good ground, the Diabolos was not able to succeed in his tests to disqualify them, for these have honest and good hearts; having heard the oracle, guarded it like a precious treasure or pearl; and with patience, went through all the tests and bore the Fruits of Holiness to enter the Holy Mountain.

Luk 8:11 Now the parable is this: The seed is the oracle (G3056 "logos" something said including the thought) of THE ELOHIM. Luk 8:12 Those by the way side are they that hear; then cometh the Diabolos, and taketh away the oracle out of their hearts, lest they should believe and be saved. Luk 8:13 They on the rock are they, which, when they hear, receive the word with joy; and these have no root, which for a while believe, and in time of temptation fall away. Luk 8:14 And that which fell among thorns are they, which, when they have heard, go forth, and are choked with cares and riches and pleasures of this life, and bring no fruit to perfection. Luk 8:15 But that on the good ground are they, which in an honest and good heart, having heard the oracle, keep it, and bring forth fruit with patience.

In this world, the Diabolos has many children who long to test the Children of THE ELOHIM. They are all born liars, slanderers, and accusers like their father. Like the Diabolos, they will defame, accuse, and kill those who are called to be Spiritual Adams.

Joh 8:42 JESUS said unto them, If THE ELOHIM were your Father, ye would love me: for I proceeded forth and came from THE ELOHIM; neither came I of myself, but he sent me. Joh 8:43 Why do ye not understand my speech? even because ye cannot hear my word. Joh 8:44 Ye are of your father the Diabolos, and the lusts of your father ye will do. He was an Adam slayer from the beginning, and abode not in the truth, because there is no truth in him. When he speaketh a lie, he speaketh of his own: for he is a liar, and the father of it. Joh 8:45 And because I tell you the truth, ye believe me not. Joh 8:46 Which of you convinceth me of sin? And if I say the truth, why do ye not believe me? Joh 8:47 He that is of THE ELOHIM heareth THE ELOHIM'S words: ye therefore hear them not, because ye are not of THE ELOHIM.
In many situations, he will seduce and bribe others to put in their hearts to do his defamations and accusations. Judas Iscariot is an example. I have called him a Diabolos.

Joh 13:1 Now before the feast of the passover, when JESUS knew that his hour was come that he should depart out of this world unto the Father, having loved his own which were in the world, he loved them unto the end. Joh 13:2 And supper being ended, the Diabolos having now put into the heart of Judas Iscariot, Simon's son, to betray him;

Joh 6:70 JESUS answered them, Have not I chosen you twelve, and one of you is a diabolos? Joh 6:71 He spake of Judas Iscariot the son of Simon: for he it was that should betray him, being one of the twelve.

The Diabolos also positioned his children in high and influential positions to do his accusations and defamations. Elymas the sorcerer is one example. He withstood Paul and sought to turn away the Deputy of the Country from faith by speaking evil of Paul.

Act 13:6 And when they had gone through the isle unto Paphos, they found a certain sorcerer, a false prophet, a Jew, whose name was Barjesus: Act 13:7 Which was with the deputy of the country, Sergius Paulus, a prudent man; who called for Barnabas and Saul, and desired to hear the word of THE ELOHIM. Act 13:8 But Elymas the sorcerer (for so is his name by interpretation) withstood them, seeking to turn away the deputy from the faith.
The Diabolos can only have power over a person when he did not submit to THE ELOHIM through sinning (missing the mark).

Act 10:38 How THE ELOHIM anointed JESUS of Nazareth with the Holy Ghost and with power: who went about doing good, and healing all that were over powered (G2616 "katadunasteuo" exercise power over) of the Diabolos; for THE ELOHIM was with him.

The Diabolos has many methods to accuse those who are called. Having the kingdoms of the world surrendered to him by Adam, all his children are princes, authorities, and rulers in the world. Through them and his evil spirits in the heavens, he troubles and persecutes Our children. My elect are not to engage them in battle but to withstand their attacks and accusations with the oracle of truth engraved in their minds with steadfast faith and walk of peace, holding on to Our hope of restoration with patience by daily confessing Our oracle that was given to them. They are to pray always with all prayers and supplications in the spirit and watch with all perseverance and supplication for all the holy ones so that they, like Paul, may be able to make known the mystery of the gospel to those who are called.

Eph 6:10 Finally, my brethren, be strong in THE YAHWEH, and in the power of his might. Eph 6:11 Put on the whole armour of THE ELOHIM, that ye may be able to stand against the methods (G3180 "methodeia") of the Diabolos. Eph 6:12 For we wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against principalities, against authorities, against the rulers of the darkness of this age, against spiritual wickedness in high places. Eph 6:13 Wherefore take unto you the whole armour of THE ELOHIM, that ye may be able to withstand in the evil day, and having done all, to stand. Eph 6:14 Stand therefore, having your loins girt about with truth, and having on the breastplate of righteousness; Eph 6:15 And your feet shod with the preparation of the gospel of peace; Eph 6:16 Above all, taking the shield of faith, wherewith ye shall be able to quench all the fiery darts of the wicked. Eph 6:17 And take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the speech of THE ELOHIM: Eph 6:18 Praying always with all prayer and supplication in the Spirit, and watching thereunto with all perseverance and supplication for all saints; Eph 6:19 And for me, that utterance may be given unto me, that I may open my mouth boldly, to make known the mystery of the gospel, Eph 6:20 For which I am an ambassador in bonds: that therein I may speak boldly, as I ought to speak.

Shekinaih: I see a vision of Molech throwing playing cards on each person whom he chose to test and see who will take the bait. Those who took his bait were usually novices who had been lifted up with pride. He would then possessed and took them under his captivity to use them as his hosts to oppose those whom THE FATHER wants to use.

JESUS: Yes, the Diabolos likes to snare Our children by giving them occasions to puff up and later accuse and condemn them of their pride before us, knowing that My FATHER resists the proud but gives grace to the humble.

1 Ti 3:6 Not a novice, lest being lifted up with pride he fall into the condemnation of the Diabolos. 1 Ti 3:7 Moreover he must have a good report of them which are without; lest he fall into reproach and the snare of the Diabolos.

All those who are snared and captured by him are under his control, doing his will in opposing Our holy ones. You must not strive with them but instruct them in meekness hoping that THE FATHER will give them opportunities to repent to acknowledge the Truth in both of you.

2 Ti 2:24 And the servant of the YAHWEH must not strive; but be gentle unto all men, apt to teach, patient, 2 Ti 2:25 In meekness instructing those that oppose themselves; if THE ELOHIM peradventure will give them repentance to the acknowledging of the truth; 2 Ti 2:26 And that they may recover themselves out of the snare of the Diabolos, who are taken captive by him at his will.

The Diabolos is always occupying himself investigating whom he can swallow up through the spirit of ego, pride, self-righteousness, grief, bitterness and etc. THE FATHER has given him the permission to test and sift his children like wheat just like he sifted Simon Peter. The same afflictions need to be accomplished in all your brethren that are in the world who are called unto the eternal glory by Me..

1 Pe 5:8 Be sober, be vigilant; because your adversary the Diabolos, as a roaring lion, walketh about, seeking whom he may devour: 1 Pe 5:9 Whom resist stedfast in the faith, knowing that the same afflictions are accomplished in your brethren that are in the world. 1 Pe 5:10 But THE ELOHIM of all grace, who hath called us unto his eternal glory by CHRIST JESUS, after that ye have suffered a while, make you perfect, stablish, strengthen, settle you.

Therefore, all My called ones must be sober and vigilant of the Diabolos' devices to always remember that because the Diabolos missed the mark and came short of the glory of THE ELOHIM when he fell into pride and was therefore cast out of Mount Zion, the Garden of Eden, he will try to drag as many as he can to be in his shoes just to spite THE FATHER and prove his presumptuous theory that all the children who are from Heavenly Zion are like him.

1Jn 3:8 He that committeth sin is of the Diabolos; for the Diabolos sinneth from the beginning. For this purpose the Son of THE ELOHIM was manifested, that he might destroy the works of the Diabolos. 1Jn 3:9 Whosoever is born of THE ELOHIM doth not commit sin; for his seed remaineth in him: and he cannot sin, because he is born of THE ELOHIM. 1Jn 3:10 In this the Children of THE ELOHIM are manifest, and the children of the Diabolos: whosoever doeth not righteousness is not of THE ELOHIM, neither he that loveth not his brother.

Even though the Diabolos opposes you and My potential Brides/ Anointed Ones and tries his methods to disqualify you all from Heavenly Mount Zion, ye must not speak evil against him as he is still our servant, under Our authority obeying Our command. This is the protocol of heaven which Michael the archangel was fully aware when he disputed about the body of Moses. He did not evil speak the Diabolos in his judgment against him, but said: "THE YAHWEH rebuke thee."

Jud 1:8 Likewise also these filthy dreamers defile the flesh, despise dominion, and speak evil of dignities. Jud 1:9 Yet Michael the archangel, when contending with the Diabolos he disputed about the body of Moses, durst not bring against him a railing accusation, but said, THE YAHWEH rebuke thee. Jud 1:10 But these speak evil of those things which they know not: but what they know naturally, as brute beasts, in those things they corrupt themselves.

In the last days, the Diabolos, by false accusations and defamations through the authorities, shall cast some of My called out of the assembly of Spiritual Smyrna into prison to try them for ten days to see whether they will be faithful even unto death. Those who overcome it, shall be resurrected and receive a crown of eternal life.

Rev 2:8 And unto the angel of the church in Smyrna write; These things saith the first and the last, which was dead, and is alive; Rev 2:9 I know thy works, and tribulation, and poverty, (but thou art rich) and I know the blasphemy of them which say they are Jews, and are not, but are the synagogue of Satan. Rev 2:10 Fear none of those things which thou shalt suffer: behold, the Diabolos shall cast some of you into prison, that ye may be tried; and ye shall have tribulation ten days: be thou faithful unto death, and I will give thee a crown of life. Rev 2:11 He that hath an ear, let him hear what the Spirit saith unto the churches; He that overcometh shall not be hurt of the second death.

The Diabolos, the great red dragon Satan, through its manifestation in Lucifer and Molech, with their seven principalities/world leaders control the Cosmoses. These seven world leaders have 10 authorities under them which control the 10 major nations of the world and are in charge of the 70 rulers of darkness of this age ruling over 70 minor nations. Together with evil spirits in the heavenly places, they will deceive the whole world and influence the people to be hostile to My potential Brides/ Anointed Ones.

In the last days, he will try to prevent the incarnated Angel of THE YAHWEH from being glorified into Metatron. However, he will not succeed as the incarnated messenger will be caught up to heaven first followed by the Sons of THE ELOHIM who will follow his example in his martyrdom. After that, there will be a war in heaven between Michael the Archangel with his angels and the dragon with his angels. The Diabolos will be defeated and his territories taken. He and his evil angels of heaven will be cast down to Earth, and he will intensify his persecution on Mother Heavenly Jerusalem and her children by instructing the rulers of darkness of this age through his spokesman (the Beast from the Sea who rules the world on his behalf) to persecute them in every country and nation. But Metatron, together with the cloud of martyrs who were killed, resurrected, and glorified, will come down from heaven like eagles and carry the Brides to a safe place.

Rev 12:1 And there appeared a great wonder in heaven; a woman clothed with the sun, and the moon under her feet, and upon her head a crown of twelve stars: Rev 12:2 And she being with child cried, travailing in birth, and pained to be delivered. Rev 12:10 And I heard a loud voice saying in heaven, Now is come salvation, and strength, and the kingdom of our THE ELOHIM, and the power of his Christ: for the Accuser of our brethren is cast down, which accused them before our THE ELOHIM day and night. Rev 12:11 And they overcame him by the blood of the Lamb, and by the word of their testimony; and they loved not their lives unto the death. Woe to the inhabiters of the earth and of the sea! for the Diabolos is come down unto you, having great wrath, because he knoweth that he hath but a short time. Rev 12:13 And when the dragon saw that he was cast unto the earth, he persecuted the woman which brought forth the man child.
