Rev 12:15 And the serpent cast out of his mouth water as a flood after the woman, that he might cause her to be carried away of the flood. Rev 12:16 And the earth helped the woman, and the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed up the flood which the dragon cast out of his mouth. Rev 12:17 And the dragon was wroth with the woman, and went to make war with the remnant of her seed, which keep the commandments of THE ELOHIM, and have the testimony of JESUS CHRIST.

After they have overcome the Accuser by coming out of the tribulation, they will be restored to be the morning stars, and they shall rule the nations with a rod of iron and break them to shivers as the vessels of a potter.

Rev 2:26 And he that overcometh, and keepeth my works unto the end, to him will I give power over the nations: Rev 2:27 And he shall rule them with a rod of iron; as the vessels of a potter shall they be broken to shivers: even as I received of my Father. Rev 2:28 And I will give him the morning star.
These are incarnated being who are angels that were with us before the foundation of the Cosmoses
Job 38:6 Whereupon are the foundations thereof fastened? or who laid the corner stone thereof; Job 38:7 When the morning stars sang together, and all the sons of THE ELOHIM shouted for joy?

I will come as The Angel of My Presence in you, and together with Shekinaih and the morning stars, ye shall judge the goat's nations who are the followers of Satan. Ye shall be sent by us to places, cities and wilderness in the midst of dangers of robbers or of your own countrymen. Some of you shall be betrayed by false brethren to the authorites of Satan to be tortured, stoned, beaten with rods, thrown into prisons often, and threatened with deaths often by the nations that served the Diabolos. Some shall have to labour in weariness and painfulness: in watchings often, in hunger and thirst, in fastings often, in cold and nakedness. But those who treated you all well will be blessed of THE FATHER and inherit the kingdom, but those who ill-treated and persecuted you all will go away into everlasting punishment prepared for the Diabolos and his messengers (False Apostles and Prophets).

Mat 25:31 When the Son of Adam shall come in his glory, and all the holy angels (messengers/apostles and prophets) with him, then shall he sit upon the throne of his glory: Mat 25:32 And before him shall be gathered all nations: and he shall separate them one from another, as a shepherd divideth his sheep from the goats: Mat 25:33 And he shall set the sheep on his right hand, but the goats on the left. Mat 25:34 Then shall the King say unto them on his right hand, Come, ye blessed of my Father, inherit the kingdom prepared for you from the foundation of the Cosmos (G2889 "Kosmos"): Mat 25:35 For I was an hungred, and ye gave me meat: I was thirsty, and ye gave me drink: I was a stranger, and ye took me in: Mat 25:36 Naked, and ye clothed me: I was sick, and ye visited me: I was in prison, and ye came unto me. Mat 25:37 Then shall the righteous answer him, saying, YAHWEH, when saw we thee an hungred, and fed thee? or thirsty, and gave thee drink? Mat 25:38 When saw we thee a stranger, and took thee in? or naked, and clothed thee? Mat 25:39 Or when saw we thee sick, or in prison, and came unto thee? Mat 25:40 And the King shall answer and say unto them, Verily I say unto you, Inasmuch as ye have done it unto one of the least of these my brethren, ye have done it unto me. Mat 25:41 Then shall he say also unto them on the left hand, Depart from me, ye cursed, into everlasting fire, prepared for the Diabolos and his angels: Mat 25:42 For I was an hungred, and ye gave me no meat: I was thirsty, and ye gave me no drink: Mat 25:43 I was a stranger, and ye took me not in: naked, and ye clothed me not: sick, and in prison, and ye visited me not. Mat 25:44 Then shall they also answer him, saying, YAHWEH, when saw we thee an hungred, or athirst, or a stranger, or naked, or sick, or in prison, and did not minister unto thee? Mat 25:45 Then shall he answer them, saying, Verily I say unto you, Inasmuch as ye did it not to one of the least of these, ye did it not to me. Mat 25:46 And these shall go away into everlasting punishment: but the righteous into life eternal.

These are the tares that are sown among the Children of THE ELOHIM and are ungodly ministers of unrighteousness and lawlessness. They shall be gathered and burned in the fire at the end of the age by the true, glorified Apostles and Prophets

Mat 13:36 Then JESUS sent the multitude away, and went into the house: and his disciples came unto him, saying, Declare unto us the parable of the tares of the field. Mat 13:37 He answered and said unto them, He that soweth the good seed is the Son of Adam; Mat 13:38 The field is the Cosmos; the good seed are the children of the kingdom; but the tares are the children of the wicked one; Mat 13:39 The enemy that sowed them is the Diabolos/Accuser; the harvest is the end of the age; and the reapers are the angels. Mat 13:40 As therefore the tares are gathered and burned in the fire; so shall it be in the end of this age. Mat 13:41 The Son of Adam shall send forth his angels, and they shall gather out of his kingdom all things that offend, and them which do iniquity; Mat 13:42 And shall cast them into a furnace of fire: there shall be wailing and gnashing of teeth. Mat 13:43 Then shall the righteous shine forth as the sun in the kingdom of their Father. Who hath ears to hear, let him hear.

Following that, the Diabolos will be cast into the bottomless pit and shut up for a thousand years. During this period, our Anointed Ones will rule the world on behalf of THE FATHER and Me. Some shall be Our priests. And when the thousand years are expired, Satan shall be loosed out of his prison and shall go out to deceive the nations which are in the four quarters of the earth, Gog and Magog, to gather them together to battle; the number of whom is as the sand of the sea. And they went up on the breadth of the earth, and compassed the camp of the saints about, and the beloved city; and fire came down from THE ELOHIM out of heaven, and devoured them. And the Diabolos that deceived them was cast into the lake of fire and brimstone, where the beast and the false prophet are, and shall be tormented day and night for ever and ever.

Rev 20:1 And I saw an angel come down from heaven, having the key of the bottomless pit and a great chain in his hand. Rev 20:2 And he laid hold on the dragon, that old serpent, which is the Diabolos, and Satan, and bound him a thousand years, Rev 20:3 And cast him into the bottomless pit, and shut him up, and set a seal upon him, that he should deceive the nations no more, till the thousand years should be fulfilled: and after that he must be loosed a little season. Rev 20:4 And I saw thrones, and they sat upon them, and judgment was given unto them: and I saw the souls of them that were beheaded for the witness of JESUS, and for the word of THE ELOHIM, and which had not worshipped the beast, neither his image, neither had received his mark upon their foreheads, or in their hands; and they lived and reigned with THE CHRIST a thousand years. Rev 20:5 But the rest of the dead lived not again until the thousand years were finished. This is the first resurrection. Rev 20:6 Blessed and holy is he that hath part in the first resurrection: on such the second death hath no power, but they shall be priests of THE ELOHIM and of THE CHRIST, and shall reign with him a thousand years. Rev 20:7 And when the thousand years are expired, Satan shall be loosed out of his prison, Rev 20:8 And shall go out to deceive the nations which are in the four quarters of the earth, Gog and Magog, to gather them together to battle: the number of whom is as the sand of the sea. Rev 20:9 And they went up on the breadth of the earth, and compassed the camp of the saints about, and the beloved city: and fire came down from THE ELOHIM out of heaven, and devoured them. Rev 20:10 And the devil that deceived them was cast into the lake of fire and brimstone, where the beast and the false prophet are, and shall be tormented day and night for ever and ever.
Steps to Resist the Diabolos
1) Resist not Evil WITH EVIL but show Mercy

Part of the purpose for Our potential Brides/ Anointed Ones in ascending the Holy Mountain is to bear the Fruit of Mercy of Holiness. Thus, it is important that they do not resist evil with evil but to show mercy to those who smite them unreasonably, sue them wrongly, take away their coat by fraud, or compel them to walk a mile unjustly. They should instead love those who hate them, bless those who curse them, and pray for those who mock them. At the beginning of Our training in mercy, this persecution can come from people whom THE FATHER will harden and stir up for their training. These people can be their siblings, relatives, friends, pastors, church members, etc. At present, most people who are called are under this level of persecution, but they have already been defiled by bitterness and unforgiveness and have been swallowed up and disabled by the Spirit of Grief not knowing why the persecutions happen. If they cannot overcome this evil with mercy, they will definitely be disqualified when the real persecution from the Diabolos and his children comes.

Mat 5:38 Ye have heard that it hath been said, An eye for an eye, and a tooth for a tooth: Mat 5:39 But I say unto you, That ye resist not evil: but whosoever shall smite thee on thy right cheek, turn to him the other also. Mat 5:40 And if any man will sue thee at the law, and take away thy coat, let him have thy cloke also. Mat 5:41 And whosoever shall compel thee to go a mile, go with him twain. Mat 5:42 Give to him that asketh thee, and from him that would borrow of thee turn not thou away. Mat 5:43 Ye have heard that it hath been said, Thou shalt love thy neighbour, and hate thine enemy. Mat 5:44 But I say unto you, Love your enemies, bless them that curse you, do good to them that hate you, and pray for them which despitefully use you, and persecute you; Mat 5:45 That ye may be the children of your Father which is in heaven: for he maketh his sun to rise on the evil and on the good, and sendeth rain on the just and on the unjust. Mat 5:46 For if ye love them which love you, what reward have ye? do not even the publicans the same? Mat 5:47 And if ye salute your brethren only, what do ye more than others? do not even the publicans so? Mat 5:48 Be ye therefore perfect, even as your Father which is in heaven is perfect.

Luk 6:27 But I say unto you which hear, Love your enemies, do good to them which hate you, Luk 6:28 Bless them that curse you, and pray for them which despitefully use you. Luk 6:29 And unto him that smiteth thee on the one cheek offer also the other; and him that taketh away thy cloke forbid not to take thy coat also. Luk 6:30 Give to every man that asketh of thee; and of him that taketh away thy goods ask them not again. Luk 6:31 And as ye would that men should do to you, do ye also to them likewise. Luk 6:32 For if ye love them which love you, what thank have ye? for sinners also love those that love them. Luk 6:33 And if ye do good to them which do good to you, what thank have ye? for sinners also do even the same. Luk 6:34 And if ye lend to them of whom ye hope to receive, what thank have ye? for sinners also lend to sinners, to receive as much again. Luk 6:35 But love ye your enemies, and do good, and lend, hoping for nothing again; and your reward shall be great, and ye shall be the children of the Highest: for he is kind unto the unthankful and to the evil. Luk 6:36 Be ye therefore merciful, as your Father also is merciful.
2) Do not Premeditate what to Speak when Accused

In the last days under the Antichrist's reign, many will be falsely accused of crime before kings and rulers and will be charged in court and sent to prisons for My Name's sake. You are to settle in your hearts once and for all not to defend yourselves in the flesh (as these will come to nothing) but to wait for THE HOLY SPIRIT to give you a mouth and wisdom to speak to your adversaries that they shall not be able to gainsay nor resist.

Luk 21:12 But before all these, they shall lay their hands on you, and persecute you, delivering you up to the synagogues, and into prisons, being brought before kings and rulers for my name's sake. Luk 21:13 And it shall turn to you for a testimony. Luk 21:14 Settle it therefore in your hearts, not to meditate before what ye shall answer: Luk 21:15 For I will give you a mouth and wisdom, which all your adversaries shall not be able to gainsay nor resist.

In most of the time, when they cannot gainsay or resist you, they will put forth false witnesses stealthily to make you as offenders for the word you spoke or use the word you spoke out of context to convict you of the crime. Just like Stephen who was filled with wisdom and THE HOLY SPIRIT, you must not be afraid to die as a martyr.

Act 6:9 Then there arose certain of the synagogue, which is called the synagogue of the Libertines, and Cyrenians, and Alexandrians, and of them of Cilicia and of Asia, disputing with Stephen. Act 6:10 And they were not able to resist the wisdom and the spirit by which he spake. Act 6:11 Then they suborned men, which said, We have heard him speak blasphemous words against Moses, and against THE ELOHIM. Act 6:12 And they stirred up the people, and the elders, and the scribes, and came upon him, and caught him, and brought him to the council, Act 6:13 And set up false witnesses, which said, This man ceaseth not to speak blasphemous words against this holy place, and the law: Act 6:14 For we have heard him say, that this JESUS of Nazareth shall destroy this place, and shall change the customs which Moses delivered us. Act 6:15 And all that sat in the council, looking stedfastly on him, saw his face as it had been the face of an angel.
3) Resist Not the Authorities Even If They Are Unjust

At present, the Diabolos is in control of this present evil age. His children are the principalities, authorities, and rulers of darkness of this age ruling most of the nations. The Diabolos and his children have the law on their side, for the rules and regulations of the law were drafted according to their advantage. Therefore, ye are not to resist them as he and his children were ordained by THE FATHER to rule this age; for Adam had surrendered the kingdoms to him.

Rom 13:1 Let every soul be subject unto the higher authorities. For there is no authority but of THE ELOHIM: the authorities that be are ordained of THE ELOHIM. Rom 13:2 Whosoever therefore resisteth the authority, resisteth the ordinance of THE ELOHIM: and they that resist shall receive to themselves damnation.

Luk 4:5 And the Diabolos, taking him up into an high mountain, shewed unto him all the kingdoms of the world in a moment of time. Luk 4:6 And the Diabolos said unto him, All this authority will I give thee, and the glory of them: for that is surrendered (G3860 "paradidomi") unto me; and to whomsoever I will I give it. Luk 4:7 If thou therefore wilt worship me, all shall be thine.

Instead, empower the children that We have given both of you, THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by Shekinaih/JESUS represented by Aaron K David, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR CO-EXECUTING SABRE, The Angel of Our Presence, the dominion (G2904 "kratos") of Our arm, gird their minds with Our truth, and put on them the breastplate of righteousness of faith; shod their feet with the readiness to pursue peace; above all, help them to take up the shield of obedience of faith, wherewith they may be able to quench all the fiery, accusing and defaming darts of the wicked by taking hold the helmet of the hope of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, praying always with all prayer and supplication in the Spirit, and watching thereunto with all perseverance and supplication for all saints so that they may able to withstand the evil days and having done all, to stand.
Heb 12:14 Pursue (G1377 "dioko") peace with all men, and holiness, without which no man shall see the Lord:

Eph 6:10 Finally, my brethren, be empowered (G1743 "endunamoo") in THE YAHWEH, and in the dominion (G2904 "kratos") of his might (G2479 "ischus"). Eph 6:11 Put on the whole armour of THE ELOHIM, that ye may be able to stand against the wiles of the Diabolos. Eph 6:12 For we wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against principalities, against authorities, against the rulers of the darkness of this age, against spiritual wickedness in high places. Eph 6:13 Wherefore take unto you the whole armour of THE ELOHIM, that ye may be able to withstand in the evil day, and having done all, to stand. Eph 6:14 Stand therefore, having your loins girt about with truth, and having on the breastplate of righteousness; Eph 6:15 And your feet shod with the preparation of the gospel of peace; Eph 6:16 Above all, taking the shield of faith, wherewith ye shall be able to quench all the fiery darts of the wicked. Eph 6:17 And take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the speech of THE ELOHIM: Eph 6:18 Praying always with all prayer and supplication in the Spirit, and watching thereunto with all perseverance and supplication for all saints; Eph 6:19 And for me, that utterance may be given unto me, that I may open my mouth boldly, to make known the mystery of the gospel, Eph 6:20 For which I am an ambassador in bonds: that therein I may speak boldly, as I ought to speak.
4) Resist the Diabolos by Continuing to Humble Ourselves

The Diabolos finds easy prey on those who are proud. Paul called them novices because they are easily lifted up with pride and thus will fall into the condemnation of the Diabolos. Thus only by continuing to walk humbly before THE FATHER, will one receive grace to resist the Diabolos.
1Ti 3:6 Not a novice, lest being lifted up with pride he fall into the condemnation of the devil.

That is the reason why My FATHER will not permit the spirit of pride to continue to manifest in any of His called ones. Therefore, He will permit the Diabolos to humiliate them and at the same time permit them to undergo the tribulations and persecutions to break their pride, ego and self-righteousness so that He may restore their broken and contrite hearts completely, and make them steadfast in their hope of the gospel, and strengthen them in their faith in Our love and faithfulness, thus building a foundation in them.

1Pe 5:5 Likewise, ye younger, submit yourselves unto the elder. Yea, all of you be subject one to another, and be clothed with humility: for THE ELOHIM resisteth the proud, and giveth grace to the humble. 1Pe 5:6 Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of THE ELOHIM, that he may exalt you in due time: 1Pe 5:7 Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you. 1Pe 5:8 Be sober, be vigilant; because your adversary the Diabolos, as a roaring lion, walketh about, seeking whom he may devour: 1Pe 5:9 Whom resist stedfast in the faith, knowing that the same undergoing (G3804 "pathema") are accomplished (G2005 "epiteleo" to bring to an end) in your brethren that are in the world. 1Pe 5:10 But THE ELOHIM of all grace, who hath called us unto his eternal glory by CHRIST JESUS, after that ye have suffered a while, mend you thoroughly (G2675 "katartizo"), made steadfast (G4741 "sterizo"t), strengthen, settle (G2311 "themelioo" build a foundation) you.

The word "settle" G2311 "themelioo" means "to build a foundation". THE FATHER had purposed to build a foundation in their hearts by letting them to go through the strait gate of tribulations, persecutions, and oppressions from the Diabolos which is a part of the chastening of THE FATHER. Only those who do the will of THE FATHER by hearing and doing His will, will suffer for a while and then be mended thoroughly, made steadfast, strengthened, and settled by Him.

Mat 7:21 Not every one that saith unto me, THE YAHWEH, THE YAHWEH, shall enter into the Kingdom of Heaven; but he that doeth the will of my Father which is in heaven. Mat 7:22 Many will say to me in that day, THE YAHWEH, THE YAHWEH, have we not prophesied in thy name? and in thy name have cast out demons? and in thy name done many wonderful works? Mat 7:23 And then will I profess unto them, I never knew you: depart from me, ye that work iniquity. Mat 7:24 Therefore whosoever heareth these sayings of mine, and doeth them, I will liken him unto a wise man, which built his house upon a rock: Mat 7:25 And the rain descended, and the floods came, and the winds blew, and beat upon that house; and it fell not: for it was founded upon a rock.
5) He will Flee from You
Jas 4:7 Submit yourselves therefore to THE ELOHIM. Resist the Diabolos, and he will flee from you.

When someone minds the things of the spirit and not the things of the transient world and stop standing in his self-righteousness but submit to the higher authorities in humility as submitting to the chastening of THE FATHER even if they are unjust, the Diabolos and all of his demons will flee from him. Why is this so? It is because THE FATHER will deliver such a person from the hand of all his enemies. He will come to his cry and punish all that oppressed him in anger. Hell and death will flee from such a person for THE FATHER will hear his cry and come down with His angels to avenge him from his persecutors. According to his righteousness and cleanliness of his hands will THE FATHER compensate him because he has kept His Ways and has not wickedly departed from Him. As he is single-hearted and merciful, so THE FATHER will be single-hearted and merciful toward him. Because he is pure in heart, THE FATHER will also be pure toward him. THE FATHER will enlighten his darkness and give him the authority and power over his enemies. He makes him to walk on high places and teach him to war. He give The Angel of THE YAHWEH as the shield of his salvation to hold him up. Because of his gentleness, THE FATHER will make him great. He will enlarge his steps under him that his feet will not slip. He will pursue his enemies, and overtake them; neither will he turn again till they are consumed. He will wound them that they are not able to rise. They will be fallen under his feet, for THE FATHER will gird him with strength unto the battle and subdue under him those that rise up against him. THE FATHER will also give him the necks of his enemies and those that hate him that he might destroy them. There will be no more strivings of the people as THE FATHER will make him the head of the heathen, and the people whom he has not known shall serve him and obey and submit to him (Psa 18:1 -50). This was what happened to David.

This also happened to Joseph after THE FATHER tested him through many tribulations, persecutions and oppressions. He had to learn to maintain peace and joy through his tribulations, meekness of love through his persecutions, lowliness of mind in his oppressions and still continue to yield and be steadfast in trusting Him for the hope of the fulfilment of his dream. When Joseph had passed the test, THE FATHER compensated him by turning the heart of Pharaoh to loose him from prison and made him lord over his house and ruler over his people and all his substance to bind his princes at his pleasure and teach his senators wisdom.

Psa 105:16 Moreover he called for a famine upon the land: he brake the whole staff of bread. Psa 105:17 He sent a man before them, even Joseph, who was sold for a servant: Psa 105:18 Whose feet they hurt with fetters: he was laid in iron: Psa 105:19 Until the time that his word came: the word of THE YAHWEH tried him. Psa 105:20 The king sent and loosed him; even the ruler of the people, and let him go free. Psa 105:21 He made him lord of his house, and ruler of all his substance: Psa 105:22 To bind his princes at his pleasure; and teach his senators wisdom.

My potential Brides/ Anointed Ones should learn from the life of David and Joseph to obey and submit to the chastenings of THE FATHER, listen to His counsel, and walk according to His way so that He may subdue their enemies and fed and satisfied them with the finest of the wheat and honey out of the rock..

Psa 81:5 This he ordained in Joseph for a testimony, when he went out through the land of Egypt: where I heard a language that I understood not. Psa 81:6 I removed his shoulder from the burden: his hands were delivered from the pots. Psa 81:7 Thou calledst in trouble, and I delivered thee; I answered thee in the secret place of thunder: I proved thee at the waters of Meribah. Selah. Psa 81:8 Hear, O my people, and I will testify unto thee: O Israel, if thou wilt hearken unto me; Psa 81:9 There shall no strange god be in thee; neither shalt thou worship any strange god. Psa 81:10 I am THE YAHWEH thy THE ELOHIM, which brought thee out of the land of Egypt: open thy mouth wide, and I will fill it. Psa 81:11 But my people would not hearken to my voice; and Israel would none of me. Psa 81:12 So I gave them up unto their own hearts' lust: and they walked in their own counsels. Psa 81:13 Oh that my people had hearkened unto me, and Israel had walked in my ways! Psa 81:14 I should soon have subdued their enemies, and turned my hand against their adversaries. Psa 81:15 The haters of THE YAHWEH should have submitted themselves unto him: but their time should have endured forever. Psa 81:16 He should have fed them also with the finest of the wheat: and with honey out of the rock should I have satisfied thee.

Once My potential Brides/ Anointed Ones are able to submit to THE FATHER, resist the Diabolos/Accuser, My FATHER will give them the authority over Satan and his evil spirits and all their power, and nothing shall by any means hurt them. This is the reason why the Diabolos will flee from them, because he knows that he has no choice but to submit to them and this is very humiliating. Therefore, he prefers to flee and avoid them if it is possible.

Luk 10:16 He that heareth you heareth me; and he that despiseth you despiseth me; and he that despiseth me despiseth him that sent me. Luk 10:17 And the seventy returned again with joy, saying, Lord, even the demons are subject unto us through thy name. Luk 10:18 And he said unto them, I beheld Satan as lightning fall from heaven. Luk 10:19 Behold, I give unto you power to tread on serpents and scorpions, and over all the power of the enemy: and nothing shall by any means hurt you. Luk 10:20 Notwithstanding in this rejoice not, that the spirits are subject unto you; but rather rejoice, because your names are written in heaven.

Chapter 4 
Be Converted
David: LORD JESUS, what do you mean by "Be Converted"?
JESUS: David, please read Matthew 18:1-14 and I will reveal to you a mystery.

David: Mat 18:1 At the same time came the disciples unto JESUS, saying, Who is the greater (G3187 "meizon") in the Kingdom of Heaven? Mat 18:2 And JESUS called a child (G3813 "paidion") unto him, and set him in the midst of them, Mat 18:3 And said, Verily I say unto you, Except ye be converted (G4672 "strepho"), and become as this child (G3813 "paidion"), ye shall not enter into the Kingdom of Heaven. Mat 18:4 Whosoever therefore shall lower (G5013 "tapeinoo") himself as this child (G3813 "paidon"), the same is greater in the Kingdom of Heaven. Mat 18:5 And whoso shall receive truly this (G5108 "toioutos") child (G3813 "paidion"), in My name receiveth me. Mat 18:6 But whoso shall offend one of these little ones (G3398 "mikros") which believe in Me, it were better for him that a millstone were hanged about his neck, and that he were drowned in the depth of the sea. Mat 18:7 Woe unto the world because of offences! for it must needs be that offences come; but woe to that man by whom the offence cometh! Mat 18:8 Wherefore if thy hand or thy foot offend thee, cut them off, and cast them from thee: it is better for thee to enter into life halt or maimed, rather than having two hands or two feet to be cast into everlasting fire. Mat 18:9 And if thine eye offend thee, pluck it out, and cast it from thee: it is better for thee to enter into life with one eye, rather than having two eyes to be cast into hell fire. Mat 18:10 Take heed that ye despise not one of these little ones (G3398 "mikros"); for I say unto you, That in heaven their angels do always behold the face of My Father which is in heaven. Mat 18:11 For the Son of man is come to save that which was lost. Mat 18:12 How think ye? if a man have an hundred sheep, and one of them be gone astray, doth he not leave the ninety and nine, and goeth into the mountains, and seeketh that which is gone astray? Mat 18:13 And if so be that he find it, verily I say unto you, he rejoiceth more of that sheep, than of the ninety and nine which went not astray. Mat 18:14 Even so it is not the will of your Father which is in heaven, that one of these little ones (G3398 "mikros") should perish.
JESUS: The child (G3813 "paidion") signifies you, Metatron, the youth who is the greatest in the Kingdom of Heaven: only in the throne will Shekinaih be greater than you.

David, it is expedient for you to be converted first so as to be an example for the children whom THE FATHER have given both of you to be converted. If not, they will never really see the Kingdom and enter into it for it is through you, they are regenerated by the washing of My oracle, and through Shekinaih are their minds renovated.

Tit 3:4 But after that the kindness and love of THE ELOHIM our Saviour toward man appeared, Tit 3:5 Not by works of righteousness which we have done, but according to his mercy he saved us, by the washing of regeneration, and renewing of the Holy Ghost; Tit 3:6 Which he shed on us abundantly through Jesus Christ our Saviour; Tit 3:7 That being justified by his grace, we should be made heirs according to the hope of eternal life.
Unless you are converted to be the least like a mustard seed and be broken, THE FATHER will not make you the greatest by giving you authority over the angels signified by the birds of the air.

Mat 13:31 Another parable put he forth unto them, saying, The Kingdom of Heaven is like to a grain of mustard seed (G4615 "sinapi" to hurt), which a man took, and sowed in his field: Mat 13:32 Which indeed is the least (G3998 "mikros") of all seeds: but when it is grown, it is the greatest among herbs, and becometh a tree, so that the birds of the air come and lodge in the branches thereof.

Therefore, you must make yourself small by esteeming others better than yourself. Do not be offended and defend youself if you are being squeezed physically, sued unjustly or persecuted unreasonably.You are to turn from your carnal mind to a spiritual mind in your response toward your enemies which is contrary to how our flesh will respond. In a twist, you must love those who hate you, pray for those who take advantage and persecute you. Think and see and set your affections according to the heart of THE FATHER. Be converted to be merciful like THE FATHER in heaven.

Mat 5:38 Ye have heard that it hath been said, An eye for an eye, and a tooth for a tooth: Mat 5:39 But I say unto you, That ye resist not evil: but whosoever shall smite thee on thy right cheek, be converted (G4672 "strepho"), to him the other also. Mat 5:40 And if any man will sue thee at the law, and take away thy coat, let him have thy cloke also. Mat 5:41 And whosoever shall compel thee to go a mile, go with him twain. Mat 5:42 Give to him that asketh thee, and from him that would borrow of thee turn not thou away. Mat 5:43 Ye have heard that it hath been said, Thou shalt love thy neighbour, and hate thine enemy. Mat 5:44 But I say unto you, Love your enemies, bless them that curse you, do good to them that hate you, and pray for them which despitefully use you, and persecute you; Mat 5:45 That ye may be the children of your Father which is in heaven: for he maketh his sun to rise on the evil and on the good, and sendeth rain on the just and on the unjust. Mat 5:46 For if ye love them which love you, what reward have ye? do not even the publicans the same? Mat 5:47 And if ye salute your brethren only, what do ye more than others? do not even the publicans so? Mat 5:48 Be ye therefore perfect, even as your Father which is in heaven is perfect.

To be converted is to set your mind or affections seeing from the eyes of THE FATHER. I was converted for I knew that it was necessary that I suffered many things of the elders and chief priests and scribes, and be killed, and be raised again the third day so as to fulfil the will of THE FATHER. But Peter was not converted at that time, he was still in the flesh, feeling that it was an insult, and it was unjust that I, the Son of THE ELOHIM should suffer debasement and killed undeservingly by the wicked, thus he tried to stop Me from going into Jerusalem. I scolded him for not setting his affection and mind according to the heart of THE FATHER as one who was converted.

To be converted, is to be ready to deny oneself, and take up one's cross, and follow Me. For whosoever will save his life shall lose it: and whosoever will lose his life for My sake shall find it. Other than literally losing one's life, metaphorically it means to forsake one's pride to be lowly in heart and mind, forsake one's right to defend and vindicate oneself when treated wrongly, and finally forsake one's ego by emptying oneself and esteeming others better than oneself so that one will be rewarded by Me when I come in The Angel of My Presence with My angels.

Mat 16:21 From that time forth began JESUS to shew unto his disciples, how that he must go unto Jerusalem, and suffer many things of the elders and chief priests and scribes, and be killed, and be raised again the third day. Mat 16:22 Then Peter took him, and began to rebuke him, saying, Be it far from thee, lord: this shall not be unto thee. Mat 16:23 But he being converted (G4762 "strepho"), and said unto Peter, Get thee behind me, adversary (G4567 "satanas"): thou art an offence unto me: for thou set your affection (G5426 "phroneo") not the things that be of THE ELOHIM, but those that be of men. Mat 16:24 Then said JESUS unto his disciples, If any man will come after me, let him deny himself, and take up his cross, and follow me. Mat 16:25 For whosoever will save his life shall lose it: and whosoever will lose his life for my sake shall find it. Mat 16:26 For what is a man profited, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul? or what shall a man give in exchange for his soul? Mat 16:27 For the Son of Adam shall come in the glory of his Father with his angels; and then he shall reward every man according to his works. Mat 16:28 Verily I say unto you, There be some standing here, which shall not taste of death, till they see the Son of man coming in his kingdom.

To be converted is to turn one's course of thinking seeing from the perspective of the Protocol of heaven like the centurion in Luke 7:1-10 who was spiritually minded and had great faith in the ordained authority. Usually, our submission to authority is based on whether we respect the one who has the authority over us or whether he is righteous and just. But to those who are converted, they will obey the one who has the authority ordained by THE FATHER, and will submit to them even if they are unrighteous and unjust. Therefore, we need to be converted and spiritually minded to sanctify THE FATHER and not to be self-righteous.

Luk 7:1 Now when he had ended all his sayings in the audience of the people, he entered into Capernaum. Luk 7:2 And a certain centurion's servant, who was dear unto him, was sick, and ready to die. Luk 7:3 And when he heard of JESUS, he sent unto him the elders of the Jews, beseeching him that he would come and heal his servant. Luk 7:4 And when they came to JESUS, they besought him instantly, saying, That he was worthy for whom he should do this: Luk 7:5 For he loveth our nation, and he hath built us a synagogue. Luk 7:6 Then JESUS went with them. And when he was now not far from the house, the centurion sent friends to him, saying unto him, Lord, trouble not thyself: for I am not worthy that thou shouldest enter under my roof: Luk 7:7 Wherefore neither thought I myself worthy to come unto thee: but say in a word, and my servant shall be healed. Luk 7:8 For I also am a man set under authority, having under me soldiers, and I say unto one, Go, and he goeth; and to another, Come, and he cometh; and to my servant, Do this, and he doeth it. Luk 7:9 When JESUS heard these things, he marveled at him, and being converted (G4672 "strepho"), said unto the people that followed him, I say unto you, I have not found so great faith, no, not in Israel. Luk 7:10 And they that were sent, returning to the house, found the servant whole that had been sick.

In the last days, many who are called to the Kingdom of Heaven will not be able to partake My Great Supper. The reason is that most are not converted because they esteemed themselves and their works higher in priority than setting their affections on the things that are of THE FATHER. They are not converted to forsake all for the Kingdom of Heaven. Their land, oxen, wife, and themselves are more important than doing the will of THE FATHER or entering into the Kingdom. The poor, the maimed, the halt, and the blind who are compelled to the Great Supper signify those who are converted and make themselves least in the Kingdom of heaven.

Luk 14:15 And when one of them that sat at meat with him heard these things, he said unto him, Blessed is he that shall eat bread in the kingdom of THE ELOHIM. Luk 14:16 Then said he unto him, A certain man made a great supper, and bade many: Luk 14:17 And sent his servant at supper time to say to them that were bidden, Come; for all things are now ready. Luk 14:18 And they all with one consent began to make excuse. The first said unto him, I have bought a piece of ground, and I must needs go and see it: I pray thee have me excused. Luk 14:19 And another said, I have bought five yoke of oxen, and I go to prove them: I pray thee have me excused. Luk 14:20 And another said, I have married a wife, and therefore I cannot come. Luk 14:21 So that servant came, and shewed his lord these things. Then the master of the house being angry said to his servant, Go out quickly into the streets and lanes of the city, and bring in hither the poor, and the maimed, and the halt, and the blind. Luk 14:22 And the servant said, Lord, it is done as thou hast commanded, and yet there is room. Luk 14:23 And THE YAHWEH said unto the servant, Go out into the highways and hedges, and compel them to come in, that my house may be filled. Luk 14:24 For I say unto you, That none of those men which were bidden shall taste of my supper. Luk 14:25 And there went great multitudes with him: and he being converted (G4762 "strepho"), and said unto them, Luk 14:26 If any man come to me, and hate not his father, and mother, and wife, and children, and brethren, and sisters, yea, and his own life also, he cannot be my disciple. Luk 14:27 And whosoever doth not bear his cross, and come after me, cannot be my disciple. Luk 14:28 For which of you, intending to build a tower, sitteth not down first, and counteth the cost, whether he have sufficient to finish it? Luk 14:29 Lest haply, after he hath laid the foundation, and is not able to finish it, all that behold it begin to mock him, Luk 14:30 Saying, This man began to build, and was not able to finish. Luk 14:31 Or what king, going to make war against another king, sitteth not down first, and consulteth whether he be able with ten thousand to meet him that cometh against him with twenty thousand? Luk 14:32 Or else, while the other is yet a great way off, he sendeth an ambassage, and desireth conditions of peace. Luk 14:33 So likewise, whosoever he be of you that forsaketh not all that he hath, he cannot be my disciple. Luk 14:34 Salt is good: but if the salt have lost his savour, wherewith shall it be seasoned? Luk 14:35 It is neither fit for the land, nor yet for the dunghill; but men cast it out. He that hath ears to hear, let him hear.

I reiterate, to be converted, you must be spiritually minded by esteeming others better than yourself to be the least, forsaking all that you have, loving Me and doing the will of THE FATHER above your love for your father, mother, children, brethren, sisters, or your life which includes your right, ego, self-righteousness, pride, and etc.

David, be broken and contrite, be converted like a child in the Kingdom of Heaven with purity of heart, mind, spirit, perfecting in holiness in the fear of THE TRINITY, and My Archangel Metatron, The Youth, shall unite with you.

Chapter 5 
Broken and Contrite Spirit
David: LORD JESUS, what is the fastest way to be broken and contrite?

JESUS: Learn from King David of old who is quick to repent with deep remorse when he was judged by My FATHER when he transgressed against us; when he commited adultery and murdered Uriah and give occasion for Satan to scorn THE FATHER. His sacrifice of broken and contrite heart is sweet fragrance before My FATHER..

Psa 51:1 To the chief Musician, A Psalm of David, when Nathan the prophet came unto him, after he had gone in to Bathsheba. Have mercy upon me, O THE ELOHIM, according to thy lovingkindness: according unto the multitude of thy tender mercies blot out my transgressions. Psa 51:2 Wash me throughly from mine iniquity, and cleanse me from my sin. Psa 51:3 For I acknowledge my transgressions: and my sin is ever before me. Psa 51:4 Against thee, thee only, have I sinned, and done this evil in thy sight: that thou mightest be justified when thou speakest, and be clear when thou judgest. Psa 51:5 Behold, I was shapen in iniquity; and in sin did my mother conceive me. Psa 51:6 Behold, thou desirest truth in the inward parts: and in the hidden part thou shalt make me to know wisdom. Psa 51:7 Purge me with hyssop, and I shall be clean: wash me, and I shall be whiter than snow. Psa 51:8 Make me to hear joy and gladness; that the bones which thou hast broken may rejoice. Psa 51:9 Hide thy face from my sins, and blot out all mine iniquities. Psa 51:10 Create in me a clean heart, O THE ELOHIM; and renew a right spirit within me. Psa 51:11 Cast me not away from thy presence; and take not thy holy spirit from me. Psa 51:12 Restore unto me the joy of thy salvation; and uphold me with thy free spirit. Psa 51:13 Then will I teach transgressors thy ways; and sinners shall be converted unto thee. Psa 51:14 Deliver me from bloodguiltiness, O THE ELOHIM, thou THE ELOHIM of my salvation: and my tongue shall sing aloud of thy righteousness. Psa 51:15 O Lord, open thou my lips; and my mouth shall shew forth thy praise. Psa 51:16 For thou desirest not sacrifice; else would I give it: thou delightest not in burnt offering. Psa 51:17 The sacrifices of THE ELOHIM are a broken (H7665 "shabar") spirit: a broken (H7665) and a contrite (H1794 "dakah") heart, O THE ELOHIM, thou wilt not despise.

Learn from Moses, who repented fast after he suffered the anger and wrath of My FATHER; who crushed his spirit and heart by forbidding him to enter into the promised land; when he was not faithful to do as commanded; when he hit the rock twice instead of speaking unto it; thus not sanctifying Him (Num 20:7-12).

Moses paid a great price for knowing His ways; for His Name, THE YAHWEH is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy. He will not always chide: neither will he keep his anger for ever. He hath not dealt with us after our sins; nor rewarded us according to Our iniquities. For as the heaven is high above the earth, so great is His mercy towards them that fear Him. As far as the east is from the west, so far hath He removed Our transgressions from us. Like as a father pitieth his children, so He pitieth them that fear us. For he knoweth Our frame; he remembereth that we are dust. As for man, his days are as grass: as a flower of the field, so he flourisheth. For the wind passeth over it, and it is gone; and the place thereof shall know it no more. But His mercy is from everlasting to everlasting upon them that fear Him, and His righteousness unto children's children; To such as keep His Covenant, and to those that remember his commandments to do them. THE YAHWEH hath prepared His throne in the heavens; and His kingdom ruleth over all.

JESUS: David, would you like to share with Shekinaih the vision of a heart of diamond?
Vision of a Heart Made Of Diamond

David: One day while I was praying with a seer pleading to THE FATHER to heal my broken heart because of the reproaches He put me through all those years, he saw a vision of THE FATHER'S hand coming down from heaven towards my heart. Expecting to be healed by His touch, I was horrified when he told me that he saw THE FATHER grabbed my heart with His hand and crushed it, and threw it hard on the floor which shattered into many pieces like broken glasses. Upon hearing that, I was in despair. Next, he told me that THE FATHER gathered the broken pieces with His hand and turned them into a heart made of diamond. I was perplexed when I heard that. As I meditated on this vision, I heard the voice of THE HOLY SPIRIT speaking these words: "When your FATHER has finished breaking you, He will heal you and turn your heart to be as hard as diamond and He shall dwell in it."

THE FATHER: I have purposed fifteen years to break you in order for you to remain broken and contrite on a sustainable state. I can give you a new heart and an upright and willing spirit to obey Me. It is My grace, but grace is given to those who are lowly in heart and mind and are single toward Me. Through your subservient attitude towards Shekinaih, I will weigh your singleness.My breaking is lighter if you yield to her promptly in meekness of love and lowliness of mind and not contend with her in Our breaking through her . If you resist Our chastening through her, My breaking will be severe for We will use her to crush and powder you.

The Race of the Fittest
David: LORD JESUS, teach us the protocol so that we can finish the Race of faith to enter into THE FATHER'S rest?
1) Know What You Are Running For

JESUS: Before one runs in a race, he must know what the prize that he is running for and whether it is worth the sacrifice. You are running for the prize of eternal life, the prize of the crown of righteousness, and the prize of winning the title of a Christ so as to obtain the power of His resurrection through the fellowship of His sufferings, being made conformable unto His death. If you are running for other things, you are in the wrong race and you are running in vain. Finishing to a finish line in each race is a means to an end. If you do not persevere to reach the ultimate finishing line, you have missed the mark.

Php 3:12 Not as though I had already attained, either were already perfect: but I follow after, if that I may apprehend that for which also I am apprehended of CHRIST JESUS. Php 3:13 Brethren, I count not myself to have apprehended: but this one thing I do, forgetting those things which are behind, and reaching forth unto those things which are before, Php 3:14 I press toward the mark for the prize of the high calling of THE ELOHIM in CHRIST JESUS. Php 3:15 Let us therefore, as many as be perfect, be thus minded: and if in anything ye be otherwise minded, THE ELOHIM shall reveal even this unto you.
2) Know Who You Are Fighting Against

Eph 6:17 And take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of THE ELOHIM: Eph 6:18 Praying always with all prayer and supplication in the Spirit, and watching thereunto with all perseverance and supplication for all saints;

Heb 12:3 For consider him that endured such contradiction of sinners against himself, lest ye be wearied and faint in your minds.
3) Know The Price You Have To Pay

Take no thought for where to lay your head, the need to bury the dead, your obligation to your loved ones instead of preaching the true gospel to My elect. You shall be tested in this area and if you look back, you will not be able to finish the race to enter into My Kingdom.
I am come to send fiery trial to those We have chosen on the earth; and what will I, if it be already kindled?

There is a baptism unto My death for My elect; and how am I straitened till it be accomplished! Suppose ye that I am come to give peace on earth? I tell you, Nay; but rather division: For from henceforth there shall be five in one house divided, three against two, and two against three. The father shall be divided against the son, and the son against the father; the mother against the daughter, and the daughter against the mother; the mother in law against her daughter-in-law, and the daughter-in-law against her mother-in-law (Luk 12:49-53).

Therefore, If any man come to Me, and love not lesser his father, and mother, and wife, and children, and brethren, and sisters, yea, and his own life also than Me, he cannot be My disciple to finish the race. And whosoever do not crucify his flesh with the affections and lusts to perfect holiness in the fear of THE FATHER, and come after Me, cannot be My disciple to finish the race. For which of you, intending to build a tower, sitteth not down first, and counteth the cost, whether he have sufficient to finish it? Lest haply, after he hath laid the foundation, and is not able to finish it, all that behold it begin to mock him, Saying, This man began to build, and was not able to finish. Or what king, going to make war against another king, sitteth not down first, and consulteth whether he be able with ten thousand to meet him that cometh against him with twenty thousand? Or else, while the other is yet a great way off, he sendeth an ambassador, and desireth conditions of peace. So likewise, whosoever he be of you that forsaketh not all that he hath, he cannot be My disciple to finish the race. Salt is good: but if the salt have lost his savour, wherewith shall it be seasoned? It is neither fit for the land, nor yet for the dunghill; but men cast it out. I say this to you and the children whom My FATHER have given both of you. Ye must first have salt among yourselves to preserve yourselves, then are ye able to preserve others. He that hath ears to hear, let him hear (Luk 14:26-34).

4) Know How to Fight

1Co 9:24 Know ye not that they which run in a race run all, but one receiveth the prize? So run, that ye may obtain. 1Co 9:25 And every man that strives for the mastery is temperate in all things. Now they do it to obtain a corruptible crown; but we an incorruptible. 1Co 9:26 I therefore so run, not as uncertainly; so fight me, not as one that beateth the air: 1Co 9:27 But I keep under (G5299 "hupopiazo") my body, and bring it into subjection: lest that by any means, when I have preached to others, I myself should be a castaway.

The word "keep under" in Verse 27 from Thayer Definition G5299 "hupopiazo" means "buffet, to smite so as to cause bruises and livid spots, like a boxer who buffets his body." In a boxing competition, the contestor who wins in a fight is not always the fighter who can punch well, but who also able to take the punches. If a boxer is not trained to endure punches, he will be knocked out easily. THE FATHER is training you in your endurance in taking the punches of shame through tribulations and persecutions that He has orchestrated so that ye may bear the Peaceable Fruit of Righteousness unto holiness if you yield to his training by emptying yourself.

Jas 2:13 For he shall have judgment without mercy, that hath shewed no mercy; and mercy rejoiceth against judgment.

Shekinaih: I see a giant snake by the name of "Self-Righteousness" whispering to the ears of The Brides and Anointed Ones. Without hesitation, they began to judge and pass sentence on one another's fault without showing mercy or compassion.
JESUS: They have put themselves in the danger of judgment by the Diabolos/Accuser by agreeing and yielding to the snake to be an accuser of the brethren.

Mat 5:21 Ye have heard that it was said by them of old time, Thou shalt not kill; and whosoever shall kill shall be in danger of the judgment: Mat 5:22 But I say unto you, That whosoever is angry with his brother without a cause (G1500 from G1502 "eiko") shall be in danger of the judgment: and whosoever shall say to his brother, Raca, shall be in danger of the council: but whosoever shall say, Thou fool, shall be in danger of hell fire. Mat 5:23 Therefore if thou bring thy gift to the altar, and there rememberest that thy brother hath ought against thee; Mat 5:24 Leave there thy gift before the altar, and go thy way; first be reconciled to thy brother, and then come and offer thy gift. In Matthew 5:22, the word translated "without a cause" G1500 "eike" is from G1502 "eiko" (through the idea of failure). It means "to be weak, to give a place".

The real meaning for Matthew 5:22 is: if you are angry with your brother and judge him as worthless and stupid because of his weakness when he yielded to temptation and sin; you are in the danger of judgment and hell fire.

What Is The Meaning of, "Be Circumcised"?
To be circumcised, one needs to empty his/her carnality ways of seeing, judging and doing things.
One needs to come to an end of himself/herself and ask for Mine counsel or wisdom in seeing, assessing, and doing things from My perspective.

Nevertheless, one must avail himself/herself for the circumcision of his/her heart through denying himself/herself, taking up his/her cross and be crucified by Me on that cross, and put on My nature which is to be connected with My FATHER through abiding in My words and thereby abiding in us and will be transformed by us and behold Our likeness in that being like-minded with us; and thereby being inaugurated by us through Our representatives Shekinaih and Aaron K David to be made ready to assume as Our archangels fully arrayed with their respective weapons to fulfil their high standing duties.

But those who think they are wise and boast in their fleshly wisdom, might, earthly riches, are wise in their own eyes and in their way not acknowledging us with fear and remain uncircumcised in the heart. These shall be punished by us in the day of judgment together with the Jews and the nations that are uncircumcised in heart.

Jer 9:25 Behold, the days come, saith THE YAHWEH, that I will punish all them which are circumcised with the uncircumcised; Jer 9:26 Egypt, and Judah, and Edom, and the children of Ammon, and Moab, and all that are in the utmost corners, that dwell in the wilderness: for all these nations are uncircumcised, and all the house of Israel are uncircumcised in the heart.

THE FATHER: Verily, verily, verily, I say unto you, be aware of dogs who will bite you in return if you throw My precious revelation unto you to them; who do not appreciate it nor understand the ways of My Kingdom; for they are being blinded by the devil and have thereby taken them captive at his will to arouse those present with their long false accusation, confusion and led others astray with them as well. How to Be Circumcised
JESUS: In summary, to be circumcised is to obey My FATHER'S commands through the heart in the spirit.
1Co 7:19 Circumcision is nothing, and uncircumcision is nothing, but the keeping of the commandments of THE ELOHIM.
Rom 2:29 But he is a Jew, which is one inwardly; and circumcision is that of the heart, in the spirit, and not in the letter; whose praise is not of men, but of THE ELOHIM.
If you do this, like Abraham and I, you shall be sealed with a seal of the righteousness which is a sign of your circumcision of your obedience of faith.
Joh 6:27 Labour not for the meat which perisheth, but for that meat which endureth unto everlasting life, which the Son of man shall give unto you: for him hath THE ELOHIM the Father sealed.

This faith is energized by My FATHER'S love for you.
Gal 5:6 For in JESUS CHRIST neither circumcision availeth anything, nor uncircumcision; but faith which energize by love.
Therefore, be circumcised in hearts and ears, and do not be stiffnecked and uncircumcised in heart and ears in resisting THE HOLY SPIRIT nor take Our correction as a reproach which you delight not.

Jer 6:10 To whom shall I speak, and give warning, that they may hear? Behold, their ear is uncircumcised, and they cannot hearken: behold, the word of THE YAHWEH is unto them a reproach; they have no delight in it.
Act 7:51 Ye stiffnecked and uncircumcised in heart and ears, ye do always resist the Holy Ghost: as your fathers did, so do you.
Be acquainted with Our offences, submit to Our discipline by humbling yourself. If you do not submit to the discipline of THE FATHER, He will not let you go but grind you into powder.

Mat 21:42 JESUS saith unto them, Did ye never read in the scriptures, The stone which the builders rejected, the same is become the head of the corner: this is THE YAHWEH's doing, and it is marvellous in our eyes? Mat 21:43 Therefore say I unto you, The kingdom of THE ELOHIM shall be taken from you, and given to a nation bringing forth the fruits thereof. What THE FATHER has determined to do to you, He will do it whether you like it or not. Be it 15 or 20 years. The duration of your breaking depends on you, for the decision lies with you. I explained to him that these people were offering burnt incense to appease the wandering spirits in accordance with Chinese beliefs, for that was the month of the Chinese Ghost Festival. I also told him that THE HOLY SPIRIT told me that one day, He would bring me to hell and show me all about their operation.

After lunch, we gathered in his hotel room with another sister who was a seer as well. During the prayer, as we were holding hands together to form a circle, this sister told me that Satan was in the middle of us, trying to strangle me but could not touch me. Upon hearing this, I rebuked him and he left. Following that, she saw Satan walking toward the LORD JESUS who was sitting on His throne, and he kneeled down before JESUS. Satan then complained to JESUS concerning what right I have to delve into his operation. To his shame, JESUS rebuked him and told him that He found nothing wrong with what I have spoken. Satan walked away in shame submissively. This incident convicted me that I should fear THE LORD JESUS more than I should fear Satan; and to walk circumspectly by not giving him occasions to accuse me.

SHEKINAIH

WE, THE TRINITY (THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT and THE SON) appear to her in person to convey Our decrees. She stands in our council and co-rule and reigns with us in the three realms. AARON K DAVID

Shekinaih is My eye; Aaron K David is My mouth. Shekinaih is My head; Aaron K David is My body. They are My wheel within the wheel. Together, they will deliver My letters to the Seven Churches as in the Book of Revelation.
